Have you had enough yet, Peter? I know that I have.

While innocent Israelis were slaughtered by Hamas terrorists, far too many individuals on U.S. soil cheered them on.

Some waved terrorist flags. Others called for the destruction of our ally, Israel. And some even walked free on American university campuses - spreading hate and defending Hamas.

Let me be clear: **Anyone who supports Hamas, a designated terrorist organization, has NO place in the United States.**

That's why I'm launching an urgent petition demanding that every Hamas supporter be immediately identified and deported.

**[But I can't do this alone. I need your name. And I need your support right now. Sign my Official Petition: DEPORT HAMAS SUPPORTERS >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/KLobWgnhGK_kFDsDyjYD2S0NRmanFQ3xn48uZ98j_RaM2X66P_1jn0Q2Cod8paWc7AnCX6FEMbpwPISpQMY85dTtmE1ykqoZwMLhV_iAYC_3BzI-VAe7ImgYZDI8QHyidFS2bl9bPdyENXmS3CKRb-tqCrrA7HpMzWXuWtWF_ok-hZSOXW486YBUXCVSPwRoT5aH1r4HauceSkm9xdqOo77LfQns-KE0CEZpRR0IiTmc6AbzKZjpt8TmTyxJ8zY6cP1zmqOxOgn61Qd6l1DVRSZm3Uq17hs7jKhTIWZsd3H2JmwzEX0ZthyvtfdfVX4N3sPwnFyz7x1EA_c-0Be4vUoRofrLAnCD5Wk7qmg0ibBi8i_RcCxo5f51as4rUUsCQzeS9Gz0cunZsah78FqbsxKa8Xg4RIttvzCZ6iurBD5dX_deLqZgB3G6dIWsepkU_DgFvBDK-np4CucurwD0x6xfwIUNaH13n8T9p5fo8FLMiiLSIQa-OnUZsa5-5s68mIjDOVOxDweam8ad1NKQgBHsr2Ih4uLs_AUpZH9JwVf7dZlSkUrJkF1lcsN9OGOGgyiRYsO6LZ-K3kcRu-XN2q_GxOp1B9O1AztYPIAMB0rALQM/b22T8e1DvSPaBak_gPnjooOBiEUWpR3o/7)**

clean_body: Have you had enough yet, Peter? I know that I have. While innocent Israelis were slaughtered by Hamas terrorists, far too many individuals on U.S. soil cheered them on. Some waved terrorist flags. Others called for the destruction of our ally, Israel. And some even walked free on American university campuses - spreading hate and defending Hamas. Let me be clear: Anyone who supports Hamas, a designated terrorist organization, has NO place in the United States. That's why I'm launching an urgent petition demanding that every Hamas supporter be immediately identified and deported. This isn't about politics. This is about national security, American values, and basic human decency. No country that loves freedom should tolerate those who stand with terrorists. And once you've signed, I'm asking you to go one step further. We need 10,000 signatures by midnight. Yours in freedom, Elise Stefanik Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: Peter, I proudly serve on the DOGE Subcommittee , working to EXPOSE and ELIMINATE the waste, fraud, and abuse buried deep in our bloated government. But I need your input on one of the key people helping us lead that charge: Elon Musk. He's standing shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump to take on the bureaucracy, slash WASTE , and fight for common sense in Washington. Naturally, the Radical Left HATES him for it. They 've attacked him in the press. They 've gone after his businesses. And now they 're trying to SILENCE him completely. That's why I'm asking you-- 👇👇👇 Let me be clear: Elon is one of the strongest America First allies we've got right now. But his bold reforms are under fire from EVERY angle. If we don't show public support for him and the work we're doing on the DOGE Subcommittee, That's why I need 25,000 patriots to weigh in tonight. Will your name be missing? For accountability, Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Los Angeles today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This movement is not about partisan labels or purity tests; it's about class solidarity.
It is about the thousands of people who came out in Los Angeles today to stand together and say our lives deserve dignity and our work deserves respect.
We can either have extreme wealth inequality with the toxic division and corruption that it requires to survive—or we can have a fair economy that guarantees health care to all, for working people, along with a democracy and freedoms that uphold it.
Oligarchy or democracy, but we cannot have both. **I've made my choice.**
We must fight the oligarchy that has created this nightmare. And that is why I have never taken money from lobbyists or corporations, and it's why I never will.
[Will you chip in $5 today to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? These town halls take major resources to host safely. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250412-2.o5hlK7&refcode=em20250412-8597-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8597%2E2526796%2EyIJKjg)
Every donation helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250412-2.o5hlK7&refcode=em20250412-8597-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8597%2E2526796%2EyIJKjg)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

Friend,

**[President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/vLUfQfgVyOPS7sMnwsrZkA~~/AAVLBhA~/ZVh6PByD8-mE64G1UyXyjQ-H-dkaTqUZrU3gtsVTpR7YqTskKWX6LKeFqHXtBzRoW-401W5BJgymCDB_-A3duq5U8D9024dWknX_D54TYM39Yoq2_ErT0pS-nJwKCDViM8yqKghEPl3ZlxbXyArS7a9Rp_b4VhtRGtRB8S6oqnXafEEhHSzHRdHYDzm1LyuQH-9MO3TychSQUZW6Er76u-P2sT3nR-iHU63no3fLmfkL70TYfEOdOFYIo9w_stBbN7ih3WwbJaOx8GU0Qb8hfNWxejyAQWKS1vQs3DLcbQXBEPtCCQn-akr3FWl2_mBG1hwbPolgwPBnc47ERkVTYe53oVvQXvS6YRdrn9R3sfdfaK30PfYXt30-K9q6CYzdfJDJjuXBa-t0pHEeQfA6j35KeULwxbJNWazLnDuRDZg~)**

Working with President Trump, we can change the course of history in ways very few have dreamed of -- and I am so excited for what we will accomplish. What President Trump is doing to make America strong and prosperous will benefit the entire world. Representing South Carolina has been - and will continue to be - the honor of a lifetime. With President Trump by my side, South Carolina and America's greatest days are ahead!

******************************************************[JOIN TEAM GRAHAM!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/vLUfQfgVyOPS7sMnwsrZkA~~/AAVLBhA~/ZVh6PByD8-mE64G1UyXyjQ-H-dkaTqUZrU3gtsVTpR7YqTskKWX6LKeFqHXtBzRoW-401W5BJgymCDB_-A3duq5U8D9024dWknX_D54TYM39Yoq2_ErT0pS-nJwKCDViM8yqKghEPl3ZlxbXyArS7a9Rp_b4VhtRGtRB8S6oqnXafEEhHSzHRdHYDzm1LyuQH-9MO3TychSQUZW6Er76u-P2sT3nR-iHU63no3fLmfkL70TYfEOdOFYIo9w_stBbN7ih3WwbJaOx8GU0Qb8hfNWxejyAQWKS1vQs3DLcbQXBEPtCCQn-akr3FWl2_mBG1hwbPolgwPBnc47ERkVTYe53oVvQXvS6YRdrn9R3sfdfaK30PfYXt30-K9q6CYzdfJDJjuXBa-t0pHEeQfA6j35KeULwxbJNWazLnDuRDZg~)******************************************************

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zur0p0d3lbo7entd3o11dc0872mster3psvkrej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5v1d617prqlljfgln87948ia3r8irdtq3ndfka0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1l395fajb5iuhsglpma9kog2huuoming06o1240_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0ef62mtgovm4utduoreo0t61kqbdjtam9gchtg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7sj12ldg0c09ul0ltqkahk1d397731nusqptcj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5ugrbh1vo56t52cmag3kqmkfgbmf4ue4u0vpoo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkb65doscbcpn1it500l3ets824atuqeh5bmsp08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z845qaetvgfl49o2ipdnbiscdvtsf2fqb772biag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr3709177ul0o1sg882bjhdcli41lmuisj9qkndg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7i4kbkig1l7qjidjf0t65svc52353f88q9vfcpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---

---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. [Privacy Policy](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb59qh9a51k4nhcqvr1vogpd3tgv7sb0t7oh28no_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob1chh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi145ffkmhmfhodo4f7mk8cjgtljcsjfhe8g3d1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob2cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcg49ki30igb1jnfp7kcs2aspcn6dsb1srrksfb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob2cdh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z232d67qri520cmafmfapersak5c210rri009q30_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clj61ob2cdh2bs)

name: DOGE Alerts
subject: Elon Musk sheds a tear & sends a warning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Democrats want to take DOGE to the woodchipper

| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9upr66449n3s9hskovc9c0lsf9ecrd93f488b70_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)
---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.
**[So before Democrats levy their next round of attacks against DOGE, can we count on you to go on the record and say I STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfkn9930e50kirh123mou7qpo64p32vsq9di24k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)**

[STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhg243okkt68vpb790cnk2cfnufficjhbtl88ukg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)
Please. This is the single most important thing you can do today.
Please don’t be silent at this most critical moment.[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdahlelea8rm678cav5bni0sqek1pjn27epkpe5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu3b1dujc81essmh3fhi0a7irefik2p2op7v8qjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn3sk8p6kc65r2mi6m45krt1nd3giftn8qkkrglg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjbi3rt6ol5cvugs29nb8gd27njvbiqem069vp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0q3tf9qht8eljeekkp8irefmbs0l1v2rknbq0d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6qdb7mb40mmq68e138ped934vicsptbdeio7eb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm8p31c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zimdpfcokenua05bf96fc3be4ton2tetipredvr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zspml7bdn6gpvdkngkf8qgj7h1ivqho2jm7ptr90_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zes8s5ifbijocc3rodbj8vjn0gnj6ujf53mgs8t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1e3nagn115kss8q52t70nhv33knp984al6ddan8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp771e0i527kb81mi7940ak8jkrc4g2fg0mitvl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl12sl6rkvqjonm77tta1f8gtr3dp43h9hblpdj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zju416pp022ffmmnfjrgun3v9vo92jqj7cdcoh90_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsarslcie4c7q8at7v1mq8e32jegb885nddnl3gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zomq50plr1h1dljbasurant05tct6akivnuhoa2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn7lolih5mcflhflnmd8pai9d13ds6j287pmijcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb47bnof0els5fktut4igfoqltq36sm50ohehgd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4o32chh2bs)

Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zql1ghnl38mmsdgfdan9gqfgk4tec63ba53c39e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4p70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6datn68mivm0r8ogj8jgjl99m9ufoib5dhdarbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4p70cjh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6t205f02ikuaddkba2p53c0kinjgm2qjm6fpu38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4p70cjh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdjh0mtrq0079vmsfed0uaedkbc0jbo3vuicbp60_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4p70cjh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7ps7riuqche2b47vlstq2easc4seeld5jgthnkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm4p70cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc9pv451mtke0jmh2mtvflql705q5qrpm00e6218_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm2pr6cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs2043dbn8m5d11u9docjp9vpfpl1gblmsda30fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm2pr6cph2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zudmm9ttac2m2sh8q8jpfch2g7i7fgfp87nnaa7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm2pr6cph2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjfm8o2gt0rso331h959f4co78gs9oaujs7sa4cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm2pr6cph2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo903k0vuimpammj6dsl4008cvqdajhttua691l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgm2pr6cph2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

name: Combat Vet & Patriot Troy Downing
subject: Cold War 2.0
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
You’re in a war, and you didn’t even know it.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter,

China is an existential threat to our nation, and no rational person can deny the facts. The data is clear, and the threat is real. We cannot afford to sit idly by while China continues its dangerous trajectory.
---
[ **STOP CHINA**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._3hgBiyVkECJAEEQ)
---
**This is USAF/ANG Combat Veteran Troy Downing. As someone who has faced down terrorists overseas, I know a threat when I see one. **China has the largest and fastest-growing military in the world. They are militarizing the South China Sea, making aggressive territorial claims, and conducting espionage on a scale unlike anything we’ve seen before. But more alarming than this is that the threat is here at home. The FBI opens a new espionage case against China every few hours, and the scale of their operations is staggering. They are building nuclear silos and establishing military bases worldwide, all while using economic warfare to steal our intellectual property and technology. >From their involvement in global conflicts to funding the fentanyl crisis and their plan to disrupt the U.S. from within, China’s agenda is clear:** they want to be the world’s #1 power under a totalitarian regime. They see the United States as their greatest obstacle, and they are actively working to undermine us.** This is not just a foreign policy issue — it’s a national security **EMERGENCY**. China is infiltrating our resources, stealing our private information, and spending billions to buy up our land. The time to act is now.I need your support to take the fight to Washington and put an end to China’s dangerous plot. Together, we can stand up to this threat and protect our future. **[Rush your support today to support a pro-America Patriot like me and help secure our nation’s safety.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._dJrPpYfvNe_m8I_D19bmg)**
---
[ **STOP CHINA**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._5NJqt25Q)
---
Sincerely,
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Troy Downing
Congressman, Montana’s Second District
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
---

Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104

body:

**So far, only 99 have responded ... _which means we 're just waiting on YOU!_**

_**[Friend, all responses will be immediately flagged for President Trump's advisors, so it's important that you help us complete our survey before midnight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znrgc27nu1pn7d83k8bdh6gr90bn1efgc7ga9bc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor2cjh2bs "Friend, all responses will be immediately flagged for President Trump’s advisors, so it’s important that you help us complete our survey before midnight.")**_

**_Trump Satisfaction Survey_**

**Registered to:** Friend

1.) Do you approve of the ICE deportations of criminal illegals?
2.) Do you approve of banning men from women's sports?
3.) Do you approve of tapping into American energy resources?
4.) Do you approve of using our military to address the border crisis?
5.) Do you approve of ending taxes on tips?
_*** Optional Question: Are there any questions, comments, or concerns you 'd like to share with your Republican Senate Majority? ***_

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcvrqb5ubl3ht6uobomsfc7ro3da4kdlo9j41jk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zftbtkuu6m11kpsv7rmt1gpqvpjvlr880c7td160_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor6c1h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcg8t9onr87jkdr0p2rd5519kf4q5nhffmu8neoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor6c1h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm3kn82eio3atk95uid5sm0am3sgb0a9n800tg1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor6c1h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjroaaqsnrk64cjstakqar8brqkndiudjmlkjckg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmaor6c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk23t5g1cqnftqraijg4ao74nrfrl2fb7ri01e20_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg71mu2cs0qdvhf635f6faotd066jd66rgub07cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0a7ab4ofrj8r48tters6kbv898t5v6cogt57avg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z68dtm4b2on3gui22skvf8tkf21j9gfvk4t3pnoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlh91olgs4jbrgthepeuplvl1gejv7a2jruqbna8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsjqgnj9bvv3tteaitpduu63a1misef4quu9ui98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdupuh6dln5jpp6sqaq08qdhg49tf5afdknf1rvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmtcqs9t5ji74dj8dgnub9u2jjmie620hp5063bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvnabpbcorhdq8l9ugf1n1rniafdg9so7pr4crg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4v3qriuj7em2sfejsok754k9ing4ckqom804v1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1clgmeob4cjh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: The Flyover
subject: Envoy-Putin Talks, Cheapest Beer, and 200 Million Insects
body:
US envoy [Steve Witkoff met Russian President Vladimir Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnsbtD9noxULhIQ3dpUyL_rA8nBp_AOri3j0ifbqSRvtF83ae7TTmtj0-7kKmxTCCgvQm8STUFm_J7Qh5MJAJSnIzsEFvVowY-G-EpYkAFIGMHg7ZKQEAfwTnXq0HzZC5NoFRSCNF2jZQCUAzgeiCtoWMoKKRatua7pLXOFPO7vGhrfFl4NnOtz52pDwYjg_E4jsY5f3UMxpWOncFot5p8piv6bVE_53n251D4ZsLzSDmnXV8rj8Wm_KfW_16-DPwGAAD__7W0UtM) in St. Petersburg on Friday in a four-hour meeting focused on a ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine.

# Sunday, April 13, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1860, the first Pony Express delivery arrived in Sacramento [after a 10-day ride](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUxvGnwQ4DB0SnoJjGbm57SwNyHM-GEQPsuL79xs22W_-T75fv_2N6OIq0Pf-5F9q6pAkEdFxoLtUUHMVz0k2wCyKgatDKXutODdpAs9olKJh96NXsg_dedsNsjFuUGFwXzM01ZK81oaWSQoiub6UUoMUN_ABoDPRMCwxUU24_Em11xSWe6Y25ndOriXatdS9M3RmMDMbjONqVSk35vDqDsa5UeHAnp43_Fgbjfc8UuWIw7mk7OX7tGUvhAf1nLU22YT8oRirm4p8vR_GHq3_df1v4DgAA__-NdV1q) from Missouri, setting a new national standard for speedy mail delivery. The service ended 18 months later with the arrival of the era's hottest new technology: the telegraph. ## US Envoy Meets with Putin over Ukraine War
US envoy [Steve Witkoff met Russian President Vladimir Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnsbtD9noxULhIQ3dpUyL_rA8nBp_AOri3j0ifbqSRvtF83ae7TTmtj0-7kKmxTCCgvQm8STUFm_J7Qh5MJAJSnIzsEFvVowY-G-EpYkAFIGMHg7ZKQEAfwTnXq0HzZC5NoFRSCNF2jZQCUAzgeiCtoWMoKKRatua7pLXOFPO7vGhrfFl4NnOtz52pDwYjg_E4jsY5f3UMxpWOncFot5p8piv6bVE_53n251D4ZsLzSDmnXV8rj8Wm_KfW_16-DPwGAAD__7W0UtM) in St. Petersburg on Friday in a four-hour meeting focused on a ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine. The talks were described by Russian special envoy Kirill Dmitriev as "productive." It is the [third time Witkoff has visited Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn8NdEbjsYGkcHG6E13SXokMHofZGDvCDij_fsX2233SJz09vf-38WY5cHzc7Uqm-DQiYCtAC6lGZzl8Rl0744mQVE1G9lq36qI7rBej-7mjSVsF6OYLeqtVa9urtk62zoOr2Zw00FJJAGj7RkpADVecLkhdh32lgRyXtDVfiWNZyIdP2mlr5rTWwSylvHKl_lQ4VDgcx9HMU4505POvcDhnhUMutJM4uDyT96Js7_UlKO7pIziK7Z0zW_HcaA0cT5IaOJaZXaX-_b3fBICQYCcnl3oz7nVwCJy7U-2xWg4_KuW3NLvB7wAAAP__uC5lbA) and met with Putin since President Trump's return to the White House. Trump has been pushing for an end to the war since Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022 and has previously publicly criticized both Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Putin. Trump’s special envoy to Ukraine, retired Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg, appeared to suggest that Russian forces could remain [in the parts of the east which they already occupy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn8NdEb2eICkcHENXa69Ejl4gLkYG9kmKPvrV2y_3Sc96dPT-_cYH5Y9h-Wv3ciUOY4goRUShdKjs-w_I9bOzERAuiajesRW37CDejXWIt6tolmiQwdw67EDcFq3cqZJtzWb602i0kpK2faNUhJQ3uF5A-o66CuU5LjE1PyPHMpKs__EN6VmilvtzVrKniv9p4KhguE8zyY8p0BnvngFwzUvEJN3FQzHK1kOJBy_2ZETdKS4k0hHzmzFVwyURaK8x5D5yZ7LR5R0bLt4EZdVvMj7uCwiTcGClPe-r5Nx-8nec-4u12Wz7H_cym-t3ga-AwAA__8Tr21c), separated by Ukrainian troops and a demilitarized zone. Kellogg later clarified that he was not proposing a partition, but a potential allied “resiliency force in support of Ukraine’s sovereignty."
## Afghans, Cameroonians to Lose Protected Status
More than 14,000 Afghans and close to 7,900 Cameroonians [will have their temporary deportation protections (TPS) terminated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhDAQBNCvsbtD67XBULhIQ3dpUyJj1rCRwRewDl2-PiL9dSON9EbzdR_unhNv86dfyZWYBwSsb2BuSg-T5_QajJxcJELSkpyyxtS6NQ3KxXWj0h5iQG0bDJao1jFGFbVSXW21l-wuDYzSCgBqWykFaKDDsUVqGrTCAE1c8l59Z97KQjG98pP2KuRVJreU8jiE_hDYC-zP86zGMVydwH6j8xDY-71wSHTFMNM2Q_tD9jfL3U2Pk1Pio7lW5tVz-lfLu5dPh38BAAD__60HUpw), according to Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. The secretary found that conditions in Afghanistan and Cameroon no longer merit U.S. protection. TPS is granted to nationals of designated countries facing conditions, such as armed conflict or environmental disasters, which make it unsafe for them to return home. The Biden administration [granted TPS status for Afghanistan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ8GOiP74AApXNyGLrfdEhl8DGflP9lOUN5-RbbedvTp08x8PZaHJkdh_689qmrjAhxujEsm-sVocu9FtkZZRMC-RSVGKW_9JAdoD2Ws0VYYwc0dRhTrinYDmIwEPq39ii2py8al6AXn_DZ2QnCQ_A7rBDgMMDaSo6Eac_cdKdQDrXvHF-Zui7516qg1lab_18DcwHyeZ1e2TCmVgGe5mAbmFB1V2koDM3lPe9aVYmhgrvnpE9PGU6BSf2OGwVDYWUWfYtb5zVKOFbeKhpWq67MwGzMLH1i7wmyOnmm7H_qS6MB0MGzTHnOMoc3KpJOcozJcU3avyX2q17-ufCn4CQAA__-xqHxM) in the aftermath of the United States' withdrawal from the country when the U.S. made efforts to evacuate Afghan nationals who had aided the United States. Citizens of both countries have been protected by TPS since 2022. [Courts have blocked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ_GZIyg-bEvILjE2Vx6ocVAY1hhsICZ1bz9ypNv1uoqVX2q__ftblNOZf9nDzQj1A0YKMok5WLzNuX3Jok3ARFQEDR8llKJRWog0SyPIHxAAMcCt0twCpXEedazQM-CJslcaUxywRljar5xzkCyP_BYALWGeZIMfRq13b5qKiNiyO_6wnZz9SDZxDHOPom_E6wTrCNiTDlf2gTrWXNy7wnWYkeqxWba0T1bGtdPgVRKc-pjpx7P2sbHRM9WB7rr7HScndqwR1tow_DcETt19sBWa6Gl4lVCmvHnd8o5dX3B7odNHwAyfhvrZeAnAAD__9OxbaY) similar efforts by Noem for other countries.
## List: Ranking the Cheapest Beer by State
Illinois is the cheapest state to buy a case of beer in the U.S. at $16.43, [according to this survey](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQxfGngW6QPTYfKVzcJl1uuyWamAFm12CEHVDefkX67Y_--ul8PfoHSZB1-k8LuzzGHhXWoCxo0w8k4d3bcnAjM7Ip2enW2tp0tsFydo3iDn2tybRYt6rhrqNREZPyvr09fSnuqimrjVZK1W2ltUKrbvjskJsG28IqHiTHvfqOsuaZx_COB--Vj0sZ3Jzzlgrzr8B7gffzPKtD0ouCp00yBUn5GhZ4X2jbeIA5nrC8_AwEaGEj_wNxhCfzDj6mnEBWYPIzvCBBypT5UzZTjFPg_pBp5Zy53N2wnRKCpOYiTgtJ-JDyXxcdDn8DAAD__xXcaUw). Alaska is the most expensive state to purchase a 24-pack, based on the prices of Bud Light or Miller Lite, averaging $33.62 per. Wyoming is the second-most expensive state at $28.78. Some states with higher costs have sparse populations and fewer beer options. Taxes are a major factor. According to [the Tax Foundation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFv8yAQxvFPA5ut48CYd2B4F7Z07WhdwpFQERPZ1zT59lUqdez0bM9P__fDcqDa6np-oytHKX1BwGkANxi7ZKrtuTidY2FGtpqjmZ2bbHAe9SWeCpXsJo92Lp4cBIAS0FChAGbioGt8vYEz1gDANI_GADr4h8eA7D3OygHnKn0bP3pd5cKlPfudt_HUr7rFi8htV_a_wqQwCT1K_1wzSe3r2LezwpRJSGGi1hSmXUj4d4cj8zYIPXgfENApTHqL-fZVW6u7f9HnK9X2Q8lf6feI3wEAAP__4T5ZVg), taxes are the single most expensive ingredient in beer—sometimes accounting for nearly 40% of the total cost when both state excise rates and federal levies are included.

The talks were described by Russian special envoy Kirill Dmitriev as "productive." It is the and met with Putin since President Trump's return to the White House. Trump has been pushing for an end to the war since Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022 and has previously publicly criticized both Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Putin. Trump’s special envoy to Ukraine, retired Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg, appeared to suggest that Russian forces could remain , separated by Ukrainian troops and a demilitarized zone. Kellogg later clarified that he was not proposing a partition, but a potential allied “resiliency force in support of Ukraine’s sovereignty." | | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/1yi3qhTg-QiM4GtvLg3km6DP9FLObMxnloYHcyfURywa1wCTRRk9aR5RSrNxSIcpMXJYK2t10kFqWOYGuIdPa_nibZivbZotUDYD1UB4-FEps-wbNc3DItmyksh1iCoPK2BlyL_Hj_B4ZoeBxcPl311pjHC9UwX1KfuItLYKo0WV1LowzBMaAICpYyvhYxUue2Ut1sFTt6NUHAhr5PI6BbN-vwQHUYmiIN25sv2eTAjVl463g-yfJjzsXhIXvsaHd3YIJe8AhGfcr6H9BDbg__gb4z0BqIspzkHA35nXnmGOypqyeIBx07rQ9WHNFqScTE_6KQ5Cy7lq3mINLG185gQBi_b85UPEs0C44lBSPylNMSQTYosbrPJPvS-QOYWZp2M7j9T0PRB53-u2DyWdkDLScBtCQT9sM0GDNLa4hSCNWd2zp4LUBmBjMtZWYNWM73s-kKOM6hr5gYz87qgkranFV0g6On2-9RMj6ETsAkeF8etFeqymhQNbMg/8wdf4mLFrz94eS-2O2WFL-aCNvto2f9x/7)," now available on DVD.

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/oWe165BfxKEfstT6T3zSj3w54i-R8LsGeXIHwWNq1mvXL8pXj_j4CLaF5x-0uwXIpOVWOFXprvZwzszpkYV_G2iMC81VB8YN8cr8Vjgon4OvFW6ABYw16enVUnRyxtC9QiJ80U5VzNvhJ68VHskciCqnGmPS_ksVgimOsNNhA1cBmJDeFf6NsGrZHV-alXBi8S1P8zANNgTufMD_EBCX5tBwCIHU9PVkDdoqzt962XIJKv7s1S_gju8aHLuqwzqw6gPoGdt3DCvh_8q8iGSdmcU4q4m74aC13lSnEHgrQEwc3IWtiS384xbI5FTyLzKASxJ1EtiCP6ti2IpjRdmxvt8ca2RqxkSPGc2O5lLdtAQ6HRPQU9U45z4eq-XUD4VlXCn5CWxeoLjM1laVMBRccxSNJr40qd4mwJHH2iT1y67clXwJPDvRgRXschsAR0pf1usWqXozeeL-isMMr4xxgJhu5Xn1XGUxD_kV-NX5EZQ-UJAULcNj1vu0-E-XRZPF/GYLzZ8uWbUp2EGWAYk4wFw44zUUI3JCt/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/4P8UkQ7_PdIFIif0ZqK3TExfI5vZaTHsC5P4vRG47tmE7ubQa1UpZ_CkWu_GQKqXxqkmhTztP9ehHS5dJGEEAIA96ggLghKatnxQN3N17z0qwaLMRVG5e1vrS4qJUJ1wrMX7o0IgfM9MdKtPBFLmn0GR6UY4FjqhDlligxrOwO4Y1MaGeMW00Uh2-HAPU4vDqMsEBgHm6oEZ92we4WWkI9uDkzAYiccZ87CBr-tyxr2FlOrcQh4La9m6u-ysBLZLMTTeqL-1fxQI_-OgvknYIRvtItzsFCxFIiB3CpqOnEx1aKI_SwOWM7wa0_4S_WrRa3IGdwzoHrGZvvbTu3yydpePlSGI166iFKK5_e0Uw294fbHBv8dcOqWl1G-OwCAy1ONfmj4OWx7bKZcjbsaJKmuPXLER2CLjyJAE23-AI-56Tl6e9-7cCWl0i3d4HNrPFg7RRvj_vrVEG0Xx0qbcUoEIweevO8glAJiVlRjoIocwT30B52loIDCuV0cTyRZG/kuw10zgzPXAoBPhVAdFM7CK8uelNWSId/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/lNlMMPxq1hxZZNPffX76vAFpbAB2MghQ1NDehIZee8PKg0JWfXtoeZdPbuKtDAd9aKUGMPLV5LJCSbe3W7T_oEz5IEa7lHQ_MIJHiX9YJ_Jvepb1dowiimHjNjRywiXLh0e8aIJAX5pE3nTnn3NPwol6xBwk2W21OyHReW2hzBDHk1Dv_pUC47FoQg-EZ3TjIGG6kWoViVc61jp6SWluXX9Qz1ggHNzV7mrE3vC9LeEKf0UZhchmaU3F_HPXSEm2bgFmcpAFR10uLBr2y-JhwGg7IhhWnYkCml5Am3Wds05XYDJHozQmjdb86eXYml0ngveXAhUODhrZ0LCKxuKyjdQ06aoAsVa1BkdDwvBC1P5cVk9inyL_nq5y21kL64jpF3FXF065kXeoJgAOpiAtoStLUIeHFahSX_bWYUu8IDwa5V5YXvyU_k5JPKzUkC58FafhbUzSnlMYPUPe0bVZoBqpCvJ66nf419w0tWH_foBdxMsUpZMRRNDVF_yiSO6x/-Pe3yOSk3OwvpWvrY9pYt6HRNVjLL1rC/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/68V7vLVdWLUVvwYdAhV5V_k8UjMn0EBmLcj11vX850uVxaaxd4FXBzBGZ_y890Rk1YrZeypbxPa1wlWCnrXUioD3ZB5vVQFVmyzvc-xVhigr1-s5MUbmFziHCdewZyLo9Fpwe0_AR56AXNDmxz0fZAfvXr7Tp6IHOQRFi82QaevKVWSXTikvnN6YPj1FKgmPK9c7Dkwh2Wa4YoS9rGXQcX1wWi8YWCJIL8p3I26h1pZFwOvv0CAOpIMmdXH0R3Y0v-DNmnCvkv8eIlbhzR53bPL2q4xUfGJf6Xtvsgbfmb9b-8SkV5pwgTyX-OCAY7FZd-c4lfp0Cdfvv_VP_x-n7R1S4DcCewNSwVLYLMwwWQisxA16fwHAS6bNLuGatbFVyPE1JxGePpm60d5ohNGY7n7EJzzmSi9nfxbZsq2V6x0yYPSfc38p_Sod_sS_Jw2P18-t_yg2RtXtO0EnSAXaUhd92D99wZYn-fbLpFDDgoAaYA_r_2qNNrVaryU_8VHb/n537CZLRsEqHNn0GFKWkQ9BIXdwvu2dL/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")

Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/baO0ZSkXPt2sFDrxH0ZS1pmXE6D0bm-U4CtPkrIv6QEJL18CRLJP6yMy8ufqZZ0eE74d6vsBCkS8zr50P4k87Bsyq1IWvQ016eZPwTqhijPSI1cLMFG-Zw6iUotzcNztHVRFCfZ3mO8LuvmQZV8gNv9cub0AT5XgGTi-55aMs0NrnlzxSilXs_uc93yGlXjBcNhLxdL1p_UauxpJHGU_1YutMrZQPiDU0VMnPQ02qn3T-YkdqM4soZgHV6oWm1tpu4cix5q2MUfWgyoIqMqivEPG8s73z9o1BfR_lECEY7DvuW53mXWRQBGE0UbhUQBvm2oTAm-yBRVRx02IWz6pI9bqGm3JPKt_d-jHBBm4CnzakrpNHGGOV_kGAVqg0H7nI-NIgpu6G29V09NxJqSgTugkcd23hZXMODgQFL9EY3FbPCvk1EOJ6QE6TIPbPvBYuDB_tbCCIjXnXRLcPizk1Dml7iyS7TWQR-pxk8tzfZFQWuIT3SqvuVI3w1_v0trG/-E_CzLoKDM5JcYwBVej_vavJ-QrOJPFU/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Eduardo Verastegui, Sound of Freedom producer
subject: God’s children are NOT for sale
body:
Sound of Freedom: Be a Hero to Vulnerable Children

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, The multi-billion-dollar human trafficking and child sex industry is finally being exposed. The Trump administration is following through on its promise to release documents related to Jeffrey Epstein’s international sex trafficking ring and cracking down on the sanctuary cities that are hotbeds for this horrendous trade – _bringing much-needed transparency and accountability that is essential for winning the fight against modern day slavery._ **This news couldn’t come at a more important time. ** **With an estimated 50,000 children sold into sex trafficking last year, we need to make an even bigger effort right now to rescue more missing children.** Even with these welcome developments, it will take significant resources to rescue these minors and combat their abusers around the world. **[**At the Sound of Freedom, we need your immediate help equipping our agents with the resources they need to rescue defenseless children from global human trafficking networks. Will you help with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today?**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ — which you have likely seen or heard about — I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. Based on a true story, _Sound of Freedom_ tells the gut-wrenching story of a brother and sister — Miguel and Rocío Aguilar — who were abducted and sold to be used as sex slaves ... taken by organized criminals who tricked their father. _Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. **Now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. ** **[God’s children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. I hope I can count on your gift of $25, $50, or more to help us reunite young girls and boys with their families who are praying for their return.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
We welcome the actions being taken by the White House and Congress to help fight this heinous trade that ruins so many young lives. I couldn’t have said it better than Senator Marsha Blackburn, who said recently that releasing documents related to the Epstein case “will give us insight into this web of human and sex traffickers that has just spread like wildfire across the globe.” _With the help of these allies, we will finally start to get accountability for victims, too. _ **But it will take ALL of us to end human trafficking, which is why I’m writing to you today. ** The difficult truth is that rescuing an abducted child is incredibly complex – and expensive. No family should face the agonizing decision to end the search for their missing loved-one because the resources aren’t available. It’s difficult to place yourself in their shoes, friend, but it’s important for you and me to try. **[So I’m asking you today – will you please help us rescue more hurt and exploited children with your emergency tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to the Sound of Freedom Foundation?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Significant progress is being made to help families who woke up one day only to realize their child had vanished – with no idea where they were taken. But we’re up against a $9.5 billion industry, friend. _That’s why EVERY dollar helps to keep more children from being sold to sex traffickers. _ **[**Your gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation will be put to work immediately to help save lives and assist in the finding and rescuing of abducted children who have been sold into modern day slavery. Thank you for any amount you can give today.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** Many blessings, Eduardo Verástegui
_Sound of Freedom_ , Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiBp/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Dr. Amy Acton
subject: I worked for a Republican Governor. Now I’m running to be a Democratic Governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We need to put partisan politics aside to help the people of Ohio.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6d86a44-f19c-4971-9ba7-479bd9232055/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34e317a7-88a9-4481-b5a5-92303e113b1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, I’m Dr. Amy Acton and I’m a Democrat running for Governor of Ohio. I’m a doctor, not a politician. I care deeply about families, public health and advocating for Ohioans who are struggling. But when Governor DeWine asked me to join his administration as Director of the Ohio Department of Public Health in 2019, I had no idea what was to come. When COVID-19 spread like wildfire I worked side-by-side with Democrats and Republicans alike to defend Ohioans against the pandemic, the scourge of opioids, and fight for public health across our state. I believe that the best way to find solutions and help people is to work with folks from all walks of life and with all different viewpoints. And that’s exactly how I will lead as Governor. The problems we face don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. They just need fixing. And Peter, I don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican, either. I’ll fight for you and your family just the same. But I can’t win this race alone, that’s why I’m asking for your help today to keep our campaign momentum going. [If you’re ready to put an end to political games and get to work solving problems, please split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign before midnight tonight.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b5082a4-a7ca-4bc0-a602-9d338717daa7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ac13bb2-48a1-455c-aaa1-2e35287a7018/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: History Facts
subject: The “greatest single act of corporate espionage in history”
body:
What one historian called the “greatest single act of corporate espionage in history” wasn’t in search of stock market tips or a coveted algorithm.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68epgwyaeg8trh2nzo3a3r2l32b0b8hkp4u3vclf6hfbldpd882tiqtmv45vg697j2wllhydrlzmsrngbvpa4rvh7c9yzhj0s6eldwhh6pdfi3kghxnm4r2tvt034m6epbmw73sxrarubz59d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The British once sent a spy to China to steal secrets about tea.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hat one historian [called](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)**** the “greatest single act of corporate espionage in history” wasn’t in search of stock market tips or a coveted algorithm. It was about tea, which by 1800 was the most popular drink among the British — something of a problem for the empire, as all tea was produced in China at the time. And so the English did something at once sinister and cunning: They sent a botanist to steal tea seeds and bring them to India, a British colony at the time. The thief in question was [Robert Fortune](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), who was recruited by the East India Trading Company for the job.
---
This leafy skulduggery inspired the aforementioned historian Sarah Rose to write _For All the Tea in China: How England Stole the World’s Favorite Drink and Changed History_. [The book](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) details how Fortune not only came into possession of precious seeds but also learned the tools of the trade: how tea leaves were cultivated, dried, processed, and manufactured. The plan succeeded, with India overtaking China as the world’s largest tea producer within Fortune’s lifetime. China eventually reclaimed that title, but it took more than a century, and India remains the second-largest today.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our [Terms of Use](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2kh5r9m0gvx4pcsaqp87zkh95aiygqidlmd9ccg08mvkw7mwq7ms8ii3lh4187q8glegpx0v98aslzpbe0bctx52ivns36ry0pgkyqg9w5xumkudc1c05f32qmwrsxioqrinu8i1s1rdk4s6dbpehwi1dtzs7eq1p1yrn508ienjy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Privacy Policy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=463ko1dghoveuinkij75375rwhfajrdnb5u1k2cehydwk5p5zbfdi9ro4mirj3j5cwo8i9ibkdq0gglnof7yycuzcg27j6tujc091dltvmi9g6o3ib2qoxlnnkpedb47nz5sbz2vs6dqd507ufc0bqty5izkdt3zace5tjrqmrfs3z1m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---

---|---|---
## Neither China nor England drinks the most tea per capita.
Though both countries are synonymous with tea — China for growing it, England for consuming it — neither drinks [the most tea per capita](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sunjf6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). An astonishing 1.6 billion pounds are drunk in China each year, the most overall, but on a per capita basis, that isn’t even enough to crack the top 15. Far ahead of either country is Turkey, which drinks 6.9 pounds of tea per person every year — a full 2 pounds more than No. 2 on the list, Ireland (4.8 pounds). The United Kingdom comes in third at 4.2 pounds, with Russia (3.05 pounds) and Morocco (2.6 pounds) rounding out the top five.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dabfa5741133487a96e1f949202afb76&_e=QbUlzTFtz9MrMiT2ylnxJtxyo4oo0aTaVd5BinQnEF1rnTrMOR1yKVF2V3wNksOZJdth1SnTjTW_4tzqjY7xjXPY1-LRitQ--sWZv41ynykakX1Pg_G5uOiZ4qvMkx2uKVcJ49se479G3Aunj-42uWTeBCfiDlY1p8poD6qk-NjWSCCv0U50Yvlh3vuoZkcl6BVuEiV-neXrQKPOmjNecG7Y3gDL_LA_37Rp80Xl6mWLo6GbmQAHH1F4iWyWsZynff5jo5bgpaAOsmZR59Lun9bTBFUy9kcldt8nwC52pAV7-gEGfUGq-44H0CgSKAXxiM311EQ20dQxL1a8VJsLQ-DSTMrHcMs77TKAJxqRcDaNCZzyi1ewXeveuo5e4aIKeIOPztBjFUSaSf7Oc6jV7LaVvLVF7VMxBhzgvsYu0-m0twICd3-MlhymJaXzhR14)

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dabfa5741133487a96e1f949202afb76&_e=QbUlzTFtz9MrMiT2ylnxJtxyo4oo0aTaVd5BinQnEF1rnTrMOR1yKVF2V3wNksOZJdth1SnTjTW_4tzqjY7xjXPY1-LRitQ--sWZv41ynykakX1Pg_G5uOiZ4qvMkx2uKVcJ49se479G3Aunj-42uWTeBCfiDlY1p8poD6qk-NjWSCCv0U50Yvlh3vuoZkcl6BVuEiV-neXrQKPOmjNecG7Y3gDL_LA_37Rp80Xl6mWLo6GbmQAHH1F4iWyWsZynff5jo5bgpaAOsmZR59Lun9bTBFUy9kcldt8nwC52pAWJJj84sT2QCuDZ8VYnyYw-m5cLVnCoCR4S2FKIOGniaRjaQdsGe9RLdfId0D6SGCR3J19wlI_kO8eJbRQZumAgdHdNCT3i-Y4QMJuw6k1psnEIrmGbkC-ksSL0s6nlEOWPlvE4knmaVf6mme4kzUMv)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dabfa5741133487a96e1f949202afb76&_e=QbUlzTFtz9MrMiT2ylnxJtxyo4oo0aTaVd5BinQnEF1rnTrMOR1yKVF2V3wNksOZJdth1SnTjTW_4tzqjY7xjXPY1-LRitQ--sWZv41ynykakX1Pg_G5uOiZ4qvMkx2uKVcJ49se479G3Aunj-42uWTeBCfiDlY1p8poD6qk-NjWSCCv0U50Yvlh3vuoZkcl6BVuEiV-neXrQKPOmjNecG7Y3gDL_LA_37Rp80Xl6mWLo6GbmQAHH1F4iWyWsZynff5jo5bgpaAOsmZR59Lun9bTBFUy9kcldt8nwC52pAWoTeY9U3iXsSdngv4f4zU4SZdpRtQdR-7fIARYoOMEu6ngdjFMSEQsXO2hwErXQNy0V-hSwA7mBaGNxyYM49n2ca3L3oHL23f-EQ0Nu1hR6qIMNj1ZvCvGWBvYab8nWItbMj8wQ9rbC9MsvKcke3AF)
