# Sunday, April 13, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1897, [reports of more than 38 "airships"](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LFygzAQBNCvgQ5GEgeyChVp3DltSubQnc0lAjFIMfbfZ-xPSP92d2a_LuMFJcp6-8SFfXlc0_j9SzeeYgo_mXhLe8Eiac2FR6NM3yhodDcSSnyOUJOfFDlds9cWoAejbFfPngMgsYKhN8ENztkTWhjcdAqGqCNXi3-VKdCd1kpr07peTwiM1l47NZlTBYpJStrbMnPhB-ZrfKY7721ISx39XMqWq-6jMufKnI_jaN8I44IrhheqzBn3IiFyfomZ1wZlz7NsuZH1jsTUvDP17mk7JEbJg61A3RaU-J4p_3jk7s1fAAAA__92xXGo) began surfacing across 23 counties, mostly in North Central Texas. Witnesses described the crafts as roughly 50 to 60 feet long with cigar-shaped cabins, bat-like wings, and bright floodlights. Would you dive into a public fountain for the chance to win a hidden cash prize? [See what happened](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLtyhCAUhp8GOxxurlpQpLHbtCmdIxyUBMEBdt3N02d2HyH1f5lvvq_rfAUffFw_YUddHy7N3ze74hKS-SkWj5QrVJ9iqTgLJjrKFOVytuDDc1aN1QuzI29Q816pTgnWy2bTXMqx67mxwzCaUQ5OMSdHwLFXlwsT2Hj9OmOKS84Z56IdO76AQuh7J9kiBqIYWl9TbuuGFR9QXHimO-bWpL0Jeqv1KER-EDERMZ3n2ZqlRDzLKydiek-ImO7eYiJisukXY6H5VjZqIQQo1KVbrOAjdSnTkoyHQHe0HqjZIASMK1IDr35OBxFTk7U9Th-CL5eeKLbu4MMbp_7D3F2LvwAAAP__Z95-5w) in Dallas and get the full scoop in our _Et Cetera_ section. We’re sponsored today by [Audien Atom Hearing Aids](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0MFu6jAQheGnsXdEM-NJQhZeXAnldkOrSkh0F9nYAReDUWwIvH2VPkL33zmLf78dtibEcD2-m4vX5Tmm4fvujt7GdDhn529pKqaEdM3FDwRUr4BXqAZnQnwNLJ224DqUXmPLXDNBq-RJmwZ8V1tl_GjJqobRMHQNA4_QAbQy6OUMGBUiIFLV1WgNe9O2owJLa8HgXShpqsrJF_80eYyv9PBTdUgXGfWplFsW6p-gXlA_z3M1T4dzuNoYFyGop_-4RvykRlC_w83-bb1dsOrz3aJQm91X_yEn7W5ziDHkphUMx4sJv3tZ_hDjoeknAAD__-DCan0), offering affordable hearing aids with crystal clear sound.

## Judge Blocks Deportations Again
A federal judge in South Texas extended a [temporary restraining order](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2S2yAURp8GdWi4gIxVUKShc9qUGhDXEgkCDSDLztPv2NXW25_5fs6f23SzIYa0_LYb6va85-nv4Rd0Mc__qsc9l2ZbyKk2nDjjA2WSgpi8DfE1yc5rx_wIHWpQUg6SMyW6VY_jDE6McvBWeocOxuFynZVA5S4CxNwF_Q5jEgQAA-D9OICzEq1Sd8EcvxLJ0IeWS99WbPi09R5f-YGln_PWRb22tlcifhFuCDfnefYfqJXgjoR9Lgvh5t1BuGGScANAuPkw9NstuqItIS30gQn_HxhtqrSVY9upjQETxYRbwErt3Ag3XdF-P0OMoV4UkWzZbIifRe0H8h6afwUAAP__uY1_NQ) on Friday blocking the Trump administration from deporting Venezuelan migrants under the Alien Enemies Act. The order was [initially granted](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL9uwyAYxJ8Gb1j8LWFg6OItXTtaYD4nX4rBMjRO3r6Ku3TudtLpTve7z_N49pgwXz78Aq495jLevuMFQirTV42wlq35hiXXBqNgQlOmKJdj9Jieo-qiCyxa3oHjRimtBDOyuzptjZyktSwKo7Q2BrQ_xRCkUVIzqzt0rzKmuOSccS56q3nwCrwxs2RBnIhiELGVrW9XaPDwdU7Pcoetn8rSJXdtba1EvhMxEDHs-95PoWbY68snYnhJIoYDhh55-stEY7nRP2B0TR5zw3muFDP1CSFTyLAgVOqnRsTQbS6uO6aE9c0QxS6Lx3TsaP-47O7ETwAAAP__5I58eQ) for three detainees but has now been expanded to cover other Venezuelans held in the region. The ruling follows a Supreme Court decision allowing deportations to resume if migrants are given due process. The administration must report how many Venezuelans in the district could be affected ahead of an April 24 hearing.
## **Titans' Sneed Sued in Dallas-Area Shooting**
A [Texas man is suing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGSgyAURb8GOxx4YowFxTZ22XZL5wFPJYvgCInJ3--YT9j63nvmzvm5jTf0wcf5G1fS5TWl8f5wM5mQ7G92tKW9YPEp5kIjCGi5UFw2o0Mf3qOqnDbC9bIiLTulWgWia6pFX3p7AUtgabLU9iBRysb05kpIrQBVeX3ChJKNlEJKqPtWGlSEXTc1wsCVKUHOl7TXZaFCL8xTeKcn7bVNaxX0UsqWWfPFYGAwHMdRH3cznSGDIdKRGQyfGV8x8vzwceZxCnwL-KadnyTuyNJqaOd5SamcDSzc4s5DKtxHHjEvTx8CMRiqXbvt8CH4fOmYEvOKPny-lH9oe2r4CwAA___21n7L) Titans cornerback L’Jarius Sneed for at least $1 million, claiming Sneed or his assistant fired at him from a Lamborghini outside a Carrollton car dealership in December. The lawsuit, filed in Dallas County, alleges Sneed and another suspect attempted “[an unprovoked attack in cold blood and broad daylight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckD3ymzAQR08jOjH6woRCRRo6p03JCO0CcoTEaGVj3z6Dj_Bvttp5vzfv7326uxBDWv-4HW19L3l6PGHFOWb_jwCPXKqrISeqOCmhOi4Ml3oCF-JnMg3YWcAgG7SyN6YzSvS62SyiXnQHMIgbDIOXRs_OGQXG-2FwvmuCvWDCSC2lkFK1QydnZ9D1_aLFrH4xIxBCzaWtG1Z8O1riJ7-wtD7vTbRbrQcx_ZupkanxPM_Wz0SXLl0fTI1pidfFk5gaa6guEY8PV8KTOCVE4PRE4BeTA3rcZyyctpxrSCsPiX9X-YGFl28HpsamWDjOEGOgW8-MWHcX4teo_iDey6r_AQAA__91g4Gj),” and includes a still image from surveillance footage showing an arm reaching out of a vehicle holding what appears to be a pistol. The plaintiff, Christian Nshimiyimana, also claims he was later threatened by Sneed and a woman who identified herself as Sneed’s mother to discourage cooperation with police. Sneed, traded to the Titans last season, is among the NFL’s highest-paid cornerbacks. The team says it is aware of the matter and has contacted NFL Security in line with league protocol.
## Texas Temps Tumble After Heat Spike
North Texas will roast under [near-record heat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGO6yAURL8Gd1iAITwXFK9xl223tC7mOmaDgwU3Ifn7VfIJ285oRkfn-zyfIaZ4u3zBjo6ea55_7uGCPuXlWgMeuRBQzLdKOCuhDBeay2EOENNr1l1wXoRRduik1dpoJezQbW5ZpTcQgl0G78dxNNaclAGLcjmJMYQuuveZ0HKQUkip-tFIDxrB2nUQXv1jWmCIlEtPGxI-oa7plR9Y-iXvXXIb0VHZ8J-piamptdYvvt6w1XfP1PSZMDW9I6amAClB5WsuxFsutPGGQBsWTrgfWIDuBStHqISFN8Qrh6PExKViauqKC0eLKcV6skyLyw4xfUDoD84eTv0GAAD__5Mkfag) today, with highs around 90 degrees and dry, gusty southwest winds raising fire concerns west of Highway 281. It’s a hot cap to a sunny weekend, with folks attending the Fort Worth Arts Festival enjoying clear skies and summerlike warmth. But don’t get too comfortable—change is coming fast. [A cold front](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DFvgzAQBeBfYzajszEBBg9d2NK1IzL2Ga51MDLXkPz7KvkJHZ-e9D3pfV2nq6NE2_Lpbmj5EfP0_RsWnFP2P0fAPRd2THk7GCcNupVgpGqm4Cg9J1MFO0MYVIVWdca0RkPXVKu9eIxDG6FXGHEOMWILsx-GJnoIsQ0V2RcGRjVKgVK6Hlo1O4Ou62IDs-6FAQzEudS8IuPDHTE98x1L7fOtSnZl3g_RfAg9Cj2e51n7teTt1b4yOl6xCD26wuQTCj2-EelzCjKWvLE8aQtPeeyFtkVq0B30van3da-KDftJKdFx6YSB5eYovXf5Hxfdrf4LAAD__8dtdzk) will sweep in tonight, sending temps tumbling by Monday. Expect highs to fall into the low 80s in DFW, with 50s overnight, and a steeper drop across the Panhandle. The cooler air lingers through midweek up north, while Central and Southeast Texas hang onto the warmth a bit longer.

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/3Pg9mmgszKpX0OoeNA8aKfCrgDvq-hIPqyT6F-wg39_gvDdl-LjXyM2qK6k7Yc9OiK63Ql2c1TuIfzNSM2U1_Ca3SMO5h60u0Vfj5rS5FaJFZBTsjCCJ92xa2pDpVwlE3YTUxpzcj9hjxbE5H9nBW7T0RwMpKvG2bevQjXTcZJeVAyRbAcXA6CUrNA9cHXDur2xS1FwJ_m5s4b2-VxhuV9Cg4ueaB5PSC7jc3ofd8UsF9cM5Biie4L_artnXXUAeduNZxTkBR_xw3OzVWifvY1H16xoP1OqUSyXKmDHbp2qSvTtzoTXryQwmpkpV5I0vTRiBZ4twAxMYIsO60g1v7H17aWtDV_yznBQQNUAeQG8rnReYdHl7N6gan69fQMR8o_QRMEYWFfi5Ok1wuyZtjvrp9zsphT1yjdd2oYdJpwuRjMNI4VAJ-OBCqqmUPaZer4PP9zpD3aLe4N1RP35fpaRsD_01aTvjvFr8gLM7m5phY4JE8TscBW6CchQ0BZQc/fvg-38YRc1BsNncAy3QiLf0WfOQGB342/7 "Vice President JD Vance")

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/RZyV4SMYFX_ZlYOEIptCrHuKMm_oDzcYBdl38VkSfghiD887hpV48iEbLOE_epGq5fsHWZj9lfgFSVjrgqfQf9GnPr2D6LsRQzwgagrw5go4umh_Bx00lXm2D_vB2VQdOEIQkZj9Y52UgGLVG49OxLbv3VOM701psquj1FhxPWVylHpa8SuH7Mo7SDmrjpD067MBPgHB3oRD31QFqROyD4DG_6_h_oRWqM59klcd2tZpNvRH9nEYP89TDJQOBTVGEvBVTBMbMAqKzmuT2wrIJ9rW12dbnAD9daGMWUo21FQe9wlPKLM2XmFtFyPBfotYkP3nRixkD92drWx3v5T8qTaAdrSAQx3_AXPzN3HhSe_1vjI4iu98Io-mdwMFuctYgrIQp2zqKcRT1i3koA2cZxDTG6a3xnMcSrMs6883OV9af29aHhKaZJuAq6jWJcEnzwW6nP1WJcWMOuir9BG_nzUihLGbg0U3C1HqanQAcfw3gpTcpwusgPIFKJ7qAx3V/3AowWpFnjYfebYGWeoTa7_08QvwEg9mO/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/31n8bPu5NsSXsEIQBIcSOWeYolo4ffIOQjaFnKNTGXQc_yx24Ej1Vw9dwf01YSJ_MKOvZCV1jG5Yhj85YCwQNNSpGupEaw8YuBJLqXyqwcab20AuLsi5t49IR9u6Er2YCqI0Bi6g3NKNIpQB0FsbOPLv2tYIl9sL5eoYUpDmfPplLh4mQYqk0jFlh0PTQw35vsLNn3DcnOSSW9n6Q97LDQlJYOcfWY5sZhjCafFTK1yBMNsPEqyZoKZKVzj1coJrwzb1vcp_CZpHrfv0UCxjLrhf5gQfyljku9OkxBdEGqWSxng_k8ddcrsnThizmT5D-fJbEEhLKFPmzepnzC4jqH_OZP11U0TJXzZBew94CEZ64oFsMS3QakqdKL6_sUzacjpyioh5Ag5dVyBkJ3pB3Hy9bii9q9GuPDRD9k3GLYjs-EK8adL42CbrXQzsQtMzgFTB_GYR_kGX9WdSxH2kavfeo48mCtm1teo8LMFRK16N_gCXrW377abl-tJrjrh6/CZqHyUeS9j031YO1RIGzxbhe2To1c_dE/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/9JrJZW-psB-MXddl0yY0g9XV3erRhUdrRwQsZ-GBNa5u15l2ai3LWpicAuAC2qIa4YXXQ2ICs1UNqJyL0FpjjQea80hghEeS5qliB6542fuVHDycjiz2og4MxYrAS3vw2Mxuqb90Ed-sMUFj0P7aa1KKzItSeHeZVQyu_BUkR1ZK3_1QelXtN0jTv7sZ411tpiUnwa9dd1nsCrHjnbcnl_RhZ3obaSZA5pLvcA0iyIIIa92V1LFaU8f6W_Okm7taWtenbtalk2lgEiMPlcRllcKWq7BNKiObALuurc3q8K2C-AtjMdQWmvlrCDHJW8QdZh6OBYp3b9cS910H5JjiFZhFMhWC7LBPfYo7kw1MA3vGWqQP3ilAokVfMuHFr4Lt-6iT5QDjjQClRmDVWjqZFCXHcmLv8v26MIcNvtr6vieQf_uj0XLVL8u9QXQHskRUt3c4H4jCNfBgaNjZNYwydDMegaSJkTmG5dpNOUANaVW4pke8qTJI17rb8VhHHS1-/07eWibFoSyYGI-DU0220F2XLT8PZ3QLP/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Surprising reason behind Chesco tax hike
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=71c9d551da&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fc8cc6c2e2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Chester County’s 13% tax hike blamed on ‘big ticket’ items — but budget tells a different story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9967618b86&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
For two hours, the residents vented their anger.

“I know we’ve got a tremendous increase that’s being proposed to our taxes. I know what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet and the county, the state, the federal government — everybody has to deal with that. The problem here is the county can at the stroke of a pen, just get more money. You can impose that on every citizen that’s here. Myself and every citizen that’s here can’t do that. We have to seek other means. In other words, we’ve got to tighten our belt and we’ve got to cut the fat.”

Pat Carnevale wasn’t alone. He was one of dozens of voices expressing dismay and frustration last December as Chester County was on the cusp of approving a thirteen percent real estate tax increase — three times larger than the previous four percent tax increase in 2020.

**Why It Matters**. Just before casting his ‘yes’ vote, Chairman Josh Maxwell (D) said inflation and other minor issues had nibbled at the edges of the budget, but citizens could rest assured knowing most of the thirteen percent increase was really due to two “big ticket” items: a county-wide refresh of the radios used by every law enforcement agency in the 759-square mile county, and a series of upgrades to the county prison.

Despite Maxwell’s reasoning, a _Broad + Liberty_ analysis of the last ten years of budgets for the county seriously undermines that rationale. The county disputes many parts of the analysis, which will be generously incorporated into the story.

The analysis shows for the millions of dollars devoted to prison upgrades, much of that up-front capital was provided by a bond sale — in other words, the county took on debt, and would be paying it off over the course of several years.

As for the radios, a sizable chunk of the money set aside for that category of spending in the budget was coming from federal and state grants.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=455dbf6ba4&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Shapiro sends $5M grant to mosque that called Jews the ‘vilest people’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8fcd67778f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Daniel Greenfield_
Gov. Josh Shapiro attended an iftar dinner at a mosque where an imam had previously declared that “Jews are the vilest people,” and announced a huge grant for the hate mosque. The $5 million grant, described as the largest ever given to a Muslim institution, came only five years after the Al-Aqsa Islamic Society in Philly was forced to apologize for posting[ hateful Islamic sermons](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f0f92c8075&e=b7b3eddce2) by an imam delivered at its mosque declaring that the Arabs were superior to all races, that Jews were the “enemies of Allah” and the “vilest of all people.” **Why It Matters.** According to Gov. Shapiro, who is Jewish, however the massive $5 million grant was necessary because “as we’re facing tumult overseas, and we’re facing a lot of rising hate here at home.” The $5 million giveaway could also be seen as a kind of political payback since Marwan Kreidie, the director of the Arab American Development Corp, is a spokesman for the mosque and had come to Shapiro’s defense during Kamala’s “Veepstakes” when he was being accused of “Islamophobia.” Kreidie wrote an op-ed claiming that Shapiro had phoned to check on him the day after the Oct. 7 attacks, hates Netanyahu and is angry over the deaths of Muslims in Gaza. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=140ad73642&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Philadelphia’s ‘secret voucher program’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=00ffcfda3f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Dear President Trump, please use your superpowers for good, part two](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b905e52a24&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Dwight Evans violates STOCK Act with Tesla, Amazon trades](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bcb7a06099&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Beware of government impersonation scams](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7a53626153&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Eric Tuwalski: Philadelphia can help provide for the common defense](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0fd6a932f3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Robin Heller: Biden’s last-minute tax regs threaten small businesses](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=45550be931&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
A [new report this week from _BlueStateRed_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3fa1ae2991&e=b7b3eddce2) breaks down the 2024 election in Pennsylvania and makes for fascinating reading for anyone interested in the massive shifts in voter sentiment and the emerging party realignment. BlueStateRed principal (and _Broad + Liberty_ co-founder) Albert Eisenberg breaks it all down, showing how racial, religious, and ethnic minority voters shifted rightward like never before, delivering the presidency and Congress to Republicans in 2024.
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|
---

Shapiro, who is Jewish, however the massive $5 million grant was necessary because “as we’re facing tumult overseas, and we’re facing a lot of rising hate here at home.” The $5 million giveaway could also be seen as a kind of political payback since Marwan Kreidie, the director of the Arab American Development Corp, is a spokesman for the mosque and had come to Shapiro’s defense during Kamala’s “Veepstakes” when he was being accused of “Islamophobia.” Kreidie wrote an op-ed claiming that Shapiro had phoned to check on him the day after the Oct. 7 attacks, hates Netanyahu and is angry over the deaths of Muslims in Gaza. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading A breaks down the 2024 election in Pennsylvania and makes for fascinating reading for anyone interested in the massive shifts in voter sentiment and the emerging party realignment. BlueStateRed principal (and Broad + Liberty co-founder) Albert Eisenberg breaks it all down, showing how racial, religious, and ethnic minority voters shifted rightward like never before, delivering the presidency and Congress to Republicans in 2024. | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site – and local stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. Our mailing address is: Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Broad and Liberty, Inc. is a Pennsylvania Domestic Nonprofit Corporation classifed as a public charity under Internal Revenue Code Section 501 (c) (3).

name: Florida Freedom Fund
subject: THE EVIDENCE: What’s really happening in the Tallahassee Swamp….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Freedom Fund
body:
We made 3 claims. Here’s the evidence. | | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/mo7GiF48gsYeW-HOrF9jIrPvy7lJUCTGTgL2gsDjwxGpGHw2LBBV18lulpZCJFCb2m18TqzvmZlJTbygd2fGgJn0kxOP8Ng1QZvO3p8s9L7tAu6oODk8i8BB_2BBBaQl934gjkHsB-mtqOJJB9e_TJMqrATgmr-kHVrWpC_GmEO7J007A7Vca_58MA1vabHaPFLfwZB34risH32Ch58ZprbNvqG2QsSfDn_gb44YB9-Nw_c8d9CInS9Q5qunvTFjDHV-HdUij4bHs9njq6gG1bUH9rx6jTNdGe2sRDeZQrfxZA3__i321c7jK_oY1PP5CBmPuczfOnEsX3tWk72FhgC-rl7KllI2YyFeb3K_eiZFQ6XghQ28_l8MsciZvBN9Q224uYORfCyvJ09aXI1zTissQa3e2zE/P48XxHA7koloO7dXegPFy1VQWRYt4zSU/7)
---
Friend, We told you that Republican dominance in Florida has led to a resurgence of RINOs — and we’re going to unpack our evidence.

**CLAIM #1: The RINOs in the Florida House are growing our government.**
* FACT: They have created **37 new government boards,** while stripping language from Agency proposals that would have eliminated 70 boards.
* FACT: They have created **2 new cabinet-level agencies.**

---
[**TELL THEM TO STOP GROWING GOVERNMENT**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/XioaN8wnR6vMksKaa7ivN4bu429KMeCLnbJjWrTx7IOqxg-Z9a-giTlnzVNjcHfKoEsy4HOTTTuVfl9FlU6LVIikT74jgUGHvKYR1h6v80mlXw5fAHdH5P-yvlv0Srxmwtn-GNwu5acJmVFGjXJgkMxxO4D0d2-jH8s3KQ49iiM77QTFpkTe67T_0igVwBpt3WnrEkCYgv6PijpROk_iN-fmmcke4l_EIwvlWuXsPUUDcit9ACCHJPurr7MklHBIDG7KDgGY8vJHlwV7JrcyjxHyz4hLvjIVssizXDlpxmhLD0mq9jVlNgLk93sIfME-tEVqi-IPgFzwQoai-m__D59Bj6YWDmlaGPjJI0cRepKjNu2yT96wSXwXcyWObWQWBZJXl6PsB7wILRXkfGSsZaBp2u6IdgM/VXxe7ksfyJR2WOjbNi2ePUb-CAWSEgRN/7)
---
**CLAIM #2: The RINOs in the Florida House are decreasing government transparency.**
* They **struck the Auditor General from the state constitution** , which is the only entity that provides accountability to the House of Representatives.
* They **repealed the Government Efficiency Task Force.**

---
[**TELL THEM TO STOP DODGING TRANSPARENCY**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/spxHfLHRGzw0mn8PtiZmJcZMtKCgSQD36uJJMBrMGTfQegxtojmSBHJU3T-SFMabOzT1-23ujcC01PLoeJ8E6UtEMF8O_YLWI0fj0TJWXe2IbrUvxP5RjUEcpYCJbOcrsgZTHN5E3YyhDVZgMW1YlJie4wQJTXUg130CwboE8NX8598yYltgOVFCkJyCivpFtRhqMX8hPbCsmz15BDESgiscgbhY7UtVNqfcCMh8Zzb_Xe4CznzpRib5VSa6eq8vCf1VaV9XHX7l87IqPPxcNW45zYSm_UV7h8JTih8TQj2Y9pGG_jppihYuoVCw_W97rN04vkPO40bRiYt6mBB5eguXlvA8wopZLRgb5CglXGRSj0ANwMv0mqgAlp7Nn7l-XfDRtlnhsHzQVALHGrNqTTdXANqtZN4/lq3V7v3sspNs_n-VM0tLVIdfyCrlPWhV/7)
---
**CLAIM #3: The RINOs in the Florida House are filling the Tallahassee Swamp with bureaucrats.**
* They **required all Agency Heads to live in Tallahassee,** regardless of the communities they serve.
* They **restricted the ability of the Governor to travel to communities across the state.**
* They **added 120 full-time employees to the Legislative Branch** this fiscal year...even though the size of the House of Representatives hasn’t changed since the 1970s.

---
[**TELL THEM THAT WE DON’T WANT OUR OWN SWAMP**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/Ec_Tv_NRP22GHrWyC7so_2vrectjkunGc6yZMcEKsHkvsz9JRSg-VzydlePrYB8RQmBCSofsWU5U1O-bsQ4dMoz34fox8Nrl593Pkk09gAPaqBfgTOMcHZtJ9na7gSDP3vTOUtYFa14eRIMTnrr1dW9KLam1T4hoU8TH37y0_fB2xH6nYYAasqPoido1Vsdrm9D3mhYFoLPRHUF05ji1qEPjtx2qiTwTqYmsf7izxX3Q2Ce51TS394lFzq0jJYnA99BQ717fWm0mVtTAPX-IqTTHp2agaVYXfm9y9vV6jurzbpx98yE6HjYNmxsYWh1inO9X2pp7r1e8g_IhBZNbteJr1PeJfamdeDqSmWCsv-xZZsWE3Qfs4aSQ5CtoEMNAJ6NqMoBevXgGobojTTEfIZnwrnZYxPM/LOBoAUDehnWggJA5nkAzEXh316iZtmGF/7)
---
And this is just the tip of the iceberg, friend.

This is why our work at Florida Freedom Fund is so important. “Republican” is no longer enough. We support CONSERVATIVE causes and candidates to keep Florida Free.

Do you support this mission? Then we’re asking you to get on board today. _**Help us stop the RINOs in Florida’s State House.**_
---
[**DONATE $20 NOW**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/hO-E-tr4mI12PsXQ7QQ0bB0q-3D9AVvDLlxtWc5XPNhQ_fekK-AsaBAGvoRA1MJkhz6tS_r7Y3rTIDIuOVhbE1FBifW4wdTEcLnHfHPVy1wO5VzKR18nlUqhbbFjjZJIZJJjU-GnYdQelVlJJiiqA-ml-vPhJXY-aTqSGdyr-CC6U9e9R4YpB11itQp5R3hRvgkEHh6lwVPxOpn2dc1ZO7AIsdT20zliv1w1vDlvZQYKPuSQmb9xGxOzRVQ2VgqWb69TZd06NUyiwqdlVzug7vV16zUKBQsaTfDfy9IAMk8jqYUIu2udOw3dWGDUa5HMfqkuHQb54R7txwLrLT2ioYetZzrhDM0ds0sb9uD_yHsuRiDk_pvueETxtIieOK-72eu52rDN4ziMJSi0yMPQa5eAvhugL4E/Hsz12SXB-_uMu1NnsHO0j9s_nM_mo2W2/7)
---
Thank you,Florida Freedom Fund
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Speaking entirely from the heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is...
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cde88ac6a80341e781a855d3be8d9cef&_e=fzxDQezKqoht_DwcBkW7b7O06Ik6HjGpKrK3WKD_O4FU5WIDf83GanpVhyQrpI084rhuyXy27YKP5G7-nQkZxwkOGsZyt4pEFd-kYhxq2Ry3ARgK0OTSlNWLaccZ0mgczrp653udXoe4ayj3tD17_9fJte7TtYREL_Dqr6ozQ1m2qTaHguw7kBBOT7Ry2PSJXucc2jfl982PIJNl5wl_1AWFrSnEUiQ9DlSYNpbfkYRUGpBWvopp3DA-TscJno0sWf6vVHsMZnPFydy8jXp-iJlXYDNLB9adbFGUua1oVHBaYXWTOsA7_UbTm8e14uBHRP2W-nRV1MtDxGJ76xWvE_u9D1AcUxuLl-ALA-OkVFjtH77F0qx1U3d_od4Ja9ZP)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart.
---
For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
**But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up __these__ headlines:**
---
**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_ **
[Source: _MSNBC_]
**“In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” **
[Source: _The New Republic_]
**“...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” **
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – _yours truly._
---
**__And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!__**
---
Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus __state-level__ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely **ABANDONED** , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life.
---
But here’s what the Left will never understand... _America First fighters _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ , and we _NEVER_ _ABANDON_ our fellow patriots._
---
When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cde88ac6a80341e781a855d3be8d9cef&_e=fzxDQezKqoht_DwcBkW7b7O06Ik6HjGpKrK3WKD_O4FU5WIDf83GanpVhyQrpI084rhuyXy27YKP5G7-nQkZxwkOGsZyt4pEFd-kYhxq2Ry3ARgK0OTSlNWLaccZ0mgczrp653udXoe4ayj3tD17_9fJte7TtYREL_Dqr6ozQ1m2qTaHguw7kBBOT7Ry2PSJXucc2jfl982PIJNl5wl_1GOu-mFTIk45RPADYhysc8ZQhMpQWSZpqXh33tOhuqpYIn7i9A9agnuh1NFMkHgKWCUUnB0ZGNcikwuNutZqRV0gWLV8prZDzDU4tsS5EAXszX3LEAi_LhNb8OehjGB_wATiwU7P7EKowuDtn07typVmk2c1KxvmQaPUng6wep9P)
__
---
They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. **_But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone!_**
---
Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** who joined the fight for my freedom and justice!
---

clean_body: The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is... | Fellow Patriot, I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart. For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York... ...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe. ...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up these headlines: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [Source: MSNBC] “In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” [Source: The New Republic] “...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” [Source: Law & Crime News] I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President. You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – yours truly. And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely ABANDONED , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life. But here’s what the Left will never understand... America First fighters NEVER SURRENDER , and we NEVER ABANDON our fellow patriots. When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone! Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – 2,313,757 PATRIOTS who joined the fight for my freedom and justice! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

clean_body: Democrats are raising more 18 months before election day than they did in 2024... | Fellow American -- I just left a meeting with my 2026 political staff, and I am blown away some numbers they shared with me. I wanted to share my thoughts directly with you on what’s happening in this race, 18 months before Election Day. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

1️⃣ **_Virginia:_ DLCC Announces Seven-figure Investment **
The DLCC is proud to announce a critical investment ahead of Virginia’s majority-defining elections this fall. This investment is a key step in blocking Trump’s chaos and advancing Democratic policies that support working families. [Read more about our investment here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBrW9onqmjYxFA325rWLVO0IRLZfi5zJ70uLx1wC9LN8Ma0IqelcwWapgC2TfgfE8SUy-JodjO1j0REM5INyyXrGnDKNTQbdIA2fSU_HU7vOcmqFrPDEH5Mrb3YMTIX0Jv3fkOI5f09_T5g6xeisGaVXnN_O0GEEZUsIV9znO0qkn6CZ5bWFoCEerfKtEI4cTUt-SJLYIlu4ejh4KR6WOl2C4nPN6tIr5HF52HD0XrxijGUIzNW7EtAkjc0plvub5gLQOx2k2PkgLUBF4m9N92pLSKaKP6K2vbwZbv7v1SYn1DhhYsBVhOmfsG66cbyuviJ3_vSNd3HzXWds0E3fLO_z_7basExpHiL06PsX4_Gw__VJWIXeS9_XnRozXj04WyGMSStXKDzQdVYjUIsy0dxK8-Msf14nFz8iMLtDkrtJY5E1y5YCGKO913gD4B_bqJUFrHGfBrgXhQpJ2VaoifXP8nwbYraK8iry4D4zyumHRU4qh1x3dNvQYTbDY4jyXz-KETh2Myp7ShlfbwX4wDs0m0yp8pTiMoHYfuSXI0m5UcT3aoPJeF3lxc4DVDwjAc/4fm/RaY4BGQmSf6RTmyWot39Qg/h1/h001.ogND_bEdU90C5OOXnwxoSn-0_GWp1KCyayb5qVqUuCU)
2️⃣ **_Minnesota:_ State Republicans call Jan. 6 insurrection a ‘hoax’ **
While appearing on a right-wing podcast, two state Republicans called the Jan. 6 insurrection a “hoax” and repeated a false conspiracy theory that the Trump supporters who stormed the Capitol were "actors." [This comes following Trump’s pardoning of Jan 6 rioters and overwhelming GOP support for anti-democratic rhetoric and behavior → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVeKLIn3SKEOA_YBVly3TiSrzCNN-F3kOjzYOIOBIT9QbHn6idA5tzGhgd9XnCAS7SsgjuH3YmtKQXrOswDesZesGNB5iI41BOCIKcnMHV5ylaeCt0KQlA98vWQ8_6JMEk6j2RigeR9NuqRe439_YifoRU7sOl2DdhFhrSDaVVfK70Y3o8qkwCWzKXE9gErlDxY5ME0owtsGmA9Pyr9glPraYBt7FAK6zu84r3NYdOkCsTCG6d33yF8Vn91RU_EN682lqNGMkNhj--BRgvl-cnF7NlfL-bfFy6cIky671jP2kPXN5NELKuSlmLeAWMcexB67Xk9I3qMEDJ2yLNptc4SzzudlAiiDH6SmoKBkF9SxfTl9VLtl6pbn8IigY3D6v1FqPuHW85t7Zjays1-ybbPrfjrK7wwUysRqbMMUWMo8CkNO2M7iulOkurMOgpWNBCid85fiNNKAlgcBiRjKuPDG6e8-7aninBUoAbuymDJ3Gu3OKmAq1r0IlCs6h33QM4OFxCLi38kFWdfUg6dLVMv12iGAald9rGo7zOqRGsk43Oj20CicC141BLTmk_SZ6eXu---i7q8FTKQowa5kmWEYgi7hMkvowbjaAjTSoKmOm/4fm/RaY4BGQmSf6RTmyWot39Qg/h2/h001.XhM5b5cXcjLB2gZzDcZTaiivkWk0Zg7e5P_-fEkwruw)
📖 **_Read:_ Democrats were searching for an economic message. Then came Trump’s tariffs. **
DLCC spokesperson Lauren Chou laid out the consequences of the Republican-led economy saying that “it’s going to hit all of the states—it’s going to hit working families the hardest.” She also pointed out that “Democrats are proactively trying to mitigate the disaster that’s coming by passing legislation to make life easier for working families, whereas Republicans are burying their heads in the sand.” [Read the full article here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVL8_nVOTWZ1UfxLcxgdwdQ3cASWZV8TBoP2kpuu4YWCBTjJGZuuXHWdLYa3uZOAR2yGhQZiN-R_XNRHNdL7j8s-mcxUaoUfitoR16kt12oudO69a4eYk_aCkD9IB-A7U1KYO93qM4RvwMrpZTfHwwqnkXThVaVI1tjQ6FZaJmCZmjUVM3HyZe1UlM567hAqN__LcnRgJ-Nwr8gk5naQZ6zYV3-eEcOFg8LVbSI4lfvEtrI5ll1vM8SwqXXL3sppAOY_Ji4ynM89mcs3KYQaP_8qYSRmWl6c8hvFEeLDYui9OFosaOgkgZ7-t4ORiUYB0VHMKgxMsq7iaMlLCkxFJJrQEb-lTV4htb8rgodi5GusUfKlTYP6I7vxLn1m59XjQ7SjNvAdQypnBChcrRkXkRun5soxVM5Zt9j1O8qydgHAQsLJ5otMfXZKI5eUp12Qbm-DbTO8XIyMfDONGIofAwK8KdP6fwZyIMxN5a8zJzG69b4PKe3wXhI1YTXCt0e0Leg9vbhO-PO01IiMDTvbsjeqHf5b6-a7-20-9OKwlOKgCbYnFA7uL8By2xBm-lmBBZc/4fm/RaY4BGQmSf6RTmyWot39Qg/h3/h001.mgTHKW3czirAuomuHmYJCz8xSy1JD5hGO4lxnYSfeiY)

To ensure Virginia Democrats retain their majority, [the DLCC is shining its Spotlight on some of the most competitive candidates on the ballot this fall → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW8i7dgiWltPqMksHAqnq8ggYQIVNQTwGLx51AxxYwN7IQ5iCxKV2CI-xf81ZvgyqTtjQ9zwPfer0qQUuPFJlISSdaHDtVFusQxQpK0Ann_FLhy5tzArrxK97QMrOCzYL3HQzyq49cT7qXFpXE-UcTVmuBHNlk2yKuV-6KU0QmpCeqCdklRM6IIK3eBcwOpy6qbZRcQMbKSAItGIafLS231SfYAGXSSZJ8-YpBSfXFfdNjB3Fk0sPUa2uPnNpi-Lw-_x_k90_tNzwaXDGeHwNrpjQypQyDhUzLqoMQkN7-BZzry372EuOoF90nCU-68kLwfzY1hMXO2q8MDlcAUAAFQCZni6UBasNA3mfopou6aY-7k3NTVyNm-ftPUSYyznXbrJ2E4iRegkpl3n3CirHHPMM2xh151v0UPJL8i9gu4L5AjPq5rsCP0tJMdFQQ33MMn9Y0JXYXSH4DRj-DBuRH6GdY64g0D7-GGZHOrDbtRwXEjiBoEucge55qeNjYkdmxdM-uIqgzrcx1Q3g4Xqf6SQ/4fm/RaY4BGQmSf6RTmyWot39Qg/h4/h001._SZTVkbD1LuUJ1AyecXTKOdfqD1I-UM3Tcw7ujE3GmA)

clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, April 13th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Virginia: DLCC Announces Seven-figure Investment The DLCC is proud to announce a critical investment ahead of Virginia’s majority-defining elections this fall. This investment is a key step in blocking Trump’s chaos and advancing Democratic policies that support working families. 2️⃣ Minnesota: State Republicans call Jan. 6 insurrection a ‘hoax’ While appearing on a right-wing podcast, two state Republicans called the Jan. 6 insurrection a “hoax” and repeated a false conspiracy theory that the Trump supporters who stormed the Capitol were "actors." 📖 Read: Democrats were searching for an economic message. Then came Trump’s tariffs. DLCC spokesperson Lauren Chou laid out the consequences of the Republican-led economy saying that “it’s going to hit all of the states—it’s going to hit working families the hardest.” She also pointed out that “Democrats are proactively trying to mitigate the disaster that’s coming by passing legislation to make life easier for working families, whereas Republicans are burying their heads in the sand.” 🔦 Spotlight: Check out DLCC’s Spotlight Candidates In 2023, the DLCC helped flip the Virginia House of Delegates blue. This November, every seat in the chamber is up for election, making Virginia one of 2025’s most critical battlegrounds. To ensure Virginia Democrats retain their majority, 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Board President David Canepa
subject: April '25 e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e6b7f8948d)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter

## APRIL '25
---
|
* **From homeless to housed, Daly City mother shares family’s odyssey**
* **Dispatchers honored for answering the call**
* **County takes stand against bullying**
* **500 County Center wins another sustainability award**
* **Students learn about loneliness and connection during read-a-thon**
* **MTC grants county $8.6M for infrastructure projects**

---
| | |
---
|
# “This is an amazing family who put their children first in the most trying of times. Imagine having to choose between staying in a hotel or purchasing food while keeping your kids in school and parking discreetly near free WiFi spots so they could do their homework”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 April e-newsletter** **500 County Center wins another sustainability award**

Dear friends,
I am proud to announce, as the San Mateo County President, that our County Office Building 3 in Redwood City has won the 2025 Green Building Award!

Cosponsored by Sustainable San Mateo County and the American Institute of Architects San Mateo County Chapter, 500 County Center is the first civic building in the United States to combine mass timber construction with a net-zero-energy design, achieving an 85% reduction in structural embodied carbon.

The 5-story building also wont the “Best of the Best” Award for Sustainability from Engineering News-Record this year.

With features such as solar panels, automated systems, biotreatment areas, and a focus on employee well-being, this project sets a new benchmark for sustainable public buildings. Here’s to a healthier, more sustainable future!

Save the date for the official ribbon cutting of 500 County Center as San Mateo County partners with the San Mateo County History Museum to celebrate the 169th birthday of the County of San Mateo on May 15th at 5 p.m. in downtown Redwood City. Stay tuned for more details. **MTC grants county $8.6M for infrastructure projects**

Electric vehicle charging will ramp up significantly in San Mateo County and a new transformational regional mobility hub is coming to Daly City BART as the Metropolitan Transportation Commission approved $8.6 million in funding for transportation infrastructure projects throughout the county.

Grants for 5 EV charging infrastructure, electric bikeshare deployment and fleet electrification were approved for the cities of East Palo Alto, San Carlos, Portola Valley, Half Moon Bay and Menlo Park.

Colma and South San Francisco were also awarded grants for the design and technical assistance for two segments of the El Camino Real and Bicycle and Pedestrian Project.

And the biggest grant was awarded for the $3.8 million Daly City BART Mobility Hub that will transform the station into a community anchor that will enable travelers of all backgrounds and abilities to access multiple transportation options.

These options include shared scooters, bicycles, cars and public transit as well as wayfinding, improved lighting and other amenities that will enliven this incredibly important transit corridor linking San Mateo and San Francisco counties. **Students learn about loneliness and connection during read-a-thon**

Last month, I had the pleasure of hosting a read-along at Susan B. Anthony Elementary School in Daly City for a fifth-grade class as part of the weeklong read-a-thon!

I read “The Invisible String” by Patrice Karst, a beautiful story about loneliness and connection. It’s so important to talk about mental health with young students and remind them of the power of community. I am grateful for this experience!

The book was first published by in 2000. The inside flap of the dust jacket reads:

“Specifically written to calm a child’s fear of being apart from the ones they love, ‘The Invisible String’ ... delivers a compelling message in today’s uncertain times. Grownups and children everywhere who are looking for reassurance and reaffirmation of the transcendent power of love to bind, connect, and comfort will discover how easily they can ‘tug’ on each other’s heart with The Invisible String!”

I was thankful for the experience and grateful for the children’s response after reading this very uplifting book. **Dispatchers honored for answering the call**

I am proud to sponsor a proclamation declaring April 13-19 as Public Safety Dispatcher Week in honor of the incredible men and women who serve as the first point of contact in emergencies.

When someone dials 911, they’re often facing one of the worst moments of their life — a fire, medical emergency, crime in progress, or unfolding crisis. Before first responders arrive, it’s our dispatchers who answer the call, providing critical guidance, calming panicked voices, and ensuring help gets where it’s needed most.

In San Mateo County, our dispatchers handle hundreds of calls daily, making split-second, life-or-death decisions while staying composed under immense pressure. In 2024 alone 496,383 calls were answered; 364,459 incidents were handled; the busiest day had 2,559 calls; 30 languages were spoken; and 8,000 training hours were completed.

A special congratulations to Shanel Campana, Fire Specialist/Controller, for being named 2024 Dispatcher of the Year! Your dedication and excellence set the standard for public safety in our county.

And thanks to Director at County of San Mateo Office of Public Safety Communications Natasha Claire-Espino for her outstanding service and commitment to keeping our community safe. Your hard work does not go unnoticed!

To all our dispatchers: We see you, we appreciate you, and we thank you. Your resilience and commitment keep our community safe every single day.

**From homeless to housed, Daly City mother shares family’s odyssey**

Imagine having to choose between staying in a hotel or buying food for your children. For over a year, Daly City native Angelica Rodriguez and her children’s father lived in their van, doing everything they could to keep their boys safe, in school, and fed.

They parked near free Wi-Fi so homework could get done, used ice to keep Angelica’s insulin cold, and made every sacrifice to hold their family together.

Today, thanks to Angelica’s determination and the unwavering support of San Mateo County’s incredible staff and nonprofit partners, she and her children finally have a place to call home. Our County Housing Authority, Daly City Health Center, YMCA, LifeMoves, and Abode Services worked tirelessly to ensure this family found the stability they deserve.

The dedication of our county employees and nonprofit teams makes a life-changing difference every day, and I couldn’t be prouder of their commitment to lifting up our most vulnerable residents.

Their two-bedroom apartment, made possible through a federal voucher program, offers stability after years of uncertainty. This is more than just a story about housing—it’s about resilience, love, and a community that stepped up when it mattered most.

Let’s continue working together to ensure that no family in San Mateo County has to endure this journey alone.

Thank you to the San Mateo County Communications and Public Information team for highlighting this family’s uplifting story!

**County takes stand against bullying**

No one should ever feel unsafe, unheard, or unwelcome in their own community, especially our youth. Bullying can leave lasting scars, and it’s on all of us to create a culture of kindness, respect and inclusion.
On the Board of Supervisors, we have a duty not only to uphold the well-being of all residents of San Mateo County but also to create a community where every individual, particularly our youth, can thrive.

Last month the Board passed a resolution I sponsored that reaffirms the County’s unwavering commitment to standing up against youth bullying in all its forms and to promote a safe, respectful community where every young person can flourish.

The resolution calls on every department and every employee to actively engage in efforts to prevent bullying, to provide education, and to intervene when necessary.

This resolution also calls on us to listen to the voices of those who have been affected — our youth, families, and community members. By evaluating and improving our youth bullying prevention efforts regularly, we can ensure that we are always responsive to the evolving needs of our community.
**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=247e189166&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=e6b7f8948d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=e6b7f8948d).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5)

* * *

Did you know that astronauts rarely have heart problems?

Surprisingly, it all comes down to **one specific food they eat in outer space.**

_“This food works to clean your arteries and support your heart health by dissolving the sticky protein building up inside them,”_ says Dr. Sam Walters.

Dr. Sam Walters is a former nutrition consultant to NASA. He’s also a leading “heart doctor” whose natural solution has helped thousands of people enjoy a healthy heart without living on drugs.

He recommends his patients add this food as a staple in their diets... because multiple studies have shown that it can:

\- SLASH your risk of heart attack & stroke by nearly HALF
\- Lower “bad” LDL cholesterol & triglycerides
\- Keep your blood pressure under control
\- Unclog your arteries

Yet, up to 89% of Americans aren’t getting enough of it in their diets!

Fortunately, Dr. Walters has released a short video revealing the **#1 heart-healthy food** you should start eating today.

Watch it here:

name: Sarah McBride
subject: This is an attack on public education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This isn’t about streamlining our government. It’s about gutting public education.
#
Last week, I joined the Delaware State Education Association — our state’s largest labor union — to speak out against Donald Trump’s move to eliminate the Department of Education.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-1897&amount=5&refcode2=1897_21716_7mN2kW&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)
_Photo Credit: Delaware News Journal_
The U.S. Department of Education was created to guarantee that every student — no matter their zip code, family's income, or disability — gets a good education. **Now, Trump is working to destroy it.**
Donald Trump had already cut the department’s workforce in half. Now, he’s directing his Secretary of Education to shut it down completely, stripping away vital support for schools, students, and teachers.
**This isn’t about government efficiency. It’s about gutting public education.** And it’s not just going to be members of Congress who save our schools. It’s going to take our unions. It’s going to take every single one of us. It’s going to take people power.
That’s why I’m not just speaking out. I’m organizing, legislating, and fighting — in Congress, in our communities, and in coalition with educators — to protect our schools. **But I need you with me.**
[**Can you pitch in $5 to power my legislative, advocacy, and organizing work right now? I rely on grassroots contributions to keep up the fight.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-1897&amount=5&refcode2=1897_21716_7mN2kW&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250413-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250413-1897&refcode2=1897_21716_7mN2kW&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)**
Together, we’ll show Trump and his billionaire allies that our public schools are not up for grabs.
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250413-1&t=1&refcode2=1897_21716_7mN2kW&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1897%2E21716%2E7mN2kW)

Paid for by McBride for Delaware
clean_body: This isn’t about streamlining our government. It’s about gutting public education. Last week, I joined the Delaware State Education Association — our state’s largest labor union — to speak out against Donald Trump’s move to eliminate the Department of Education. Photo Credit: Delaware News Journal The U.S. Department of Education was created to guarantee that every student — no matter their zip code, family's income, or disability — gets a good education. Now, Trump is working to destroy it. Donald Trump had already cut the department’s workforce in half. Now, he’s directing his Secretary of Education to shut it down completely, stripping away vital support for schools, students, and teachers. This isn’t about government efficiency. It’s about gutting public education. And it’s not just going to be members of Congress who save our schools. It’s going to take our unions. It’s going to take every single one of us. It’s going to take people power. That’s why I’m not just speaking out. I’m organizing, legislating, and fighting — in Congress, in our communities, and in coalition with educators — to protect our schools. But I need you with me. Together, we’ll show Trump and his billionaire allies that our public schools are not up for grabs. In solidarity, Sarah McBride

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: A real fight:
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer message, but I wanted to share an update on what we’re seeing from Trump and what Democrats are doing about it. (And no, I will not be making a fundraising request at the end). Here’s what’s been going on: Last week, Trump’s erratic, nonsensical tariffs went into effect. This guy ran on the promise that he was going to help Americans afford their lives, but from day one, he‘s done the complete opposite. In fact, his actions are going to make people’s lives much more expensive, destroy retirement accounts, and threaten jobs. Confidence and certainty are two of the biggest things that fuel our economy. Under Trump, there’s little confidence and even less certainty. Now, we’re seeing buyer’s remorse. We’re seeing people who voted for Trump that feel like he betrayed them. And that’s because he did. Donald Trump and the Republicans are leaving Americans behind — and it sure doesn’t seem like they even care. **This is an opportunity for us as Democrats to get off the mat, get back in the fight, and show families what we stand for.** One of the reasons we’ve lost so much ground over the years is because people don’t feel like the Democratic Party is fighting for them. This is our opportunity to change that — when it’s clearer than ever that Trump and Elon Musk don’t give a damn about anybody other than the billionaires who can weather his economic meltdown. I’ve been traveling across the country nonstop since I started this job, and what I hear over and over is this: Americans want us to fight back against Trump’s lies. They want us to offer a better alternative. So that’s exactly what we’re doing. While Trump has stacked his cabinet with out-of-touch billionaires, we’ve launched a People’s Cabinet, which is made up of experts, leaders, and community voices around the country who will cut through the lies to bring you reliable and accurate information. We’ve also launched a new DNC War Room to put Republicans on the defense every single day, compete in new information spaces, and proactively challenge what Trump is doing. And third, we’re focused on organizing everywhere. I’ve said from day one that if we organize everywhere, we can win everywhere. And that’s exactly what we’ve done. Democrats have overperformed in 17 of the 18 elections since the inauguration, with big wins in places like Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. Our momentum is growing. **We have to keep up this fight, Derek.** And we have some great fighters on our side. You saw that just the other day when Cory Booker took to the Senate floor and held it for 25 hours, in one of the most courageous moral statements I’ve seen in years. Showing up for the American people. That’s what we need to be doing. With your help, that’s what we will continue to do. Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and I’ll have more updates to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250413_3182_fr&refcode2=3182_22930333_p0hlS4&akid=3182%2E22930333%2Ep0hlS4)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

NEW: _House Republicans PASS the SAVE Act >>_
**MAGA Republicans in the House just voted for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. [**Sign now to demand the Senate BLOCK the SAVE Act >**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105754291/539282176/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNiZWE5OS02ZjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcIsl70EKpdc06UM7fvs2OV8kRZ0USS-VtbJ-kSnkkA=&emci=64b6f1e2-d616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e63bea99-6f18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)****[**> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105754295/539282179/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNiZWE5OS02ZjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcIsl70EKpdc06UM7fvs2OV8kRZ0USS-VtbJ-kSnkkA=&emci=64b6f1e2-d616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e63bea99-6f18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)**
| | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105754298/539282182/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNiZWE5OS02ZjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcIsl70EKpdc06UM7fvs2OV8kRZ0USS-VtbJ-kSnkkA=&emci=64b6f1e2-d616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e63bea99-6f18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)**
---
Picture this, folks:
You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years.
_Why?_ You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate.
**The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario,** and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name.
150 million citizens --_half the country_ \-- lack passports. And at **$130** each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either.
Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box.
[**We've seen this playbook before, but the good news is we can fight back. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll sign the petition to demand the Senate STOP the SAVE Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105754302/539282184/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNiZWE5OS02ZjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcIsl70EKpdc06UM7fvs2OV8kRZ0USS-VtbJ-kSnkkA=&emci=64b6f1e2-d616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e63bea99-6f18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)

clean_body: | = NEW: House Republicans PASS the SAVE Act >> MAGA Republicans in the House just voted for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. | | Picture this, folks: You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years. Why? You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate. The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario, and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name. 150 million citizens --half the country \-- lack passports. And at $130 each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either. Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box. | We’re hoping for at least two 43614 signatures by midnight tonight. Thank you in advance for your commitment to defending the sacred right to vote. -Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105755211/539284969/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlM2JlYTk5LTZmMTgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IdC4DIah1_RNznLjn8Jf9kbanvPehWQdpbVkBHRepdw=&emci=0f105fc5-1417-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fe3bea99-6f18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)

Peter, We wanted to give you a quick update on House Republicans’ latest attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters: _**FIRST:**_ Republicans introduced the SAVE Act — an extreme, anti-voter bill that would make it significantly harder, if not outright impossible, for certain eligible voters to register to vote and have their voices heard. _**THEN:**_ As the bill made its way through committee, Donald Trump signed an executive order pushing a set of unconstitutional voter restrictions, including mass voter purges. _**NOW:**_ The GOP-controlled House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act and sent it to the Senate. The NDRC is fighting back to protect voting rights and safeguard our democracy, but we need grassroots support from people like you. [**With far-right extremists working to disenfranchise voters, the work of the NDRC to ensure free and fair elections has never been more urgent. Here’s just a snapshot of what the SAVE Act would do:
❌ Require voters to provide very specific documents (like an original birth certificate) any time they update their registration. An estimated 21 million Americans don’t have easy access to this documentation — especially military voters, tribal voters, rural voters, survivors of natural disasters, and millions of married women who have changed their last names.

❌ Upend online voter registration, a practice in 42 states, make it impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail, and put an end to voter registration drives nationwide.
Coupled with Trump’s executive order that mandates burdensome proof of citizenship, mass voter purges, and weaponizes the Department of Justice to verify immigration status, it’s clear: **Anti-democracy extremists want to silence millions of voters.**
But we’re fighting back. From Florida to Ohio, the fair maps movement is mobilizing to stop extremists from rigging the system in their favor. We’re using every tool at our disposal to prevent or minimize their damage to voting rights and our democracy. But we need your help.
[**Please contribute $30 or more to help the NDRC fight for a stronger, more representative democracy. clean_body: Voting rights and fair representation are at stake, and we need your help to fight back | Peter, We wanted to give you a quick update on House Republicans’ latest attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters: FIRST: Republicans introduced the SAVE Act — an extreme, anti-voter bill that would make it significantly harder, if not outright impossible, for certain eligible voters to register to vote and have their voices heard. THEN: As the bill made its way through committee, Donald Trump signed an executive order pushing a set of unconstitutional voter restrictions, including mass voter purges. NOW: The GOP-controlled House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act and sent it to the Senate. The NDRC is fighting back to protect voting rights and safeguard our democracy, but we need grassroots support from people like you. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s just a snapshot of what the SAVE Act would do: ❌ Require voters to provide very specific documents (like an original birth certificate) any time they update their registration. An estimated 21 million Americans don’t have easy access to this documentation — especially military voters, tribal voters, rural voters, survivors of natural disasters, and millions of married women who have changed their last names. ❌ Upend online voter registration, a practice in 42 states, make it impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail, and put an end to voter registration drives nationwide. Coupled with Trump’s executive order that mandates burdensome proof of citizenship, mass voter purges, and weaponizes the Department of Justice to verify immigration status, it’s clear: Anti-democracy extremists want to silence millions of voters. But we’re fighting back. From Florida to Ohio, the fair maps movement is mobilizing to stop extremists from rigging the system in their favor. We’re using every tool at our disposal to prevent or minimize their damage to voting rights and our democracy. But we need your help. = Thank you so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Cory Booker’s HISTORIC 25-hour-long speech on the Senate floor makes momentum for Democrats’ SOAR!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=10]MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS that he EXPOSED Trump and made them look RIDICULOUS in his speech!

As he faces egregious attacks from Trump loyalists, we’re asking 1,000 PA Democrats to sign our “Thank You Cory Booker” to let him know how grateful we are and that we will stand with him! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]

ADD YOUR NAME TO THE “THANK YOU CORY BOOKER” LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]

We will be sending this letter out at 6am sharp tomorrow morning, please add your name ASAP to be included!

TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for standing up for Americans!
Dear Senator Cory Booker,
I want to express my deepest gratitude to you for the incredible sacrifice you made during your historic 25-hour speech in protest of the Trump administration.
Your unwavering commitment to justice and democracy is truly inspiring.
You’ve been a beacon of hope in a time when, in less than 100 days, the president has caused unimaginable harm to Americans’ safety, financial stability, and the very foundations of our democracy.
But your courage and relentless fight for what is right have shown us a way forward — a path that is not consumed by the chaos and destruction of the MAGA agenda.
As the GOP continues to attack you, I will not sit quietly. I’m signing this letter to thank you for your leadership and proudly chipping in $7 to Democracy On The Line to support the brave Democrats in Congress who are standing strong against the MAGA administration! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]
ADD YOUR NAME TO THE “THANK YOU CORY BOOKER” LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]
Together, we will fight to protect our democracy!
X Peter Willis

-Democracy on the Line

--------------------------------------

(www.democracyonthelinepac.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****
**
---
[**Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5f279e7ca1a24cb496622f46ac3b47c4&_e=dtX4KwfXScA0-ucFRjADrVNzWzPiToSM5KBZpUVcNIBKLE1FPU8Br5T6sPEyededVWn61lwHY8wW2CIEKbGjFkxb6v3t4arSVyW-PC4odNr-YhlMYqtdOkFy40qi_Kq2jGnsicBWkUclWFlWubkcunNl_amvVJy3W2WExh3vQKKuC2-ibc_9OSECKmR1opinQxg2-XueoF9zpinfPcjs3dPAL1LKzOgvOSwqKHaC3pvmBgLlESQuk3zViRgulIPZHWlVPhVY50U0EIwCGDrJvHbMRwJHQH-NnPu6KrvLTiYbbsr4YPMfpdATxaUqRtfBnvjyB9aesarHjyuVCE6zbOAFVS9AZ8IZsKV7OjZagDRAK1JjV_hCaVgEAqFsVoVg6PpeX8_kPVX0rUgLqHx3Gh02PYjaxwip3QwL7WyLkF8%3D)
---
It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.
---

Now, **I’m eager to make history with this team by winning back the Senate as one of your new DSCC Vice Chairs** \-- and I know that supporters like you will be key to our success. Together, we won’t just be the rubber band that snaps us back from MAGA extremism, but the slingshot that propels our country to a brighter future. [**There’s more I need to say, but first I have to ask: Will you split a donation of $5 between the DSCC and my team to help us win back the Senate and fight for our progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105757746/539290737/855606753?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.13_DSCC-split_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjhhMzI3YS03NDE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfTKlUx28wCf1kYjosNKc4wqJBMKqAaZF4IoJ5Fd4qw=) Team, I know it’s easy to feel hopeless when there’s a MAGA trifecta in power -- but **when we choose hope, we’re stronger than they could ever be.** The work we put in _now_ is about more than what we’re fighting against -- it’s what we’re fighting for: **a Bright Hope for our country.** Day in and day out, Democrats are fighting on all fronts for our freedoms, our families, and our future. As we prepare for the battles ahead, having supporters like you in our corner will boost our momentum and slingshot us straight to victory. **If we work together, we will be an unrelenting force for change -- that’s why I need your help today, team.** Through the MAGA darkness, this is our north star: We must do everything we can to protect our democracy and our progress -- and with our next critical fundraising deadline just a few hours away, this is a perfect moment to make a HUGE impact. name: Katie Young
subject: Too good to be true?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?refcode=041325 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?refcode=041325]
Friend,
Would you believe me if I told you that you can donate to the House DFL at basically no cost to you? It sounds too good to be true, but with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund program you can donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state!
Democrats are working alongside Minnesotans to build a future where everyone can get ahead, not just the rich and powerful, but we need your help to make that vision a reality.
Will you donate your refundable $75 (or $150 per couple) today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?refcode=041325]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Refundable $75 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=041325]
Refundable $150 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=041325]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?express_lane_other=true&refcode=041325]
Thanks, friend. We really appreciate all your support, especially with all that’s going on in the world. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to make sure Minnesota is blue in 2026, but with you on our side I feel good about our chances.
Katie Young
Deputy Finance Director
Minnesota House DFL
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?refcode=041325]

clean_body: [] Friend, Would you believe me if I told you that you can donate to the House DFL at basically no cost to you? It sounds too good to be true, but with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund program you can donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state! Democrats are working alongside Minnesotans to build a future where everyone can get ahead, not just the rich and powerful, but we need your help to make that vision a reality. Will you donate your refundable $75 (or $150 per couple) today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Refundable $75 Donation [] Refundable $150 Donation [] Or, another amount [] Thanks, friend. We really appreciate all your support, especially with all that’s going on in the world. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to make sure Minnesota is blue in 2026, but with you on our side I feel good about our chances. Katie Young Deputy Finance Director Minnesota House DFL Contribute [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus 255 Plato Blvd E Saint Paul, MN 55105 United States We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
