body:
| This recklessness is not only embarrassing and hypocritical (remember all the fuss about Hillary Clinton’s emails?) but puts our country at risk, too.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8474%2E5257348%2E6hv3fB)
Derek — The recklessness and carelessness of the Trump administration is staggering.
The Signal group chat where top officials discussed military strike plans... without realizing there was a reporter in the group... was just the beginning. This information could have easily been leaked, thwarting military operations in Yemen and putting the lives of service members at risk. Now, we have learned that this may have been only one of 20 such reckless chat groups endangering our national security.
Then, it was revealed that National Security Advisor Michael Waltz was using Gmail to conduct official government business.
But maybe worst of all, Derek, is this:
After meeting with right-wing conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer, Trump fired the head of the NSA, and several members of the National Security Council at her demand.
Derek, taking national security advice from Laura Loomer is like taking advice on putting out fires from an arsonist.
**All of this recklessness is not only embarrassing and hypocritical (think Hillary Clinton’s emails) but puts our country at risk, too.**
I’ve called for the resignations of several top administration officials over these chats involving classified information and joined legislation to require better training for officials handling our nation’s top secrets.
[**Please chip in to help me keep up the fight against the reckless disregard of our national security by the President’s top officials.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250413_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8474%2E5257348%2E6hv3fB)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. body:
Your signature is needed to STOP George Soros| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=80ca1383b00444ff84798da91846797c&_e=CrOVpmxkQu9YkeNPsdAgmEQOPCDaUildPCVkOZPP7QZkwnXf6WOzVqiTOcmWQDTwWqW_xQye5u7J_z1wCy1iWoSXISsXEMF0oK0uwmtbjuBOmwLrISye1J6nH8fRml8Dd-b-b46eg_jC0gf5ZsWqUwprLHFhXv0NS5eToNHRAM8_vlKM_elSAtm64UmonlAQmd5OfoCkXja3Eg5kEfyQWPAD4zdkv69qId1kGTUnt8i6SHIQB8h5dtlC38PR93N32mROaywV-OG1i5RvyCIgjxNoRw_mvt9Bc80rHxbcZjJP_lbJs_XPHcIg0s1EhTn3ePR5yHZ_3w8hZ6wp6L8CJ_c14qLBSV57yp10elq8z3U%3D)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=80ca1383b00444ff84798da91846797c&_e=CrOVpmxkQu9YkeNPsdAgmEQOPCDaUildPCVkOZPP7QZkwnXf6WOzVqiTOcmWQDTwWqW_xQye5u7J_z1wCy1iWoSXISsXEMF0oK0uwmtbjuBOmwLrISye1J6nH8fRml8Dd-b-b46eg_jC0gf5ZsWqUwprLHFhXv0NS5eToNHRAM8_vlKM_elSAtm64UmonlAQmd5OfoCkXja3Eg5kEfyQWMgMXUwrsgJ4dMsJP6Yhy3rvFiDcrkQulSLhkrGejqZKYUYYjBE9qAEKYCFhhOcAVVgx7LTWVDIgyi35-2Jkte1Od4S3BBlwG-6_Is5p0WGNAq-8U9GSrhyYyBCemjBTYJP9f4OvaygIMcijpCwNlKY%3D) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=80ca1383b00444ff84798da91846797c&_e=CrOVpmxkQu9YkeNPsdAgmEQOPCDaUildPCVkOZPP7QZkwnXf6WOzVqiTOcmWQDTwWqW_xQye5u7J_z1wCy1iWoSXISsXEMF0oK0uwmtbjuBOmwLrISye1J6nH8fRml8Dd-b-b46eg_jC0gf5ZsWqUwprLHFhXv0NS5eToNHRAM8_vlKM_elSAtm64UmonlAQmd5OfoCkXja3Eg5kEfyQWIR7pL4lnzoH3SRJZqsRrkH_edbRDYdNFN5QO1GJ9GAZUbIkLojXevFjo5F5Ttl14cFzdUYbmJpoUHy7oYw-eR_SiIeA63lEp9MlPBfWPZ5kRIqfoD8eLSuTUr2KdoliAmRF1_qqFOyornG24fuLuFY%3D)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=80ca1383b00444ff84798da91846797c&_e=CrOVpmxkQu9YkeNPsdAgmEQOPCDaUildPCVkOZPP7QZkwnXf6WOzVqiTOcmWQDTwWqW_xQye5u7J_z1wCy1iWoSXISsXEMF0oK0uwmtbjuBOmwLrISye1J6nH8fRml8Dd-b-b46eg_jC0gf5ZsWqUwprLHFhXv0NS5eToNHRAM8_vlKM_elSAtm64UmonlAQmd5OfoCkXja3Eg5kEfyQWC1ozN1JO2hjyc9qo9SPRtcI5GJM07Z-oGi6aIv1lDHepMEVXimIyrNJXejI45dRW8smnCD_JBMVDz8ULEtbdClrmFEkIMml_rEilL3USc2f39l163Vdpry2_0504srHBmLCYxReNr-XVe7nAznnFck%3D)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=80ca1383b00444ff84798da91846797c&_e=CrOVpmxkQu9YkeNPsdAgmEQOPCDaUildPCVkOZPP7QZkwnXf6WOzVqiTOcmWQDTwWqW_xQye5u7J_z1wCy1iWoSXISsXEMF0oK0uwmtbjuBOmwLrISye1J6nH8fRml8Dd-b-b46eg_jC0gf5ZsWqUwprLHFhXv0NS5eToNHRAM8_vlKM_elSAtm64UmonlAQmd5OfoCkXja3Eg5kEfyQWCI9_EH55ZIMF_6ReloG4ge0Lj--eR69VHTQcqcsfGOdlMd11okMgtMQowTo0SIKj57xpgC4jWn7v4c1j1-xSISqJt4nFcAXH2ZlOwvshw6CytA2ZPUJl-6Sv8BpVeld3nO4PgvkhSEdHqroRIG0gNs%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. name: David Hogg
subject: Care to explain, Marjorie?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene is the past. We’re the future.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250413-1&t=1&akid=1971%2E587540%2EOYcCq2)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-1971&amount=5&refcode2=1971_587540_OYcCq2&akid=1971%2E587540%2EOYcCq2)
You’ve probably seen this by now, but members of Congress like Marjorie Taylor Greene seemed to have magically known when to buy stocks before Trump announced that he would be pausing his economy-wrecking tariffs for 90 days.
Peter, I’m pretty sure there are laws against this kind of thing. But given the chaotic, corrupt hellhole our government has become, does that even matter?
**Here’s the bottom line:** We are sick and tired of the same old politicians who are only in office to enrich themselves and reward their wealthy friends and backers.
We need new leaders who understand what it’s like for real people in this country.
We need more elected officials like Maxwell Frost – the first-ever Gen Z member of Congress – who drove for Uber to help make ends meet on the campaign trail.
And we need fewer politicians like Marjorie Taylor Greene, who only represent the same old corrupt status quo as they peddle their extreme and dangerous rhetoric.
**Can you help us create a Congress with more Maxwells and less Marjories?** We are building a stronger future by electing the next generation of progressives. And we can only do that powerful work with this grassroots team’s continued support.
**[Peter, contribute $5 or anything you can to stand with us in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-1971&amount=5&refcode2=1971_587540_OYcCq2&akid=1971%2E587540%2EOYcCq2)**

Thank you!!
David Hogg

body:
Hi Peter,
We know you get a lot of emails, so we want to keep this update brief.
Here’s where things in WI-03 stand:
**FIRST:** Rebecca launched this campaign last month, and we blew away everyone’s expectations for grassroots support. More than **7,000 individual donors** chipped in in the first 48 hours of her announcement.
**THEN:** Elections analysts at _Inside Elections_ upgraded our chances of flipping this district. **We’re one rating away from a toss-up.** They cited the strength of Becca’s campaign in their report.
**NOW:** We recently got word that **Elon Musk** is now in the mix, and just wrote the **maximum allowable** personal check to Derrick Van Orden. He’s trying to save him and this seat for far-right extremists.
**[With the stakes rising, every dollar you donate gives us the tools we need to fight back against Van Orden, Musk, and the elites. clean_body: Hi Peter, We know you get a lot of emails, so we want to keep this update brief. Here’s where things in WI-03 stand: FIRST: Rebecca launched this campaign last month, and we blew away everyone’s expectations for grassroots support. More than 7,000 individual donors chipped in in the first 48 hours of her announcement. THEN: Elections analysts at Inside Elections upgraded our chances of flipping this district. We’re one rating away from a toss-up. They cited the strength of Becca’s campaign in their report. NOW: We recently got word that Elon Musk is now in the mix, and just wrote the maximum allowable personal check to Derrick Van Orden. He’s trying to save him and this seat for far-right extremists. ### It's about time that America tried something not-so-new...
Apr 13
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=161120517&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMTIwNTE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDU1OTIwMSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ3MTUxMjAxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7CCBc2L-jMjDqYOSFZ7o-9cYR2NjXFPs0ZZSfHyDbMI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=161120517&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMTIwNTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NTkyMDEsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE1MTIwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.va3rW_QGDQ6f52hZ-fiT9gr0-oSK1KK-yPAEPTEj9uk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/could-tariffs-be-trumps-big-stick?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07f4372c-97ba-4b35-b2ac-8c23606ce317?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As with all things Trump, the media will have you think that his tariff agenda is "unprecedented" but history shows that is not the case.
In fact, for the better part of America's life, tariffs have been an integral part of how the federal government pays the bills. At the start of World War I, tariffs composed 30% of global revenues. This was also right around the time that the Federal Reserve was created, the beginning of when our government got into the game of manipulating interest rates to borrow money for big projects like world wars.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qA9HhZmXnIVkiTWS86VfqHILgzs-Rmg-2cSM87-UxFs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161120517)
The massive expansion of the federal government was coupled with the advent of payroll and income taxes in the lead up to World War II. During the same time tariff rates and revenues saw a precipitous decline.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5164039e-ebab-484b-9edf-904e7cbc6c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In pursuit of a worldwide trade community that the capitalist bloc would use to put the Soviet Commies to shame, the United States ceased to use tariffs as a source of revenue, they simply started to tax their companies and citizens instead. They taxed and they plundered the coffers of social security and when that wasn't enough they added trillions in debt. All the while, tariffs were thrown in favor of globalized free trade.
"America is no longer the isolationist country it once was!" Is a common refrain.
But America was not always a country that ceaselessly supported foreign wars in the name of democracy and freedom and things like that. **[A September of 1939, a Gallup poll asked Americans whether the U.S. should declare war on Germany in alliance with England, France and Poland. 90% of respondents rejected the idea while only 8% favored the war.](https://substack.com/redirect/63f377e3-e4a2-49e1-a156-f8de9acffe1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Presented By Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/2a56886e-2bbf-460a-997b-00fd8bb6c520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Buried SECRET from Apollo moon landing finally revealed
If you think history books taught you everything about the Apollo moon landing... **[you need to see this shocking video...](https://substack.com/redirect/2a56886e-2bbf-460a-997b-00fd8bb6c520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a56886e-2bbf-460a-997b-00fd8bb6c520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The full story is finally coming out. **[WATCH NOW](https://substack.com/redirect/2a56886e-2bbf-460a-997b-00fd8bb6c520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2a56886e-2bbf-460a-997b-00fd8bb6c520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
We have been sold the myth that America's experiment with nation building in far-off lands was a good idea. We recently discovered much of the absurd and perplexing things that CIA prop groups like USAID have been funding abroad. Oh yeah, and there were also three or four overseas wars that were complete and utter failures. Perhaps it's time we re-assess, eh?
While the Chinese threat looms, it is admittedly not prudent for America to turn entirely inward. But a reassessment on how soft vs. hard power is projected around the world is definitely due. That brings us back to tariffs, which could be Trump's version of Teddy Roosevelt's "big stick."
The idea of bringing Tariffs back into DC's toolkit is not just a relic of pre-modern times. Ross Perot coined the "Big sucking sound going south" phrase standing on stage in between Bill Clinton and George Bush Sr. and outlining how the Presidency could use tariffs to equalize trade deficits and bring accessible and well-paying jobs back to the United States.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/84e66919-5b88-4f0d-adb4-26c843640e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But Ross Perot didn't win, Bill Clinton did. And over his two terms in the 1990's, Clinton perpetuated free-trade policies that were set up under Bush I, and laid the groundwork for the uniparty's multi-decade support for unfettered global trade.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qA9HhZmXnIVkiTWS86VfqHILgzs-Rmg-2cSM87-UxFs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161120517)
One thing is clear: the global harmonious community touted in the post Cold War era by the likes of New York Times eggheads named Thomas Friedman, Neo-Cons or Neo-Libs in DC, and clueless actors in Hollywood have all gotten us into this mess. At the very least, Trump's tariff agenda seeks to redirect the globalist gravy train to a place where regular Americans in the middle of the country can reap some of the benefits enjoyed by the coastal elites for the better part of the last 100 years.
Why not try some tariffs? We don't know what's gonna happen until we try, eh? Amidst all the whining on Wall Street and incessant screeching from the so-called economists that have overseen the repeated humiliation of the American worker for their entire careers, I am sitting here in Washington wondering why we are still listening to the dudes and dudettes who made a living feasting on the carcass of the middle class?
Let's see what Trumpo can do with those normal-sized hands wrapped around the 2025 version of Teddy Roosevelt's "big stick".
* * *

As one of the Senator’s key supporters, we want to give you a special opportunity to follow along with what is happening around Wyoming and around the country. You can opt-out of receiving this Sunday recap here . ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ April 13, 2025THE AMERICAN PEOPLE MADE THE RIGHT CHOICE: Senator Barrasso took to the Senate floor to highlight Republicans’ achievements on the issues that matter most, from inflation to the border. WATCH HERE SENATOR BARRASSO APPLAUDS PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ACTION TO REINVIGORATE AMERICA’S COAL INDUSTRY Senator Barrasso voiced his approval of President Trump’s recent executive order that supports Wyoming’s coal industry and end the left’s war on clean, reliable, and affordable American energy. “The President is moving very quickly in terms of boosting the coal industry. It’s part of the bold plan this administration has to restore American energy dominance… Wyoming’s energy warriors will lead the way.” Learn more about Sen. Barrasso’s remarks here . AMERICA WILL ALWAYS STAND WITH ISRAEL: Shortly before the Senate confirmed President Trump’s nominee for ambassador for Israel, Mike Huckabee, Senator Barrasso reiterated the importance of the strong friendship between the United States and Israel. WATCH HERE HOLDING LEFTIST JUDGES ACCOUNTABLE: The U.S. Senate will soon take up a bill to strip the country’s 677 federal district judges of the power to issue nationwide injunctions, said Senate Majority Whip John Barrasso, R-Wyoming. Under the bill, injunctions from judges at the district level could pertain only to the parties before the court. There is an exception for class-action lawsuits, but essentially under JRCA, judges could not halt actions by President Donald Trump's administration on a national level. Barrasso touted the bill on the Senate floor last week, saying “partisan, unelected, district court judges” are trying to “micromanage the president of the United States.” Access the full Cowboy State Daily article here . SENATE REPUBLICANS APPROVE FRAMEWORK FOR TRUMP’S TAX BREAKS AND SPENDING CUTS AFTER LATE-NIGHT SESSION: Senator Barrasso worked with his Senate colleagues to pass a bill that protects President Trump’s tax cuts, lowers government spending, and provides the resources needed to make America strong and safe again “[This budget] fulfills our promises to secure the border, to rebuild our economy and to restore peace through strength.” Read more about Sen. Barrasso’s work here . Tune in next week for the Sunday edition of Barrasso’s Briefing. Thank you, Team Barrasso DONATE NOW ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ A Message from Senator John Barrasso: I want to take a moment to remind you of my journey to the U.S. Senate, the important lessons I have learned along the way, and why I continue to believe wholeheartedly in our beloved state. My father, a World War II veteran, left school during the Great Depression to join the Army. Though he only had a ninth grade education, he built a career as a hard-working cement finisher. My mother, a dedicated voter who never missed an election, instilled in me the importance of civic duty. From my parents, I inherited an unwavering love for this country that I have proudly carried throughout my life. It's something I strive to keep alive in Wyoming. Later, in medical school, I learned the importance of having a plan before taking action, a lesson that has proven invaluable in both my medical career and my service as your senator. Just as in surgery, effective leadership requires a clear vision and a strategic approach to problem-solving. As you may know, I am sometimes referred to as "Wyoming's doctor," but to be honest, that is what I have always strived to be as your senator. I have wholeheartedly dedicated myself to serving the state, addressing its challenges, and making it the best it can be. Whether it's advocating for our veterans, championing American energy security, or safeguarding our borders, I've always strived to be a voice for all Wyoming people. Your concerns are my concerns, and your aspirations are my aspirations. As we look towards the future, I'm confident that Wyoming has the potential to be an even stronger, more prosperous state. But it will require strong leadership, a clear vision, and your continued support. Already, your support has been instrumental in my journey, and I promise to continue fighting for the issues that matter most to Wyoming families. Sincerely, Senator John Barrasso CHIP IN FOR A STRONG WYOMING Paid for by Friends of John Barrasso

name: Team In This Together
subject: BREAKING: Andy’s approval rating is sky high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Morning Consult just released their latest results on approval ratings of all 50 governors in the United States.

Peter,

Morning Consult just released their latest results on approval ratings of all 50 governors in the United States.

Once again,**Andy Beshear is the most popular Democratic governor in the country.**

Peter, Donald Trump won Kentucky by 30 points in 2024. The year before, Andy won reelection by five points. **And today, his job approval is as high as it has ever been, at an eye-popping 68%.**

Andy has won three statewide elections in deep-red Kentucky by staying true to our Democratic values, always doing the right thing, and being honest with voters about what he believes and why.

This has been a winning formula in Kentucky, and it shows that Democrats can win anywhere— by standing up for people and staying focused on what matters in their lives. **And that’s just what we intend to do with In This Together PAC.**

We’re sharing this playbook and supporting good leaders who will always do what’s right for the people they serve. We saw success last month in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, and there’s more to come this year.

**[Will you help us keep up this momentum by chipping in to support our work? | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Sen. Ted Cruz Launches Investigation Into USA Fencing Over Policy Involving Biological Males In Female Division:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Get 'em, Ted! USA Fencing got placed on the hot seat recently after a female fencer, Stephanie Turner, outright refused to take on a biological male in a competition. Her opponent, a transgender athlete, is allowed to be in the women's category, per USA Fencing policy. Speaking of that policy, USA Fencing is obviously lenient on allowing trans athletes to compete against females, saying that eligibility is ruled by their "gender identity." In other words, they completely go against science and reality. Republican Texas..." **[Ted Cruz Used The Perfect Phrase To Describe The Party's Budget Battle On The Hill:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "A group of Republican senators spoke with Fox News' Sean Hannity on Tuesday night, which was peppered with some zingers from Sen. John Kennedy (R-LA), who took potshots at the current faces of the Democratic Party, namely Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY), which we noted yesterday. Yet, Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) also issued a warning and outlined the numerous action items that must get through this budget reconciliation process, which hit a speed bump when Speaker Mike Johnson yanked the vote amid a reported conservative..." **[Ted Cruz Deems Supreme Court'The Remedy' To Injunctions Against Trump:](http://trk.tedcruz.-k5PzOFw)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) argued that the Supreme Court, along with the appellate process, is "the remedy" to judges ruling against the Trump administration, citing three recent rulings from the high court providing legal wins to the Trump White House. Among the rulings that aid President Donald Trump's work include allowing the administration to resume deporting illegal immigrants through the Alien Enemies Act of 1798, and the Supreme Court granting an emergency stay that halted an order requiring the Education Department to reinstate over $65 million in teacher..." **[Ted Cruz Reintroduces Bill To Boost Education Choices For Military Families:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Senators Ted Cruz (R-TX) and Jim Banks (R-IN) are once again pushing to boost educational opportunities for military families through a new proposal that would help them establish Education Savings Accounts (ESAs). The Education Savings Accounts for Military Families Act of 2025, reintroduced last week, would allow families of active-duty military personnel to opt into a federally backed ESA program. | | Friends,On Friday, I launched my campaign to be the next Governor of Colorado. This is just the beginning. The challenges ahead are big—building affordable housing across our state; making healthcare, mental health services, and childcare accessible; modernizing our education system, and creating an economy that works for all Coloradans (not just those at the top!).These will be tough fights, but the outpouring of support tells me that Coloradans are ready to take them on. As I work to earn your vote for Governor, I’ll fight every day for the future we believe in. I will hold President Trump and his lawless administration accountable, stick up for democratic values at home and abroad, and fight back against Republicans' plans to strip away your healthcare for another round of tax breaks for the wealthy. I can’t tell you how excited I am when I think about what we can accomplish working together in Colorado. We can lead the way in pushing back against President Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk. We can build an education system worthy of our kids. We can show that good policies and sensible politics can lead to a more affordable, livable state. **[Friend, I hope you’ll stick with me in this fight and help us continue this incredible momentum. Consider becoming one of our Founding Donors today.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105765519/539315212/-1718802500?refcode=X_250412_launch3_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzVhODA4ZS04NDE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlQZOPH9Eh7grs2M6zqgnfzZIGCoqRDO_3BjaSSeIMo=)**

clean_body: | | | = | | Friends,On Friday, I launched my campaign to be the next Governor of Colorado. This is just the beginning. The challenges ahead are big—building affordable housing across our state; making healthcare, mental health services, and childcare accessible; modernizing our education system, and creating an economy that works for all Coloradans (not just those at the top!).These will be tough fights, but the outpouring of support tells me that Coloradans are ready to take them on. As I work to earn your vote for Governor, I’ll fight every day for the future we believe in. I will hold President Trump and his lawless administration accountable, stick up for democratic values at home and abroad, and fight back against Republicans' plans to strip away your healthcare for another round of tax breaks for the wealthy. I can’t tell you how excited I am when I think about what we can accomplish working together in Colorado. We can lead the way in pushing back against President Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk. We can build an education system worthy of our kids. We can show that good policies and sensible politics can lead to a more affordable, livable state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = | = = = | | Thank you,Michael | | | | | | ---|---|--- Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States = | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | = | | | Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My 2¢ on Trump’s birthday parade
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
He wants a big military parade in Washington, DC for his birthday. He wants it paid for by taxpayers. And he wants everyone to see how big and tough he is, because he is the most insecure person to ever occupy the White House.
#

As a former enlisted Marine, I think I can speak with some authority on how the grunts feel about a few things.
Something they absolutely _**hate**_ is when they get forced to have lunch with some VIP that wants to show how tough they are.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250411-1-90&refcode2=3815.734936.umbsRi&t=1&akid=3815%2E734936%2EumbsRi)
---
_“Yes, I like food, too.” -JD Vance, probably_
Something else they hate is parades. A waste of a perfectly good Saturday, in uniform, marching in formation.
So, logically, that’s what Trump wants to make them do. He wants a big military parade in Washington, DC for his birthday. He wants it paid for by taxpayers. And he wants everyone to see how big and tough he is, because he is the most insecure person to ever occupy the White House.
This is an absolute joke, but it goes beyond that. When you join the military you swear an oath to the Constitution. The president is the Commander in Chief, but your job is to defend the country and our democracy. We don’t do these kinds of parades for the presdent in the United States.
They do it elsewhere, though. You know who else loved big military parades to fluff their ego? Hitler, Mussolini, and Stalin, just to name a few. North Korea and China are big on them as well.
Trump’s surrounded by yes men these days, and if he wants this parade he’s going to do whatever he can to get it. But we don’t have to sit here and take that. You can be sure that I am going to do whatever I can to gum up the works on this.
Trump’s doing enough to make himself a king, and he shouldn’t get a parade for it.
Let’s keep it up, Peter. I ain’t done yet.
Ruben
🌵 Please! Don’t click away yet 🌞
While Ruben takes on the Trump administration, he needs to know he has the support of a big team behind him. If you can afford it, [**consider making a donation to his campaign to help him keep up the pressure.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250411-1-90&t=2&akid=3815%2E734936%2EumbsRi)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250411-1-90&t=3&akid=3815%2E734936%2EumbsRi)
Thank you! 🫡

clean_body: With Trump fueling destruction and chaos in Washington, it’s clear that we need a Democratic House Majority. | | | | With Trump fueling destruction and chaos in Washington, it's clear that we need a Democratic House Majority to hold Trump accountable and reverse the damage he's doing to ordinary Americans — before it's too late. In 2024, our team went all in to help Rep. Janelle Bynum win her tough race in OR-5, and 2026 will be no different. Janelle represents one of Oregon's most purple House districts, and it's going to take a surge of grassroots support to help her win again in a year where control of the House majority is on the line. In Congress, I've seen firsthand how Janelle shows up ready to do the hard work to make life better for Oregonians, and we need her leadership to keep moving forward. Janelle's competitive race will help determine which party controls the House in 2026, and a Democratic House is critical to stand up to Trump and the GOP's lawlessness. I know Janelle Bynum is determined to meet this moment, to win again, and to keep fighting for working families in Congress. = = Onward! name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’ll catch you up
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250413-1315-foote&t=1001&akid=1315%2E342411%2EtxMDl3 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, if you
haven’t heard, we’ll catch you up.

Elon Musk made a desperate attempt to influence last Tuesday’s Wisconsin
Supreme Court race by offering $1 million to two voters as a "gift" for
casting their ballots.

Peter, if that
sounds suspicious, it’s because it is. Musk attempted to sway the election
through spending millions of dollars to buy votes. And it’s against the
law. Fortunately, Wisconsin voters saw right through this ploy and
decisively elected liberal judge Susan Crawford.

This victory in Wisconsin is more than just a state win – it’s a win for
our democracy. People are tired of billionaires like Musk and corrupt
politicians like Trump undermining our system to advance their own selfish
agendas.

Now, we must build power to stop figures like Trump and Musk from shaping
our future. That’s where our Squad comes in.

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are fighting on the front lines to hold
Trump, Musk, and others accountable for their actions. They’re speaking
truth to power, standing up for working people, and pushing for policies
that prioritize our communities — not the ultra-rich and powerful.

The bottom line is,
Peter: we can’t do this work
without you.

To continue this fight, we need to reach more voters, build stronger
grassroots campaigns, and ensure that we have the resources to stand up to
the likes of Trump and Musk.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250413-movement.-V5JVl&refcode=em20250413-1315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1315%2E342411%2EtxMDl3 ]Will you chip in $3 or more today to fuel this momentum
and help our Squad keep fighting for the people?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250413-movement.-V5JVl&refcode=em20250413-1315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1315%2E342411%2EtxMDl3 ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1315%2E342411%2EtxMDl3

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

People are tired of billionaires like Musk and corrupt politicians like Trump undermining our system to advance their own selfish agendas. Now, we must build power to stop figures like Trump and Musk from shaping our future. That’s where our Squad comes in. Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are fighting on the front lines to hold Trump, Musk, and others accountable for their actions. They’re speaking truth to power, standing up for working people, and pushing for policies that prioritize our communities — not the ultra-rich and powerful. The bottom line is, Peter: we can’t do this work without you. To continue this fight, we need to reach more voters, build stronger grassroots campaigns, and ensure that we have the resources to stand up to the likes of Trump and Musk. [ ]Will you chip in $3 or more today to fuel this momentum and help our Squad keep fighting for the people? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, Squad Victory Fund

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90512446-13da-4468-a2ae-8872de1a1548/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
Californians are turning red states blue. Here’s how we stop it
Californians are fleeing—and turning red states blue. Here’s how we stop it.
[ ****](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=36dfa3c8ca5940faa96e194e8a9df765&_e=vBS1FldSPxXK9TB-n1RATHYAiBXLmSAocY0Mb9dKqBYxtLmNUtEde48xc1_WQmOdvMmytLIWfv58H4FkrKhWswr1iGNZOxRvPo0O49wC5U8fAhfEMBcZPoVDX1kbtux-oC3TcS2AuFxqbiKgDkT6yGYnnHNl6LWS4cjPCgOMT7NzG8eQMLIK4DR6jn-oH1Jl70uFdUo9NJSyRMJF7dEj9Akr5wBL2e4QRpjyJowOTS0gEyFsvydqIvDHDs9N3He8XYkGx5RCf1twZqk8rL0476EKZQaqommGJ9lMm452N0PaxH8FPQ2epjXBA1U3IemhIrEfocYPcCVQC5xThkaJ9A%3D%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=36dfa3c8ca5940faa96e194e8a9df765&_e=vBS1FldSPxXK9TB-n1RATHYAiBXLmSAocY0Mb9dKqBYxtLmNUtEde48xc1_WQmOdvMmytLIWfv58H4FkrKhWswr1iGNZOxRvPo0O49wC5U8fAhfEMBcZPoVDX1kbtux-oC3TcS2AuFxqbiKgDkT6yGYnnHNl6LWS4cjPCgOMT7M3QHb-2-AWvqru5IRsSa7JKhC2hgCATMdUL1vYuLlJAIIc6jWb2qsnNE6ywZ8zXFG1IXC9h2CNdQPXkeRciBbq1bIypivp8DIyLp4EFNWqzGDLKPNXddW-XhHiZ75hMUqq-EKaLrAfpdVf2EzuNgZJ3mMmsCtC8Xt0PuXK9obxwA%3D%3D)

**Friend,**

**California is a mess.** High taxes, rising crime, and radical policies are driving people out in record numbers.

Californians bring their failed policies with them, turning red states purple and purple states blue. If we don’t fix California, it won’t just be our problem — **it will be yours too.**

That’s why I’m running for Governor of California. **We must turn California around before it drags the rest of America down with it.**

And here’s the latest: **Kamala Harris may enter the race.** If she does, she’ll have unlimited money from Hollywood, Big Tech, and Democrat megadonors to push her radical agenda.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=36dfa3c8ca5940faa96e194e8a9df765&_e=vBS1FldSPxXK9TB-n1RATHYAiBXLmSAocY0Mb9dKqBYxtLmNUtEde48xc1_WQmOdvMmytLIWfv58H4FkrKhWswr1iGNZOxRvPo0O49wC5U8fAhfEMBcZPoVDX1kbtux-oC3TcS2AuFxqbiKgDkT6yGYnnHNl6LWS4cjPCgOMT7OXuzYbSZoEnpLE_hMJ2kXJZ3oSrmu3LJFq7W6IWY9hUAyU5wt4z9Ve5chI-f9ejYB_-MWcS3MCS2uOGSXpvaveKws8-VESyV2qZt2uP8NFYq7eHW0gspVUSIDitKN-ZLk1NWNtIuVOpHtI8ZkBL8zwYqnF8KZ47vODwXdftoByeg%3D%3D)

A **Governor Kamala Harris** would mean:

**➡️ Open borders & mass illegal immigration** that impact the entire country.

**➡️ Soft-on-crime policies** that embolden criminals and make neighborhoods unsafe.

**➡️ Higher taxes & more government control,** pushing businesses and families to flee.

I’ve dedicated my career to protecting Californians as **Sheriff of Riverside County,** one of the largest in the state. I’ve **taken on criminals, stood up to failed policies, and put law-abiding citizens first.**

Now, I’m taking this fight statewide to **save California before it’s too late.**

**This fight isn’t just about one state** — it’s about stopping the spread of failed policies nationwide. Will you stand with me?
| [ DONATE NOW TO HELP SAVE CALIFORNIA» ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=36dfa3c8ca5940faa96e194e8a9df765&_e=vBS1FldSPxXK9TB-n1RATHYAiBXLmSAocY0Mb9dKqBYxtLmNUtEde48xc1_WQmOdvMmytLIWfv58H4FkrKhWswr1iGNZOxRvPo0O49wC5U8fAhfEMBcZPoVDX1kbtux-oC3TcS2AuFxqbiKgDkT6yGYnnHNl6LWS4cjPCgOMT7Nc8IXPzdwHB-mU4nQx6iVlPr0ZV6OTQ77AYsUF1majIiP-k8MO_qHJZhX9CrH_2YdgsPRaAn1zgFIbY2gPvT_WpeU2ziyB_negSIPwXjb1G_k6XcXW3oo788XHZUa8Pj2NgZIjSt0MCT-a1m_Gw1SMW0JoIGALhoijEk3qCQHirg%3D%3D)

**Sheriff Chad Bianco

This fight isn’t just about one state — it’s about stopping the spread of failed policies nationwide. Will you stand with me? | Thank you, Sheriff Chad Bianco Republican Candidate for California Governor Join the Fight * | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC #1479095

subject: I know what you’re probably thinking

body:

#
---
Hey Peter, I’m reaching out about our mid-month fundraising deadline. **I know what you’re probably thinking:** _“A big deadline JUST passed. What’s so different or important about this one?”_ I get it, and I understand why there may be some confusion — which I'm happy to clear up. Our first quarterly deadline of the year was at the end of last month, and now, **we’re nearing our first mid-month deadline of the new quarter**. You see, we were only able to reach last quarter’s deadline because we set little goals like the one coming up, stuck to them, and kept our fundraising on track. We’re facing an onslaught of challenges out of Washington D.C., and by helping us reach these regular internal targets, you’re playing a major role in our ability to fight back for our state and for all Oregonians. I don’t ask for your support lightly, Peter, and I don’t expect you to chip into every email. But if you’re able to chip in to this one, it will do a world of good for my team and I as we beat back every incoming attack on our rights. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Can I show you one of my favorite necklaces?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Voting is one of the ways we’ll overcome this undeniably difficult moment in our nation’s history.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)
Can I show you one of my favorite necklaces?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250413_1_vote?amount=5&refcode=em20250413-1311&refcode2=1311_400544_QqVe4V&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)_This design represents so much for me._
I had this necklace made after being inspired by Michelle Obama’s “VOTE” necklace she wore to the 2020 Convention. As soon as I saw it, I said _I need a Native one._ So I went to a co-op of Native American artists here in Albuquerque called Turquoise Skies. They found a Pueblo artist, and this is one of their designs.
**This design means a lot to me. Representing the Native vote is why I became an organizer in the first place.** I started organizing in 2004, and I rolled up my sleeves to organize for Democrats across Indian country. I would lace up my sneakers, drive out to Native American communities in New Mexico, and go door to door. At that time, I never dreamed I’d be elected to lead our state party, serve in Congress, or be a Cabinet Secretary. But witnessing the power of grassroots organizing proved that defying the odds is possible if we work together.
**Voting is one of the ways we’ll overcome this undeniably difficult moment in our nation’s history – and we’re already seeing an astounding wave of momentum.** In spite of billionaire Elon Musk pouring millions into the race, Judge Susan Crawford won her seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And in a recent special election in Florida, Democrats flipped a county blue that Trump had won by 19 points.
To win our campaign for New Mexico, we must get out the vote. But spreading our message to all New Mexicans through community organizing, advertising on TV and online, and even sending emails like this one can be costly work. So I must ask:
**[Please donate your very first $5 today so we can grow our grassroots campaign. If every person reading this message contributes even a few dollars, I know we can fully fund our campaign, organize for every vote, and build a New Mexico that works for everyone.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250413_1_vote?amount=5&refcode=em20250413-1311&refcode2=1311_400544_QqVe4V&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250413_1_vote?amount=5&refcode=em20250413-1311&refcode2=1311_400544_QqVe4V&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. Most people don’t know that it wasn’t until the 1960s that the last state granted Native Americans the right to vote in state elections. My ancestors couldn’t vote, which is why I believe we owe it to them to make our voices heard at the ballot box. [**Getting out the vote in every corner of New Mexico will be expensive but critical work, so if you can chip in $5 to our campaign, I’d be so grateful.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250413_1_vote?amount=5&refcode=em20250413-1311&refcode2=1311_400544_QqVe4V&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250413-1&t=2&refcode2=1311_400544_QqVe4V&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1311%2E400544%2EQqVe4V)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

_AP notes on tariffs - Sunday, Apr 13 2025_
* * *
_**0/5 - BACKGROUND/MOTIVATIONS**_
* The general assumption on the left appears to be, a la Krugman, that Trump is a madman and one should not try to make sense of the madness.1
* The right either wants to claim Wednesday's pause, pivot, and putative global alliance in an 'embargo' against China was, a la Secretary Bessent, the plan all along, or that Trump, after looking at bond markets and wisely _changed_ the plan.2
* Both of these are incorrect.
* The truth is that, whatever the outcome was and -- in 90 days, will be -- it is _neither_ planned _nor_ unplanned because President Trump _has_ no plan.
* This is not necessarily a good or bad thing. Plans clarify values. Yet in a complex world, plans are almost always hubris: "man proposes, God disposes."3 Nowhere is this more true, perhaps, than when the plan, such as it is, _is**to reconfigure the entire global economic order since (at least) 1991.** _
* I actually think that is quite _doable_ in one presidential term, though reasonable people will disagree about whether it is _desirable_.
* My personal view:
* Bill Clinton was dead right to get ahead of globalization in 1992 -- and lead it.
* Bernie/Trump are _also_ dead right that this had disastrous consequences for the 2/3rds of Americans without a college degree; these voters form the Bernie/Trump populist base.
* Obama was _wrong_ to dismiss 'Occupy Wall Street' populism and blindly ratify neoliberalism: 2008 was not 1992. Bill saw this.4 Hillary didn't.5
* Vance/Bessent et al are dead right that overreliance on China terribly endangers our national security, as we learned during COVID.
* We therefore need a hard reset of the post-1991 global economic order.
* But whether a hard reset is wise or unwise, _no one knows how to do it_ , because _it has never been done before._
* Smoot-Hawley6 was pre-WWII; it is N/A
* _**If you 're trying to do something that's never been done before, it's tough to plan. Much better to (1) set intentions + (2) experiment + (3) improvise/iterate on the results.**_
* The president has an **intuition** that the American economy can be (possibility) in better shape than it is now. It is a **contrarian** intuition vis-a-vis college-educated white collar professionals, esp. Wall Street, and their financial dependents (spouses and children). That's why everyone on TV lit their hair on fire this week: why would you "crash" or "destroy" the economy (defined, at least in the very near term, as _the stock market_) for "no reason" ??? !!!
* Notice two things about this **contrarian intuition** :
* (1) It is _**contrarian**_. Most experts think the economy is doing _well_. Trump is arguing, no, it is not doing well -- or at least not as well as it could be doing -- for as many people as it could be doing well _for_ , and in as many _ways_ that matter.
* Personally, I'm not convinced trade deficits matter.
* _But productive capacity_ does -- or the lack thereof, especially for, e.g., battleships or pharmaceuticals.7
* So does inequality. **[The top 10% of Americans own 93% of the stock marke](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/793e2911-7443-4330-be40-86b910949463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[t. ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/793e2911-7443-4330-be40-86b910949463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[The bottom 50% of Americans own 1%.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/793e2911-7443-4330-be40-86b910949463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Those on the asset/equity stack have done very well since 1990. Those on the income/debt stack, which is most Americans, have not.8
* As with most things Trump-related, your attitude depends on how you felt about the status quo ante. If it was working for you, this week was horrible; if it wasn't working for you OR if you just have a high risk appetite + a strong conviction that current levels of _relative_ poverty in America are totally unsustainable, and will eventually cause violent revolution, as I do, this week was inevitable -- and interesting. Even if wild and crazy.

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/caa57c7d-630e-4bc1-928c-3b70bb6694ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Source_ : The New York Times, via CBO (data includes families' projected Social Security retirement and disability benefits).
* (2) It is an _**intuition**_. A common theme of Trump critics in engagement with Trump is that they keep demanding logic, reason, data, plans, and prognoses from a person who simply rejects those modes of cognition _per se_ -- that is, as a _class_.
* In Krugman's words, there is no "thinking" going on here.
* Sure. But that doesn't mean there is no _cognition_ or _intelligence_ going on. Not everyone can make their living thinking, as Paul does -- nor should they.
* As president, Trump has an obligation to provide **leadership** _**.**_ Leadership is mostly two things: **1\. decision-making/judgment** and **2\. communication**. He must decide. And he must communicate (verbally, visually, or otherwise). But he has no obligation to think, if that's not how he best _acts_.
* In fact, thinking doesn't always help you lead or take action.
* As Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes said about the left's favorite president, FDR, _" He has a second-rate intellect, but a first-rate temperament."_
* Intellect may, or may not, have anything to do with what we call _intelligence_. And it has nothing whatever to do with wisdom. Trump's actions may seem wise or unwise to voters. But either way, that's not for lack of _thinking_.

* * *
_**1/5 - UNCERTAINTY**_
* _**Policy uncertainty on tariffs is a feature - not a bug. But it's a double-edged sword.**_
* Unless courts or Congressional Republicans check him -- which seems, in the near term, unlikely -- President Trump wields unilateral and almost [plenary](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/254f8549-0fe7-44b1-a794-4767b90bac55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) authority to impose/remove/amend tariffs.
* As a consequence, understanding what might happen next on tariffs requires understanding _one man_ , at least to some very basic extent.
* Legacy media and the left sincerely hate the president, and disagree with him, but they've lost 2 of 3 elections because they basically don't _understand_ him.
* One of many reasons Democrats don't understand Trump is they expect him to engage in **deduction** and play **chess** ; instead, Trump embraces **induction** and plays **poker**.
* _**Deductive vs. inductive reasoning**_
* **deductive** thinkers crave general principles and apply them to particular situations to generate concrete conclusions/decisions (think Sherlock Holmes)
* **inductive** thinkers tackle particular situations in all their [contingency](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4184e761-55fe-4c19-99b0-9e869f2e7829?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and particularity, make a decision, then move on to the next situation; in doing so, they apply all their prior experience and apply [heuristics](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b1f8ba5c-9406-4c79-9324-e8eab3533098?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but don't engage in much, if any, _abstraction_ -- i.e., they don't require consistency, regularity, or feel a need to have conclusions/decisions fit a larger theory, and certainly not a 'unifying theory of everything' in the way more academic minds crave
* liberals, and especially elite liberals, tend to be deductive thinkers + demand top-down logic and deductive reasoning for things Trump decides based on bottoms-up/inductive gut checks, so they consistently fail to 'get' Trump
* because they don't get Trump -- i.e., they have a faulty mental model -- they cannot reliably predict what he will do next
* because they cannot reliably predict what he will do next, they cannot, like a good sports team would, 'gameplan' against him
* _**Poker vs. chess**_
* similarly, most establishment Republicans and most liberals, and especially elite liberals, approach life and politics as if it's a **chess** match: they think several moves ahead, game out possible moves and countermoves, calculate, plan, execute, then iterate/adapt. Chess is about knowledge, analysis, foresight, and control. It has a human element, but AI can _easily_ beat even the best human chess players because ultimately it's just calculation
* by contrast, Trump has always approached life and politics like **poker**. AI usually beats humans in poker, too, but it's much harder because of _asymmetric_ _information._ You can tell how well your opponent is doing in chess and they can't bullshit you about it: just look at the board. In poker, you may have no idea. And in multiplayer poker, this gets even more complex. Poker is about letting go of control and playing the odds. It's not just about calculation; it is about _betting._ 9
* **global trade negotiations are a game of multi-player poker that Democrats and the legacy media are trying to understand as chess**
* as a consequence, they have no chance of understanding what's happening: their mental model is all wrong
* they cannot predict what Trump will do next because _Trump_ can't predict what Trump will do next; he is playing poker, this hand, then the next hand, then the next, as it unfolds in real time before him -- not chess
* As a poker player on global trade, Trump has at least 3 distinct advantages vis-a-vis other nations:
* **(1) 'Big Stack Poker'**10
* A big stack is a player with a chip stack that is considerably larger than the standard starting stack, usually defined as 91 big blinds or more.11 With a big stack, _you can afford to play aggressively even with a weaker hand simply because you have more chips to cover potential losses._ It basically means you can push people around the table even if they have better cards.
* _See, e.g.,_ what happened Tues: British PM Keir Starmer, in an oversight hearing across the pond, said that the UK will _not_ be imposing retaliatory tariffs on the United States.12 A trade war hurts both the U.S. and the UK, but _it hurts the UK a lot more_ -- and at a time they can least afford it. The UK will eventually have to fold, so might it may as well fold right now. Many other countries have done/will do the same.
* The president famously told Zelensky "you don't have the cards." What he also could have said is "you don't have _the chips_."
* Trade wars hurt everyone _absolutely_ ; relatively, they hurt America the least -- we have the biggest stack.
* **(2) High risk/pain tolerance and political incentives**
* Trump has made crystal clear his sights are set on Mount Rushmore and winning a Nobel Peace Prize -- i.e., legacy -- not short-term electoral results.
* The president probably figures he's getting impeached by a Democratic House come Jan 2027 no matter what he does.13
* The president is probably right about that.
* As a consequence, his political incentives are _vastly_ different from Republicans in Congress, who must survive 2026 and 2028. Trump doesn't have unlimited tolerance for political pressure and financial pain, as we saw this week. Relative to past presidents, it is quite high.
* **(3) Capacity to bluff**
* Fareed Zakaria said in 2016 that the way Trump speaks does not quite make him a _liar_ ; instead, he is a 'bullshit artist.' A more neutral word for b.s. is bluffing.
* In global trade negotiations/geopolitics, that is an _asset._
* In capital markets, it is a _liability._
* _**The liability inherent in Trump 's approach is that markets abhor uncertainty, and even more seriously, uncertainty freezes major capital investment.**_
* Although a small percentage of Americans own significant stocks, those Americans tend to employ everyone else
* Small businesses, esp. those with complex supply chains, will be hit hard by tariffs and perhaps even more by tariff uncertainty
* It's not just net importers who will be stymied. Even a business owner considering re-shoring or investing domestically in manufacturing will rightly wonder whether tariffs/tariff exemptions, here today, might be gone tomorrow
* **The obvious doom loop is tariffs freeze investment = > freezes hiring / causes layoffs => freezes consumer spending => more layoffs, etc., etc. = recession**
* A recession may prove 'worth it' if it transitions us to a balanced economy and fair trade that works for more Americans, esp. the non-college educated
* But, by when? How? And at what cost -- as always, in any transition, the working poor will suffer most, and for an uncertain result

* * *
_**2/5 - AMBIGUITY**_
* **The political ambiguity is deliberate and strategic - not just "confusion."**
* There's a saying that "if you don't know where you're going, any road takes you there."
* The political corollary: if you don't yet know what success looks like, because this particular thing has never been attempted before, define success in a thousand different ways. This gives you maximum flexibility to eventually declare victory no matter what:
* Tariffs are necessary to generate tax revenue.
* Tariffs are necessary to rebalance current account deficits, which are bad.
* Tariffs are necessary to incentivize domestic productive capacity.
* Tariffs are necessary to renegotiate trade deals so we can have _fair_ trade.
* Tariffs are necessary to reduce reliance on foreign adversaries and enhance national security.
* Are these rationales somewhat mutually exclusive? Yeah, that's kind of the point. What the administration is trying to do, as far as I can tell, is set up a _bunch of_ different ways to win to maximize optionality -- no matter what.

* * *
_**3/5 - RISKS OF EXTREME PARTISANSHIP**_
* Extreme partisanship makes smart people dumb, kind people cruel, and otherwise effective people useless -- I have seen it firsthand, and it's getting worse daily.
* Applied to investing, partisanship is a recipe for major capital loss. Beware.
* It's best to wait before freaking out or celebrating. And while easier said than done, best not to pre-judge with partisan prejudice a set of empirical issues:
* A recession seems probable, given economic logic, but not yet certain.
* If tariffs and/or tariff uncertainty persist, we won't know whether we entered a recession for a couple of months, probably.
* If a recession happens, we won't know for a while how long or how severe.
* Even if severe, we won't know for years whether it will have been 'worth it.'
* If the pain proves worth it, or at least up for debate, we won't know for years what a new economic world order looks like -- even in a best case scenario.
* These are all very inconvenient truths if you want to play in the Team Red/Team Blue, or as I like to call it, Q-Anon vs. Blue Anon tournaments.

* * *
_**4/5 - DISCIPLINE(S)**_
* **By definition, you can 't have facts about the future. **So anyone who makes a prediction about something that hasn't happened yet and presents this as a 'fact' is a liar, and probably an undisciplined liar.
* _**History:**_**So is anyone presenting as fact what are more honestly** _**extrapolations based on the past.**_**Historians aren 't that useful here because tariffs have never been attempted under **_**these**_**geopolitical conditions.**
* The past is always a very imperfect guide, but it's especially imperfect here because of three novel variables:
**(1)** American hegemony
**(2)** China's challenge to it
**(3)** Trump
* Historians, by definition are experts about the past. And the past is relevant.
* But I am very skeptical whenever historians try to predict the future.
* _**Law:**_ The law may be against Trump here -- he went fast, but on shakier legal footing -- but that doesn't mean _the courts_ will be.
* Trump explicitly campaigned on tariffs, so they have democratic legitimacy, even if some (read: establishment R's) didn't take his promises seriously.
* SCOTUS, and especially the Chief Justice, is generally loathe to strike down signature policies for fear of appearing undemocratic (see, e.g., Obamacare).14
* _**Econ:**_**** Economists are right about tariffs' impacts on the economy, but they could be wrong again here for the same reason they're wrong about so many things: they make far too many value-based judgements/assumptions, and don't make those philosophical choices/assumptions explicit.
* Economics is a _model_ of reality. It is not reality. It's quite literally academic.
* It is nevertheless extremely useful.
* But I just recall the old joke: "economists have successfully predicted 9 out of the last 5 recessions." They almost always prove too much.15

* * *
_**5/5 - NEW WORLD ORDER**_
* **Trump 's trade policy is largely about **_**redistribution**_**; when he says "liberation" he means what Bernie Sanders calls "justice." What they both want is fairness. **
* **That is much easier stated than achieved, but** _**voters**_**in both parties -- contra **_**donors**_** -- have made clear they want someone to try.**
* Whatever happens next, Trump has changed the global economic order forever.
* _Best case scenario_ : no recession or a mild, short recession that transitions America into a more domestically capable, productive, and fair economy.
* _Worst case scenario_ : a prolonged, severe recession that torches the post-1991 global economic order and replaces it with an indefinite period of instability, global protectionism, and economic contraction for everyone. War with China.
* _[Modal](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/84ea0c9c-a531-499c-94ac-add43ea90a89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) outcome_: Trump continues to make credible threats, negotiates, makes deals, and, eventually, this also includes China. America rebalances somewhat. We get greater domestic productive capacity with automation leading the way. AI hits the global economy like a freight train. Lots of jobs displacement. Pretty much everyone has to reinvent their work and pursue new careers in a new economic order. Creative destruction.
* No matter what, American credibility for future _comprehensive_ trade deals is diminished, if not gone.
* _Ad hoc_ deals will now become the norm -- one bilateral transaction at a time. A few multilateral agreements, but, again, not nec. timeless or complete.
* Transactional relationships, rather than transformative leadership:
* Less idealism, more realism
* Fewer illusions/more honesty --
* America has always pursued self-interest, but tried to _appear_ generous and disinterested; for better and for worse, we are transparently self-interested now
* _Explicit_ international hierarchies - it's America and China at the top, everyone else basically told to live in the world we create/co-create
* Power vacuum that may not be filled by any one nation, because almost no one really trusts China, either. Regional blocs/alliances might flourish
* In sum, a multi-polar, transactional, ad hoc economic world order
* Less order, more **entropy** (a more neutral word for what media calls 'chaos')
* Challenges for all + opportunities for those who thrive in unstructured, uncertain arenas -- and can take action given very limited information
