clean_body: AP notes on tariffs - Sunday, Apr 13 2025 | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | | Apr 13 | | | | | | | | | | | | AP notes on tariffs - Sunday, Apr 13 2025 0/5 - BACKGROUND/MOTIVATIONS The general assumption on the left appears to be, a la Krugman, that Trump is a madman and one should not try to make sense of the madness.1 The right either wants to claim Wednesday's pause, pivot, and putative global alliance in an 'embargo' against China was, a la Secretary Bessent, the plan all along, or that Trump, after looking at bond markets and wisely changed the plan.2 Both of these are incorrect. The truth is that, whatever the outcome was and -- in 90 days, will be -- it is neither planned nor unplanned because President Trump has no plan. This is not necessarily a good or bad thing. Plans clarify values. Yet in a complex world, plans are almost always hubris: "man proposes, God disposes."3 Nowhere is this more true, perhaps, than when the plan, such as it is, isto reconfigure the entire global economic order since (at least) 1991. I actually think that is quite doable in one presidential term, though reasonable people will disagree about whether it is desirable. My personal view: Bill Clinton was dead right to get ahead of globalization in 1992 -- and lead it. Bernie/Trump are also dead right that this had disastrous consequences for the 2/3rds of Americans without a college degree; these voters form the Bernie/Trump populist base. Obama was wrong to dismiss 'Occupy Wall Street' populism and blindly ratify neoliberalism: 2008 was not 1992. Bill saw this.4 Hillary didn't.5 Vance/Bessent et al are dead right that overreliance on China terribly endangers our national security, as we learned during COVID. We therefore need a hard reset of the post-1991 global economic order. But whether a hard reset is wise or unwise, no one knows how to do it , because it has never been done before. Smoot-Hawley6 was pre-WWII; it is N/A If you 're trying to do something that's never been done before, it's tough to plan. Much better to (1) set intentions + (2) experiment + (3) improvise/iterate on the results. The president has an intuition that the American economy can be (possibility) in better shape than it is now. It is a contrarian intuition vis-a-vis college-educated white collar professionals, esp. Wall Street, and their financial dependents (spouses and children). That's why everyone on TV lit their hair on fire this week: why would you "crash" or "destroy" the economy (defined, at least in the very near term, as the stock market) for "no reason" ??? !!! Notice two things about this contrarian intuition : (1) It is contrarian. Most experts think the economy is doing well. Trump is arguing, no, it is not doing well -- or at least not as well as it could be doing -- for as many people as it could be doing well for , and in as many ways that matter. Personally, I'm not convinced trade deficits matter. But productive capacity does -- or the lack thereof, especially for, e.g., battleships or pharmaceuticals.7 So does inequality. Those on the asset/equity stack have done very well since 1990. Those on the income/debt stack, which is most Americans, have not.8 As with most things Trump-related, your attitude depends on how you felt about the status quo ante. If it was working for you, this week was horrible; if it wasn't working for you OR if you just have a high risk appetite + a strong conviction that current levels of relative poverty in America are totally unsustainable, and will eventually cause violent revolution, as I do, this week was inevitable -- and interesting. Even if wild and crazy. : The New York Times, via CBO (data includes families' projected Social Security retirement and disability benefits). (2) It is an intuition. A common theme of Trump critics in engagement with Trump is that they keep demanding logic, reason, data, plans, and prognoses from a person who simply rejects those modes of cognition per se -- that is, as a class. In Krugman's words, there is no "thinking" going on here. Sure. But that doesn't mean there is no cognition or intelligence going on. Not everyone can make their living thinking, as Paul does -- nor should they. As president, Trump has an obligation to provide leadership . Leadership is mostly two things: 1\. decision-making/judgment and 2\. communication. He must decide. And he must communicate (verbally, visually, or otherwise). But he has no obligation to think, if that's not how he best acts. In fact, thinking doesn't always help you lead or take action. As Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes said about the left's favorite president, FDR, " He has a second-rate intellect, but a first-rate temperament." Intellect may, or may not, have anything to do with what we call intelligence. And it has nothing whatever to do with wisdom. Trump's actions may seem wise or unwise to voters. But either way, that's not for lack of thinking. 1/5 - UNCERTAINTY Policy uncertainty on tariffs is a feature - not a bug. But it's a double-edged sword. Unless courts or Congressional Republicans check him -- which seems, in the near term, unlikely -- President Trump wields unilateral and almost authority to impose/remove/amend tariffs. As a consequence, understanding what might happen next on tariffs requires understanding one man , at least to some very basic extent. Legacy media and the left sincerely hate the president, and disagree with him, but they've lost 2 of 3 elections because they basically don't understand him. One of many reasons Democrats don't understand Trump is they expect him to engage in deduction and play chess ; instead, Trump embraces induction and plays poker. Deductive vs. inductive reasoning deductive thinkers crave general principles and apply them to particular situations to generate concrete conclusions/decisions (think Sherlock Holmes) inductive thinkers tackle particular situations in all their and particularity, make a decision, then move on to the next situation; in doing so, they apply all their prior experience and apply , but don't engage in much, if any, abstraction -- i.e., they don't require consistency, regularity, or feel a need to have conclusions/decisions fit a larger theory, and certainly not a 'unifying theory of everything' in the way more academic minds crave liberals, and especially elite liberals, tend to be deductive thinkers + demand top-down logic and deductive reasoning for things Trump decides based on bottoms-up/inductive gut checks, so they consistently fail to 'get' Trump because they don't get Trump -- i.e., they have a faulty mental model -- they cannot reliably predict what he will do next because they cannot reliably predict what he will do next, they cannot, like a good sports team would, 'gameplan' against him Poker vs. chess similarly, most establishment Republicans and most liberals, and especially elite liberals, approach life and politics as if it's a chess match: they think several moves ahead, game out possible moves and countermoves, calculate, plan, execute, then iterate/adapt. Chess is about knowledge, analysis, foresight, and control. It has a human element, but AI can easily beat even the best human chess players because ultimately it's just calculation by contrast, Trump has always approached life and politics like poker. AI usually beats humans in poker, too, but it's much harder because of asymmetric information. You can tell how well your opponent is doing in chess and they can't bullshit you about it: just look at the board. In poker, you may have no idea. And in multiplayer poker, this gets even more complex. Poker is about letting go of control and playing the odds. It's not just about calculation; it is about betting. 9 global trade negotiations are a game of multi-player poker that Democrats and the legacy media are trying to understand as chess as a consequence, they have no chance of understanding what's happening: their mental model is all wrong they cannot predict what Trump will do next because Trump can't predict what Trump will do next; he is playing poker, this hand, then the next hand, then the next, as it unfolds in real time before him -- not chess As a poker player on global trade, Trump has at least 3 distinct advantages vis-a-vis other nations: (1) 'Big Stack Poker'10 A big stack is a player with a chip stack that is considerably larger than the standard starting stack, usually defined as 91 big blinds or more.11 With a big stack, you can afford to play aggressively even with a weaker hand simply because you have more chips to cover potential losses. It basically means you can push people around the table even if they have better cards. See, e.g., what happened Tues: British PM Keir Starmer, in an oversight hearing across the pond, said that the UK will not be imposing retaliatory tariffs on the United States.12 A trade war hurts both the U.S. and the UK, but it hurts the UK a lot more -- and at a time they can least afford it. The UK will eventually have to fold, so might it may as well fold right now. Many other countries have done/will do the same. The president famously told Zelensky "you don't have the cards." What he also could have said is "you don't have the chips." Trade wars hurt everyone absolutely ; relatively, they hurt America the least -- we have the biggest stack. (2) High risk/pain tolerance and political incentives Trump has made crystal clear his sights are set on Mount Rushmore and winning a Nobel Peace Prize -- i.e., legacy -- not short-term electoral results. The president probably figures he's getting impeached by a Democratic House come Jan 2027 no matter what he does.13 The president is probably right about that. As a consequence, his political incentives are vastly different from Republicans in Congress, who must survive 2026 and 2028. Trump doesn't have unlimited tolerance for political pressure and financial pain, as we saw this week. Relative to past presidents, it is quite high. (3) Capacity to bluff Fareed Zakaria said in 2016 that the way Trump speaks does not quite make him a liar ; instead, he is a 'bullshit artist.' A more neutral word for b.s. is bluffing. In global trade negotiations/geopolitics, that is an asset. In capital markets, it is a liability. The liability inherent in Trump 's approach is that markets abhor uncertainty, and even more seriously, uncertainty freezes major capital investment. Although a small percentage of Americans own significant stocks, those Americans tend to employ everyone else Small businesses, esp. those with complex supply chains, will be hit hard by tariffs and perhaps even more by tariff uncertainty It's not just net importers who will be stymied. Even a business owner considering re-shoring or investing domestically in manufacturing will rightly wonder whether tariffs/tariff exemptions, here today, might be gone tomorrow The obvious doom loop is tariffs freeze investment = > freezes hiring / causes layoffs => freezes consumer spending => more layoffs, etc., etc. = recession A recession may prove 'worth it' if it transitions us to a balanced economy and fair trade that works for more Americans, esp. the non-college educated But, by when? How? And at what cost -- as always, in any transition, the working poor will suffer most, and for an uncertain result 2/5 - AMBIGUITY The political ambiguity is deliberate and strategic - not just "confusion." There's a saying that "if you don't know where you're going, any road takes you there." The political corollary: if you don't yet know what success looks like, because this particular thing has never been attempted before, define success in a thousand different ways. This gives you maximum flexibility to eventually declare victory no matter what: Tariffs are necessary to generate tax revenue. Tariffs are necessary to rebalance current account deficits, which are bad. Tariffs are necessary to incentivize domestic productive capacity. Tariffs are necessary to renegotiate trade deals so we can have fair trade. Tariffs are necessary to reduce reliance on foreign adversaries and enhance national security. Are these rationales somewhat mutually exclusive? Yeah, that's kind of the point. What the administration is trying to do, as far as I can tell, is set up a bunch of different ways to win to maximize optionality -- no matter what. 3/5 - RISKS OF EXTREME PARTISANSHIP Extreme partisanship makes smart people dumb, kind people cruel, and otherwise effective people useless -- I have seen it firsthand, and it's getting worse daily. Applied to investing, partisanship is a recipe for major capital loss. Beware. It's best to wait before freaking out or celebrating. And while easier said than done, best not to pre-judge with partisan prejudice a set of empirical issues: A recession seems probable, given economic logic, but not yet certain. If tariffs and/or tariff uncertainty persist, we won't know whether we entered a recession for a couple of months, probably. If a recession happens, we won't know for a while how long or how severe. Even if severe, we won't know for years whether it will have been 'worth it.' If the pain proves worth it, or at least up for debate, we won't know for years what a new economic world order looks like -- even in a best case scenario. These are all very inconvenient truths if you want to play in the Team Red/Team Blue, or as I like to call it, Q-Anon vs. Blue Anon tournaments. 4/5 - DISCIPLINE(S) By definition, you can 't have facts about the future. So anyone who makes a prediction about something that hasn't happened yet and presents this as a 'fact' is a liar, and probably an undisciplined liar. History:So is anyone presenting as fact what are more honestly extrapolations based on the past.Historians aren 't that useful here because tariffs have never been attempted under thesegeopolitical conditions. The past is always a very imperfect guide, but it's especially imperfect here because of three novel variables: (1) American hegemony (2) China's challenge to it (3) Trump Historians, by definition are experts about the past. And the past is relevant. But I am very skeptical whenever historians try to predict the future. Law: The law may be against Trump here -- he went fast, but on shakier legal footing -- but that doesn't mean the courts will be. Trump explicitly campaigned on tariffs, so they have democratic legitimacy, even if some (read: establishment R's) didn't take his promises seriously. SCOTUS, and especially the Chief Justice, is generally loathe to strike down signature policies for fear of appearing undemocratic (see, e.g., Obamacare).14 Econ:** Economists are right about tariffs' impacts on the economy, but they could be wrong again here for the same reason they're wrong about so many things: they make far too many value-based judgements/assumptions, and don't make those philosophical choices/assumptions explicit. Economics is a model of reality. It is not reality. It's quite literally academic. It is nevertheless extremely useful. But I just recall the old joke: "economists have successfully predicted 9 out of the last 5 recessions." They almost always prove too much.15 5/5 - NEW WORLD ORDER Trump 's trade policy is largely about redistribution; when he says "liberation" he means what Bernie Sanders calls "justice." What they both want is fairness. That is much easier stated than achieved, but votersin both parties -- contra donors -- have made clear they want someone to try. Whatever happens next, Trump has changed the global economic order forever. Best case scenario : no recession or a mild, short recession that transitions America into a more domestically capable, productive, and fair economy. Worst case scenario : a prolonged, severe recession that torches the post-1991 global economic order and replaces it with an indefinite period of instability, global protectionism, and economic contraction for everyone. War with China. outcome: Trump continues to make credible threats, negotiates, makes deals, and, eventually, this also includes China. America rebalances somewhat. We get greater domestic productive capacity with automation leading the way. AI hits the global economy like a freight train. Lots of jobs displacement. Pretty much everyone has to reinvent their work and pursue new careers in a new economic order. Creative destruction. No matter what, American credibility for future comprehensive trade deals is diminished, if not gone. Ad hoc deals will now become the norm -- one bilateral transaction at a time. A few multilateral agreements, but, again, not nec. timeless or complete. Transactional relationships, rather than transformative leadership: Less idealism, more realism Fewer illusions/more honesty -- America has always pursued self-interest, but tried to appear generous and disinterested; for better and for worse, we are transparently self-interested now Explicit international hierarchies - it's America and China at the top, everyone else basically told to live in the world we create/co-create Power vacuum that may not be filled by any one nation, because almost no one really trusts China, either. Regional blocs/alliances might flourish In sum, a multi-polar, transactional, ad hoc economic world order Less order, more entropy (a more neutral word for what media calls 'chaos') Challenges for all + opportunities for those who thrive in unstructured, uncertain arenas -- and can take action given very limited information 1 Paul Krugman , Apr 2, 2025; The Ezra Klein Show /New York Times , Apr 5, 2025. 2 Real Clear Politics (via YouTube), Apr 9, 2025. 3 Proverbs 19:21 (" Many are the plans in a person's heart, but it is the Lord's purpose that prevails"). 4 " Occupy Wall Street has done more in the short time they've been out there than I've been able to do in more than the last eleven years trying to draw attention to some of the same problems we have to address," in ,' Forbes , Dec. 6, 2011. 5 "My dream is a hemispheric common market, with open trade and open borders, some time in the future with energy that is as green and sustainable as we can get it, powering growth and opportunity for every person in the hemisphere," in ,' BBC News , (Oct. 8, 2016). 6 ' June 13, 1930 (U.S. Senate - Historical Highlights). 7 , Stephen Biddle and Eric Labs, Foreign Affairs , March 19, 2025; ' ING Global Markets Research , Feb. 24, 2025; ' Niels Graham, Atlantic Council , Apr 20, 2023. 8 New York Times, March 31, 2025. 9 , Annie Duke (Penguin: 2018). 10 Thanks to for introducing me to this concept. 11 Gemini; See also, ', Reddit - r/PokerTheory (2022). 12 BBC , (Apr 8, 2025). 13 He won't get convicted because the Senate will almost certainly stay Republican. 14 CNN , March 29, 2019. 15 Adapted from MIT Prof. Paul Samuelson's line, " the stock market has predicted nine out of the last five recessions." | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Aditya Pai 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Katie Porter
subject: Ring ring!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
donate any amount through this email and I might call to say thanks
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)
Hi, Derek. It’s Katie.
This week, I’m going to be calling grassroots supporters to thank them for chipping into my campaign. **[Donate any amount today for a chance to get a call from me!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250413_1_ak?refcode=em20250413-39636&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39636_3422442_DdsDDA&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)**
A lot of political candidates spend a lot of their time doing “call time,” in which they call corporations and ask for a big check.
I do a different kind of call time. Whether you chip in $5 or $5,000, you have just as much a stake in our democracy as anyone else, and you have just as much a chance of getting a call from me.
Talking directly with people and hearing their ideas for how we build a better future are some of my favorite parts of campaigning. So I’m excited for the chance to chat with you!
**[Make a contribution through this email, and I just might be calling you in the near future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250413_1_ak?refcode=em20250413-39636&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39636_3422442_DdsDDA&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250413_1_ak?refcode=em20250413-39636&refcode2=39636_3422442_DdsDDA&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)
Talk soon,
Katie
PS: Don’t forget to turn your ringer on!

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250413-39636&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39636_3422442_DdsDDA&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39636&t=4&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39636)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39636&t=5&akid=39636%2E3422442%2EDdsDDA)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 😠 Demonstrate Your Displeasure Loudly!
body:
Act swiftly to have MAXIMUM impact! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e2bd9e4e15&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3c0131326e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | ** **
**CALL TO

"DIGITAL ACTIVISM"!**
** **
**THE OHIO HOUSE PASSED A '26-'27 BUDGET WITH A $600M GIVEAWAY TO BILLIONAIRES, INCREASED SPENDING, NO HEALTH FREEDOM & NO ELECTION INTEGRITY!

ARE YOU ANGRY? TAKE IT OUT ON THEM DIGITALLY! YOU DON'T EVEN NEED TO LEAVE THE COUCH!**
\
---
| **UPDATE: Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, YET LEFT THE $600M GIVE-AWAY to the BILLIONAIRE Haslam family IN THE 26-'27 OHIO STATE BUDGET BILL (HB 96) now sent to the Ohio Senate for approval to be sent to the governor to make it LAW!**

It's time to **take** **massive action** , and GFI has implemented a "Digital Activism System" (aka "Digital Activism Platform") to make it **quick & easy** for you to make your displeasure known to every House Member who sold us out -- with the **push of a button** \-- **WITHOUT LEAVING THE HOUSE**!

**Here's a video explanation of the system:**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=657edc49bc&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
CLICK for a video explanation of GFI's new "Digital Activism System".
|
**NOW: Here's where YOU come in!**

Please go to [**THIS WEB PAGE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bc936f1ac8&e=5c740fa3e2) (or click on the image below) and follow the directions. It simple, easy, and quick ... a minute or two tops! We want to let our elected officials know we're not happy and we're no longer going to sit quietly in our dipleasure. It's time to **PROUDLY SPEAK UP & SPEAK OUT, DIGITALLY!

_Thank you!_**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0dcc01b655&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| | | ** **
**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=587a6d80ae&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fb3a513294&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=99337fb235&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=89feed572c&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b3181274b1&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=189140af0e&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=263ff3dc78&e=5c740fa3e2)

You May Find Valuable**

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c5f996a50e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c5f996a50e).

WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT! | <We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it! > This issue is beatable! 1) Turnout for the May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes. 2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential. 3) FIRST , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, A VERY REASONABLE thing to do. 4) SECOND , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections and get them to vote , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also A VERY REASONABLE thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county. 5) WHEN we do this, WE WIN! The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, AVERY REASONABLE objective! WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN! Over the next week, PLEASE : Make 10 social media posts on the issue Send texts about the issue to 10 people Send emails about the issue to another (different) 10 people Make calls about the issue to 10 more (different) people Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go to vote with you Persuade 10 people not previously contacted to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help **Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people. If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this stealthy, unnecessary, costly , $2.5B bond issue! LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN! We made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH! HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP! 1) PLEASE forward this message to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! 2) PLEASE download (same as below) to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! NEW >>>> 3)** PLEASE refer as many people as you can to the new Issue 2! (Click the image above to download!) BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can! Thank you! EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue" | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._

subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CSyGgvSYd8qfP9XMggwVHOI4cR2fG9LMPqVGSfteanSipGATg6b_YLTm9XaQPy6KLTbfVXKT0xChmBYJf1wX8cWMIfjt6SOuZtZzn0UpkpQpNcwP8ejvz7Pd-bHO33n2WtTpOKvM5Y12ONz6YbFNQX7g%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CSwpf9ioOWSGbzR5CbK4hFifD2gapDEOeIyYt60KLCsRjPeiwgvVfEcmFcdz0Og8YKnDjE2clHUVJsTV7UAiGltxoFLPO7FntSvDQGSBiYJxblvhnIm1OEavXdDgMooiF1F00dQxohzeIvYKrES8Y3SA%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CSQWpJ_5kflB8TA5ylbcEC-2sO_yOp2zPbytwZqSrzcS9v_PxJnJAULmYjoq1MfLzsd-1jJiykkdd9oU-Ntp7jG6aEEpa47hwshrzxZXlaglePEmnB9q84OamYZoByOXj_-YNlF9ycViAz2HzTPyuKuA%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CS0nl2ZBiP6Fld0f6M2SGyDIyKAIhywcq5KB-aIvX3YqAlj54fSQ6HX1FoiU9PlqdMcgfUEVa3LwKWI-6sILysaNRhxxuT5eK-WbkijzfdyWKtV5GYVmiJiOedWQBUWB6jPsa2Mpx4UCDZhfPn15I4rw%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CSPd_RMnF6SsBwtXJ5WkYH17Cf4cM_4-f3kT9hv0jxW1AwgSm9fV6U67fMOsBZfd-JxpnCtJ1Lxa2gF-5kOVYL8owhK0WY8AfMZhC7XL23_YV2ewZYI6-QuZhRO6B8a3QGFuPhHxgHOyUrlZRJe8Mmmg%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CS23FmR-JoJKsxWgOx30UCT1fyFBzM2Ba9pAYac0YDajxc_rlq_mXNumzon4m03_zMIlvpI0csaOne46kdA_6c97OZPsmqK2WVMdsg5nFzgMqeDrUB0A1s2GKHCzvPDpN__DcVnE4pQVhcU3-nz7cvgw%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbicdKR7G2Y82drQ_jm3PPTkjd2VYJehGcuR7uzCctKrUAE_evv07d_yOqnwTGpvaWutn0fBmHydtS60yHaHCZO-pta0bJ9atNmUV10Vc3Ho6RKJmHACKRaO44mY4MMoGhCimSn-e68GramRg52e8WoF2atfbcn1RSwjCJo6uYbMjHmwRYOTurJjgaC1vD-Zag3UQF5AAYD5UUQ1AdvCcu8CSoRaSwt4QRCqJghsL6it_vT8KbMPepE960eMS5LPk3WoM5RnbcG2PrSyxZLy0-rbbAAkpxiZHyfmLEk6ZRQBbXHEJmvOrrHEXzkm6U_Hc79zvuWqNWozxrlBGuIDUntq5-OUKxajpojTb-w7tyF627g%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbift96nGWD_8i0FB0w4e1RNSVeeg_bKRRXgOWP8LW6D03VJRBajVv7gvRM-RVK61t3VxM92ljYOQbq_3p3KY9Z5kgIEmTWlWZAHjpSNG4xUnp77RcEubJ0CJ0v_N40lUxJNZvcVlpZuczg7v9VVBFr2ko89naxKJ0lGNjVBU9TZtn8IuS8Rpx1bF5sPrpPq7FmH4wyPKhsvyAFcI6qPvVKZTsJ0xe3tlXtfbffDDRy6AaNH0guG_iTXj5irUO1U3vpliYMfS-Day40k3hMdrzSMbP5CC0ITvl3O-B9H7KEbracQ9FC2iiuircWRd-u4VP540CDT7mYicij_rcYf4-AQORxFd4JX7EoTlcrAaJKZQBRuRF9dXqs7in5FUPd7Of58%3D "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=00d6fe57a6924d249a33f6c05e3fe854&_e=6BqAQR4966BrRgH_nxwQa76Yanuh2TGA--pBvfHDbift96nGWD_8i0FB0w4e1RNSVeeg_bKRRXgOWP8LW6D03VJRBajVv7gvRM-RVK61t3VxM92ljYOQbq_3p3KY9Z5kgIEmTWlWZAHjpSNG4xUnp77RcEubJ0CJ0v_N40lUxJNZvcVlpZuczg7v9VVBFr2ko89naxKJ0lGNjVBU9TZtn8IuS8Rpx1bF5sPrpPq7FmH4wyPKhsvyAFcI6qPvVKZT2KhBeWLwjWyy85pQ5naFY0xgvXpm6ZnkGoxu1Q6bcoGfQ9rLC-O7FscH-S-B4qFC1F76IgAr3syfnsSf4b317dF9l7wEbFPF8-ksOvm_pYSpUT0im5kTRirFVQ2Loa0O4bAyjAhfYM2YfmLYmHBqjetwYOkH1Lur8flq-k5a8TI%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: You can count on me to fight until the job is done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Donald Trump and Elon Musk are posing a grave threat to our freedoms, our livelihoods, and the rule of law

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105770271/539331217/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM0NWNlZS05MjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFvNmdFy_p6k4MFymPX0SrgMhSBqYOG3nRgPQidME8M=) In 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that had elected just one Democrat in the last 50 years. I had never held elected office before, but after witnessing Donald Trump’s attempts to rip away affordable health care, give massive tax handouts to billionaires, and ignore the rule of law, I knew I had to take action. National pundits thought I wouldn’t stand a chance. They believed there was no way a state like Kansas would ever vote for an LGBTQ+ Native American woman who was raised by a single Army mom and worked multiple jobs to pay her own way through school. **But that November, we flipped this seat and proved the pundits wrong.** I’m proud we won that race. But most of all, I’m proud of what we’ve been able to do for the people of Kansas because of that victory. Together, we’ve brought thousands of good-paying jobs to KS-03, enacted the most significant gun safety law in a generation, passed bipartisan legislation protecting same-sex marriage rights, and so much more. But I also understand that the work is very much unfinished — and that the progress we worked so hard for has never been at greater risk. Today, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are posing a grave threat to our freedoms, our livelihoods, and the rule of law. And National Republicans are going along with it. They’re working to pass every single part of Trump’s Project 2025 agenda, like slashing Medicaid and abolishing the Department of Education. Make no mistake: These extreme politicians know what they’re doing is unpopular. They know that their actions will have devastating impacts on families and communities across the nation. **They just don’t care — and that’s why I’m fighting back.** In Congress, I’m using every tool at my disposal to push back against their attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, abortion rights, public education, SNAP benefits, and more. And while I can’t promise that I’ll be able to stop every part of the National Republican agenda on my own, **I _can_ promise to vote NO on every piece of legislation that hurts Kansas families and never compromise on my values.** No matter what lies ahead in the future, you can count on me to stand up, speak out, and fight like hell on behalf of Kansas families — because that’s the kind of leadership our state desperately needs right now. [_**Finally, if you believe Kansas deserves a voice like mine in Congress, I’d be deeply grateful to have your support. We’ve accomplished so much together over the years, but if we want to win the biggest fights that lie ahead of us, I need this entire team behind me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105770272/539331218/213558093?refcode=email_041225_Bio&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM0NWNlZS05MjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFvNmdFy_p6k4MFymPX0SrgMhSBqYOG3nRgPQidME8M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105770273/539331219/213558093?refcode=email_041225_Bio&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM0NWNlZS05MjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFvNmdFy_p6k4MFymPX0SrgMhSBqYOG3nRgPQidME8M=)

clean_body: Donald Trump and Elon Musk are posing a grave threat to our freedoms, our livelihoods, and the rule of law = In 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that had elected just one Democrat in the last 50 years. I had never held elected office before, but after witnessing Donald Trump’s attempts to rip away affordable health care, give massive tax handouts to billionaires, and ignore the rule of law, I knew I had to take action. National pundits thought I wouldn’t stand a chance. They believed there was no way a state like Kansas would ever vote for an LGBTQ+ Native American woman who was raised by a single Army mom and worked multiple jobs to pay her own way through school. But that November, we flipped this seat and proved the pundits wrong. I’m proud we won that race. But most of all, I’m proud of what we’ve been able to do for the people of Kansas because of that victory. Together, we’ve brought thousands of good-paying jobs to KS-03, enacted the most significant gun safety law in a generation, passed bipartisan legislation protecting same-sex marriage rights, and so much more. But I also understand that the work is very much unfinished — and that the progress we worked so hard for has never been at greater risk. Today, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are posing a grave threat to our freedoms, our livelihoods, and the rule of law. And National Republicans are going along with it. They’re working to pass every single part of Trump’s Project 2025 agenda, like slashing Medicaid and abolishing the Department of Education. Make no mistake: These extreme politicians know what they’re doing is unpopular. They know that their actions will have devastating impacts on families and communities across the nation. They just don’t care — and that’s why I’m fighting back. In Congress, I’m using every tool at my disposal to push back against their attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, abortion rights, public education, SNAP benefits, and more. And while I can’t promise that I’ll be able to stop every part of the National Republican agenda on my own, I can promise to vote NO on every piece of legislation that hurts Kansas families and never compromise on my values. No matter what lies ahead in the future, you can count on me to stand up, speak out, and fight like hell on behalf of Kansas families — because that’s the kind of leadership our state desperately needs right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: We’re taking this fight to all 50 states

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250413_v&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Bernie and AOC will. Not. Stop. And neither will we.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24947?source=email-20250413&t=1061&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]Bernie Sanders Tweet announcing that he and AOC will be in Utah, Idaho,
and Montana next week, fighting to build a nation justice, dignity, and
human rights for all.'

Every single day we see Trump’s authoritarianism reach new heights. The
stakes couldn't be higher – so Bernie and AOC are BACK out on tour to
activate and inspire the grassroots to stand up and fight.

The energy is electric. But this isn't just a series of speeches. It's a
call to action to millions across the nation – and Our Revolution is
standing shoulder to shoulder with Bernie and AOC to mobilize our
movement. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250413nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]Our Revolution is working to ensure Bernie and AOC’s powerful message
reaches far beyond the cities they visit and reverberates to every corner
of our country, mobilizing people into ACTION to become the grassroots
army we need to take down Trump. Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever
you're able to help us fuel this movement?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump’s goal is to overwhelm us. With one terrifying headline hitting
after the next, it’s easy to become paralyzed. But AOC has some words of
wisdom:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24947?source=email-20250413&t=1060&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]AOC tweet: We will not be distracted. We will not be discouraged. We've
got our eyes on the prize. And we will build the prosperous, free nation
for all that we deserve. The time to organize is now.

Bernie and AOC added more stops to their tour to light a spark across the
country and bring more and more people into this fight. And once folks are
inspired to JOIN the fight, we need to keep our eyes on the prize and
MOBILIZE them to action.

Tens of thousands have joined our Citizen Action Team to stand up to Trump
and the oligarchs and it’s growing by the day. But we’re just getting
started.

We can’t do it without you. Your donation today – no matter the size –
will send a powerful message that the fight against oligarchy isn't just
happening in Washington or Wall Street, but in every city and town across
America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250413nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8185%2E5885482%2EdDHrAn ]Can you rush a donation to help Our Revolution take Bernie and AOC’s
message to every single state across the country? This is a people-powered
movement so every dollar raised makes a crucial impact.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Although it may not seem urgent to you now, the 2026 midterm elections will come a lot sooner than you think - and the midterms are always the toughest for the party IN power. I'm working with NRSC Chairman Tim Scott to rally supporters RIGHT NOW to guarantee that we will come out on top - with our Senate Republicans at the helm ready to push forward the MAGA agenda! But we desperately need to know if you are come the midterms! We can't let the Radical Left catch us slipping. Although things are looking like they are in our favor, this does NOT guarantee us a win in 2026. The tides can still turn, especially in states with open seats! name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Save Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
We cannot let people be fooled or confused at what’s going on here. | | | Hey friend, Senate Republicans want to pass the largest budget cut to Medicaid in history, nearly $1 trillion, to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. We cannot let people be fooled or confused about what’s going on here. The proposed cuts right now would devastate nearly 800,000 Nevadans. That includes 1 in 6 adults and 3 in 8 children in Nevada who depend on Medicaid. Even Nevadans who are not directly on Medicaid would be impacted by having fewer providers available in state. Hospitals, health clinics, and nursing homes will all be compromised without Medicaid funding. Donald Trump promised to lower costs on “day one.” He lied. That’s not his priority. Trump and Republicans are coming after your health care and your retirement to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. **[_NV Dems is fighting back where we can at every level of government to save Nevada families. clean_body: We cannot let people be fooled or confused at what’s going on here. | | | Hey friend, Senate Republicans want to pass the largest budget cut to Medicaid in history, nearly $1 trillion, to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. We cannot let people be fooled or confused about what’s going on here. The proposed cuts right now would devastate nearly 800,000 Nevadans. That includes 1 in 6 adults and 3 in 8 children in Nevada who depend on Medicaid. Even Nevadans who are not directly on Medicaid would be impacted by having fewer providers available in state. Hospitals, health clinics, and nursing homes will all be compromised without Medicaid funding. Donald Trump promised to lower costs on “day one.” He lied. That’s not his priority. Trump and Republicans are coming after your health care and your retirement to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! — Catherine The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Maxwell Frost
subject: I went to Coachella—but not for the music.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/31GtrDvtSpS027Z9HEyjcQ~~/AAPPABA~/_Nq673XOZzkX3jSRo6b2i-NwuOOfvxerzMhsrirvCNfjf0doz65yPrjKG_bQMaLWGe6NZK_Bo6ySVp254XH7Rk53tkUVfBSWN-rkzaalc5zliPNSeK-E5fqnT7nFozwv0JWGYiDQ_iSbsnld7L2oX6YvbIPgMuZ-7hMb-P51gPy_ME9f3P6GQSh6wG-C7nwFT7XNP1bPN1TkOSvtp5mjVwmSch9tdXggpa8qDQgFdD_xRx8OpgEFftebulFNixv4h3w_Demc2O7acZ2-DcXUk2rCooCkIRdEzg35szSZxzWWHuuZF4fAvnRv--OLhe_EQ_MZyX8aQsh8MWa87mioYRTifol1aHfyRMExjmhaq0Q~)
---
| Peter, on Friday, I took the stage at Coachella. [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/31GtrDvtSpS027Z9HEyjcQ~~/AAPPABA~/_Nq673XOZzkX3jSRo6b2i-NwuOOfvxerzMhsrirvCNfjf0doz65yPrjKG_bQMaLWGe6NZK_Bo6ySVp254XH7Rk53tkUVfBSWN-rkzaalc5zliPNSeK-E5fqnT7nFozwv0JWGYiDQ_iSbsnld7L2oX6YvbIPgMuZ-7hMb-P51gPy_ME9f3P6GQSh6wG-C7nwFT7XNP1bPN1TkOSvtp5mjVwmSch9tdXggpa8qDQgFdD_xRx8OpgEFftebulFNixv4h3w_Demc2O7acZ2-DcXUk2rCooCkIRdEzg35szSZxzWWHuuZF4fAvnRv--OLhe_EQ_MZyX8aQsh8MWa87mioYRTifol1aHfyRMExjmhaq0Q~) I’m a drummer and a musician so you _might_ be thinking I finally got my big musical break... but I was there for something more important than a headliner: **I was there to talk about grassroots organizing, shine light on the dangers of far-right fascism, and empower young people to harness their power in politics.** As the first (and still only!) Gen Z member of Congress, I know that the same old organizing tactics won’t deliver a new generation of voters and politically engaged youth. If we want to reach young people and get them involved before the far right does, we need to get creative – and that’s exactly what I’m doing. But Peter, meeting young people where they are is expensive. That’s why the far right, funded by billionaire megadonors, has been so successful at it. While I don’t have billionaire megadonors, I DO have people like you, who chip in what they can when they can because they know how important it is to build youth power. And that kind of momentum-building has never been more important. [**_So please, chip in just $15 (the price of a lemonade here at Coachella!) or whatever you can afford right now so we can catch up to the far right’s efforts and meet young people where they _are_ , not just where it's _convenient_. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/dd4jTJXWjWTFaOHCu9Ypbw~~/AAPPABA~/_Nq673XOZzkX3jSRo6b2i-NwuOOfvxerzMhsrirvCNfjf0doz65yPrjKG_bQMaLWGe6NZK_Bo6ySVp254XH7Rk53tkUVfBSWN-rkzaalc5zliPNSeK-E5fqnT7nFozwvbe2XC04DmrnrKjsVxQr8kb_AcsaroLRzNDvEZyD1BdRqGqNJZ4KIJ-bHznJdGhi5hSyU6yiC9elqWxzC1TPw52u-X7tBC5ANJd62ILJ0ubLuCrJw2OXLPW3BOCnsHLN9hWUtOWuW9pIPlWNuB5VzDSHfiR5YIiw_vX0gkkm3JMWJEc11qxAZ1e64P7ZTb9DzjHPMu361-1iGflbWzSI3SSdMAwx_L2sn4thYnfbsSLc~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/V3HHOOUr6mLZZ7_mj31EXg~~/AAPPABA~/jfbFOwXUEWa1T-KF75Qz0MOoPsp8jdCQ6XDQnezTCjXY5zj8mULfLCkR3OxNTlAOTGwpPmUl1rXE8FDNp00pBEzZIr1d3B028qy_K0i9VdyoaEHyibFcNfzg4wnuv84ZEtQs2M5Tth12PNcBK_kfc_lDCfVmc9IYCPk1wQqAM4YO12cvTjVGYNN-9YxI0cDRkN-S39fxzuBzZjdhNAHowr0AkHP9MooujssKUkTsGcDIwd2qMbnTySAZwhqqG943XH-HeBW0_8FMd56EduAhpFm1xR8aRQdpjDAqFZKAbtdATjFXdcjzmfGAjcVykXOpxnnInK6MlYgPmZlUauBGWgi7BSeOoX_Qy-fxTPsX4eB4j1nYOJz0-Rya2zbCNxAb)

clean_body: | ~ | Peter, on Friday, I took the stage at Coachella. ~ I’m a drummer and a musician so you might be thinking I finally got my big musical break... but I was there for something more important than a headliner: I was there to talk about grassroots organizing, shine light on the dangers of far-right fascism, and empower young people to harness their power in politics. As the first (and still only!) Gen Z member of Congress, I know that the same old organizing tactics won’t deliver a new generation of voters and politically engaged youth. If we want to reach young people and get them involved before the far right does, we need to get creative – and that’s exactly what I’m doing. But Peter, meeting young people where they are is expensive. That’s why the far right, funded by billionaire megadonors, has been so successful at it. While I don’t have billionaire megadonors, I DO have people like you, who chip in what they can when they can because they know how important it is to build youth power. And that kind of momentum-building has never been more important. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Together we can make this happen, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. | Peter,

I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll try to keep this quick.

Already, thousands of Virginians have rallied behind our message: protecting our rights, lowering costs, improving our schools, and keeping our communities safe. But with just months to go until November, we need your help more than ever.

National experts like _Cook Political Report_ have named our race a total toss-up, and we can expect Republican PACS to pour millions into Virginia to try to sway the outcome.

That’s why your support is crucial. Every dollar you contribute will help us band together against the flood of outside money and continue spreading our message of progress and opportunity for all Virginians.

[_**But we can’t do it without you! Will you contribute to my campaign today to make sure we have what it takes to flip this seat and keep Virginia moving forward?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105771228/539334208/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODE5YmRjOTgtOTcxOC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0JbFg80eBd0eOFsokZg0yv55kOmsNndzM-1L06EhVRU=)

clean_body: National experts like Cook Political Report have named our race a total toss-up, and we can expect Republican PACS to pour millions into Virginia to try to sway the outcome. | = | Peter, I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll try to keep this quick. Already, thousands of Virginians have rallied behind our message: protecting our rights, lowering costs, improving our schools, and keeping our communities safe. But with just months to go until November, we need your help more than ever. National experts like Cook Political Report have named our race a total toss-up, and we can expect Republican PACS to pour millions into Virginia to try to sway the outcome. That’s why your support is crucial. Every dollar you contribute will help us band together against the flood of outside money and continue spreading our message of progress and opportunity for all Virginians. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Make no mistake: This decision is exactly what Big Oil and polluters wanted. **THEN:** Trump’s EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, announced plans to slash two-thirds of the agency’s budget, essentially crippling the EPA’s ability to monitor pollution and hold corporate polluters accountable. **AND NOW:** RFK Jr. is attempting to roll back fluoride in public drinking water, despite _overwhelming_ evidence that fluoridated water boosts dental health and prevents cavities. So yes. They’re coming for our water. They’re chipping away at public health and science — piece by piece. And they’re doing it to keep big polluters happy and corporate money flowing. **This is where YOU come in: The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is building a wall of resistance — one climate champion, one election at a time. But the only way we can fight back against Trump and his extremist bandwagon is through supporters like you chipping in what you can, when you can.** **[Can we count on you to donate a few bucks today? name: Wiley (personal)
subject: Reflections on this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Hi Peter, it’s Wiley. I wanted to share a few thoughts from the first couple of days of this campaign to flip NC’s U.S. Senate seat. Since we kicked off this campaign just a few days ago, I’ve been blown away by the support. People from across the state have reached out to offer their words of encouragement, their grassroots contributions, and their kindness. From all parties too — Democrat, Republican, and Independent. The message I keep hearing is that people are _tired_ of politics, _tired_ of the same old broken system, _tired_ of turning on the news and hearing awful stories about costs going up, small businesses shutting down, and families struggling to make ends meet. **I get it, Peter.** Some of the problems our state and country are facing feel so insurmountable that you can’t help but want to throw in the towel. But we can’t. We have to stay motivated. Because change _is possible._ We _can make a difference._ I know it, I feel it in my bones. Because as I meet North Carolinians, from the mountains to the beaches and everywhere in between, I meet people who love this state and want to see it reach its full potential. My goal over the course of this campaign will be to reach voters across the state and convince them that we can make a difference. Now isn’t the time to tune out of politics — we need to tune in and get involved. _**That’s how we win.**_ **[**As I reflect on this first week of my Senate campaign, I hope you will consider pitching in to help achieve our shared vision for North Carolina’s future. clean_body: | Hi Peter, it’s Wiley. I wanted to share a few thoughts from the first couple of days of this campaign to flip NC’s U.S. Senate seat. Since we kicked off this campaign just a few days ago, I’ve been blown away by the support. People from across the state have reached out to offer their words of encouragement, their grassroots contributions, and their kindness. From all parties too — Democrat, Republican, and Independent. The message I keep hearing is that people are tired of politics, tired of the same old broken system, tired of turning on the news and hearing awful stories about costs going up, small businesses shutting down, and families struggling to make ends meet. I get it, Peter. Some of the problems our state and country are facing feel so insurmountable that you can’t help but want to throw in the towel. But we can’t. We have to stay motivated. Because change is possible. We can make a difference. I know it, I feel it in my bones. Because as I meet North Carolinians, from the mountains to the beaches and everywhere in between, I meet people who love this state and want to see it reach its full potential. My goal over the course of this campaign will be to reach voters across the state and convince them that we can make a difference. Now isn’t the time to tune out of politics — we need to tune in and get involved. That’s how we win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for paying attention and being a part of this campaign. I’m so inspired by your commitment to our state — and I’m fired up about what’s ahead. All my best, Wiley = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: Shontel Brown
subject: OH HELL NO to dismantling the Post Office.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We are saying “hell no” to stripping away independence from the United States Postal Service.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105771593/539335659/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250410usps_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TestA_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJhNTc4My05OTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yZwzWAX8H_28kg3KpLWgJqtD3HlqjvH_vNmddXkDE8=) Peter,

As the Trump administration works to slash critical agencies and programs, cut millions of jobs, and undo decades of progress, I am taking a stand to fight back. This includes saying “hell no” to stripping away independence from the United States Postal Service.

**Recently, I was proud to stand alongside our local Letter Carriers and North Shore AFL-CIO and make our voices heard against Trump’s takeover.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105771594/539335660/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250410usps_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TestA_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJhNTc4My05OTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yZwzWAX8H_28kg3KpLWgJqtD3HlqjvH_vNmddXkDE8=) **Trump wants to grab control of the Postal Service and sell it off for parts, disrupting vital mail service.** In another money grab for billionaires, he wants to privatize USPS, which could make it more expensive for consumers and would put _even more_ jobs in danger.

[**We have had enough of this maniac from Mar-A-Lago working in the interest of the mega-wealthy and massive corporations over the American people. CHRIST IS LORD.

_DO YOU AGREE?_
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250408-flex7203-w-eml-christ-is-lord?utm_campaign=028000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837323033&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

It’s Nancy Mace.

AND TODAY, I’M THANKING JESUS — not just for another day, but for
the fire in my soul to keep going.

_“No weapon forged against you will prevail...” – Isaiah 54:17_

_PATRIOT, LET ME TELL YOU WHERE I COME FROM:_

BEFORE CONGRESS, I WAS A WAFFLE HOUSE WAITRESS. HUSTLING TO SURVIVE.

I wasn’t born with a silver spoon.

But by the grace of God, I BECAME THE FIRST REPUBLICAN WOMAN EVER
ELECTED TO CONGRESS from South Carolina.

NOW I’M USING THAT SEAT TO CALL OUT THE INSANITY:
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250408-flex7203-w-eml-christ-is-lord?utm_campaign=028000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837323033&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

👉 There are TWO genders.

👉 Women are being erased by the woke Left.

👉 And Christians are under attack from every angle.

FOR TELLING THE TRUTH, I’VE RECEIVED DEATH THREATS.

I’ve been smeared by the media. Mocked by Hollywood. Targeted by
extremists.

But I will NEVER bow. Not to the mob. Not to the lies. Not to the
Left.

I’M STANDING MY GROUND — BECAUSE I BELIEVE WE ARE HERE FOR A TIME
SUCH AS THIS.

But I can’t do it alone.

IF YOU’RE A PROUD CHRISTIAN WHO’S SICK OF THE ATTACKS ON FAITH,
FREEDOM, AND BASIC BIOLOGY — _I’M ASKING YOU TO STAND WITH ME._

The Left is trying to erase Christ from every part of American life.

Not on my watch.

THIS IS YOUR REMINDER:

CHRIST IS LORD.

I NEED YOU, PATRIOT, TO HELP ME DEFEND THAT TRUTH IN CONGRESS.
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250408-flex7203-w-eml-christ-is-lord?utm_campaign=028000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837323033&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Can I count on you to chip in today?_

🙏 And please, say a prayer for America. We need it now more than
ever.

body:
The Trump administration's HHS is attacking reproductive health care. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105772076/539337283/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE429_20250413_RFKLiesRS_PL&sourceid=1055947&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDJhNTc4My05OTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fJdX5eEU_wg8p9RFhORl5LT87RtQ9cJ9SfEOkJ3PDg=) Peter — Trump's Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), led by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., announced that it will temporarily withhold millions of dollars of grants through Title X, the federal program that supports family planning services for low-income people. _This decision will undercut access to basic reproductive health care for Americans across the country._

**Make no mistake: this is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. carrying out Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda.** During his Senate confirmation hearing, Kennedy said, "I'm going to support President Trump's policies ... he wants to end federal funding of abortions."

[**Before we set the record straight, will you chip in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will be on the frontlines of the fight against the Trump administration and its dangerous policies?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105772077/539337284/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE429_20250413_RFKLiesRS_PL&sourceid=1055947&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDJhNTc4My05OTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fJdX5eEU_wg8p9RFhORl5LT87RtQ9cJ9SfEOkJ3PDg=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105772078/539337285/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE429_20250413_RFKLiesRS_PL&sourceid=1055947&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDJhNTc4My05OTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fJdX5eEU_wg8p9RFhORl5LT87RtQ9cJ9SfEOkJ3PDg=)
---
Peter, the anti-choice agenda isn't just about abortion bans. Sometimes it looks like **gutting funding for reproductive care** for the communities that need it most.

Here's the real-life impact of RFK Jr.'s funding cuts:
* 870 health facilities across 22 states could lose funding
* 846,000 patients could be left without care
* The hardest-hit states are already some of the poorest and most medically underserved in the country

For Trump and RFK Jr., this isn't about "putting America first." It's about putting reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy last. It's about leaving the poorest, most vulnerable Americans without options. And there's nothing more un-American than that.

clean_body: The Trump administration's HHS is attacking reproductive health care. | = Peter — Trump's Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), led by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., announced that it will temporarily withhold millions of dollars of grants through Title X, the federal program that supports family planning services for low-income people. This decision will undercut access to basic reproductive health care for Americans across the country. Make no mistake: this is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. carrying out Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda. During his Senate confirmation hearing, Kennedy said, "I'm going to support President Trump's policies ... he wants to end federal funding of abortions." = | = Peter, the anti-choice agenda isn't just about abortion bans. Sometimes it looks like gutting funding for reproductive care for the communities that need it most. Here's the real-life impact of RFK Jr.'s funding cuts: 870 health facilities across 22 states could lose funding 846,000 patients could be left without care * The hardest-hit states are already some of the poorest and most medically underserved in the country For Trump and RFK Jr., this isn't about "putting America first." It's about putting reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy last. It's about leaving the poorest, most vulnerable Americans without options. And there's nothing more un-American than that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking a stand. \- EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. At this point, I think it’s safe to say that I live in MAGA world’s head **RENT FREE.**
And in this economy, that’s saying something 😂
**It’s sad that Donald Trump — the President of the United States — is spending his time attacking me and picking petty fights instead of working to improve the lives of the American people.**
And it’s even sadder that his allies in Congress are more focused on scaring me into silence than holding Trump accountable, defending our democracy, and saving our country from a needless recession.
That’s why I’m working overtime to end their grip on power and put Democrats back in control — but I need you with me now more than ever.
[Please, while MAGA Republicans attack me and try to silence me, let’s show them that this movement is more powerful than they’ll ever be. Send Donald Trump a message that his bullying doesn’t scare us by chipping in any amount right away. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105772242/539337884/2041312630?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_041325_Crockett-Split_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDczMmQxYS05YjE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqO7HUpSuvIuK6WbkQAKl_Llli-Y0HPknDcj-ErU5I8=)

name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: What is Dark Money and why is it bad for Democracy?
body:
We'll break it down for you.

| |
---
Team, You probably have heard the term "dark money" thrown out quite a bit, even from us. Dark money is when shady organizations pop up to spend money in a race with very little transparency about where the money is coming from. Often, these groups are out-of-state and are able to spend large sums of money for or against someone. They are usually funded by just a handful of wealthy individuals, or even just one lone donor. In our case, Republican dark money groups are expected to spend millions of dollars to unseat Congresswoman Nellie Pou. The reason for this is that Nellie is a top target for them. They'll stop at nothing to try to defeat her and grow their House majority. We cannot let dark money groups come in and buy this election. That's why we're turning to our supporters for help. We don't have a handful of wealthy individuals to fund million-dollar smear campaigns. clean_body: We'll break it down for you. | | Team, You probably have heard the term "dark money" thrown out quite a bit, even from us. Dark money is when shady organizations pop up to spend money in a race with very little transparency about where the money is coming from. Often, these groups are out-of-state and are able to spend large sums of money for or against someone. They are usually funded by just a handful of wealthy individuals, or even just one lone donor. In our case, Republican dark money groups are expected to spend millions of dollars to unseat Congresswoman Nellie Pou. The reason for this is that Nellie is a top target for them. They'll stop at nothing to try to defeat her and grow their House majority. We cannot let dark money groups come in and buy this election. That's why we're turning to our supporters for help. We don't have a handful of wealthy individuals to fund million-dollar smear campaigns. We've got our broad grassroots coalition of everyday people like you, friend. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.
