name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Democracy Summer!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Our work has always been about building a coalition to make positive change—from our congressional district and all across our country. We are connecting communities, training the next generation of leaders, and electing Democrats to offices in Texas and beyond.
That’s why I am glad to announce that, once again this year, we will be participating in Democracy Summer.
What is Democracy Summer? My friend and colleague Congressman Jamie Raskin founded Democracy Summer to train high school and college students in voter registration, political organizing, and the history of social and political change. The fellowship is a six-week program with hands-on lessons in our TX-07 campaign office as well as virtual meetings with leading historians, law professors, political organizers and union and elected leaders from all across the country each week. This program is an incredible opportunity to gain an intensive education in the historical struggle for democratic freedom and essential lessons for effective political leadership today.
https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/e781fdc8cf21-rep-lizzie-fletcher-tx-07-democracy-summer-fellow-2025 [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/e781fdc8cf21-rep-lizzie-fletcher-tx-07-democracy-summer-fellow-2025]
The application portal for Democracy Summer is now open [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/e781fdc8cf21-rep-lizzie-fletcher-tx-07-democracy-summer-fellow-2025] ! The priority deadline to apply is next Friday, April 18—apply now and hear back by the end of April!—and the regular deadline is Friday, May 9.
STUDENTS CAN APPLY HERE [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/e781fdc8cf21-rep-lizzie-fletcher-tx-07-democracy-summer-fellow-2025]
I hope you will encourage students you know who might be interested to apply. (And, members of Congress from all over the country participate in this program. So, if you know students who live somewhere else that might be interested, share this with them, too!)
Thank you again for all you do—for your support, commitment, and partnership.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098

## Hang On! ~ The Imaginative Conservative
The Cross is fearful to the natural eye and distasteful to the natural heart, but you have a new light and a new heart. We hold on to Jesus by God’s strength, not our own. name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: The debt we owe America’s Founders
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmvozbw5c9xyb5dpm5rbormhzknetvcbqgduqujf3nlxx6d5f54a9lwhmwvps2zu2b96ptuunp6zmmjdto&__stmp=suo8uc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkyqex4aggu0287clp0hblim3esr1hvck9fmm72atimx80gf4l7vwc1mn63k42d9tt0wm8721fyufgtii33e7agab96h77cyiz29barbinf3hx86ebek4tychafu912zftuzedoxl2fneqzlfwp8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkyqex4aggu0287clp0hblimpruh9ztxc70blpsna8is2nwch6gbd9tetb7zwa6npq2imdyj4tsg5k7db87zgn4rq5lg461yfpj4w6so8dgy6ujpgyiwdt90wy3rbgy85d80x7lxg4v1m3dmd8fo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suo8uc&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39cb5061142b454caea0f0f6efd90275&_e=AMgNtXk3EzVDVHFMMhFfHaRzDIl_n_fnCTDEjRi2f241AcMBitYbbONTVTIVgNxHNgMYeaNlYWLQVexqOGtd--E4USA466c0WArLMenT2RHADdK3jbS-ybkn6F2YBFsE8jECf4CAyeSTyOoQ8qKGanx-ZePYpkDTp08MFafwxKeO7Fy4UwY8II-Mf2kKJaSJHmZgSDUN1aEcMK7yIK9dynKU6eFMk9JcmKu-GxXD2i6noFROZByphWT4LQEfirrNf6JolLOa-jiYook4nd8TaX2RQSOtmJ4ufaGv1hetq4MSWyFZn8QFMF-7eAgqkWCAhFKhHTFVEX_zZ-1Gvv7hRCoMXnI4RJrb7Ti64hWL2wDOdsKV8Tgfa7MLB5w5E5uu6RGkRuqr2Xdoxew950FK7sswRVlJdZZSv4lEMU9c2yosyBM7YQ8RgA0LnH5g5jh3)
---
| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39cb5061142b454caea0f0f6efd90275&_e=AMgNtXk3EzVDVHFMMhFfHaRzDIl_n_fnCTDEjRi2f241AcMBitYbbONTVTIVgNxHNgMYeaNlYWLQVexqOGtd--E4USA466c0WArLMenT2RHADdK3jbS-ybkn6F2YBFsE8jECf4CAyeSTyOoQ8qKGanx-ZePYpkDTp08MFafwxKeO7Fy4UwY8II-Mf2kKJaSJHmZgSDUN1aEcMK7yIK9dynKU6eFMk9JcmKu-GxXD2i6noFROZByphWT4LQEfirrNf6JolLOa-jiYook4nd8TaX2RQSOtmJ4ufaGv1hetq4PtF0Lq9RwEJIo0_3R7bNsXln1yRz34CaOa0bz2uJ7AASwTXYIvsW8b3sYzsxsjeixQg-5MGgKUE9Sg5g6vuuMVheCmxwvjtCbiJWN9I9Z2A4tQpjvi-_djJyPflBvwM8DldTfksxjJYBfeBlERdN4V)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39cb5061142b454caea0f0f6efd90275&_e=AMgNtXk3EzVDVHFMMhFfHaRzDIl_n_fnCTDEjRi2f241AcMBitYbbONTVTIVgNxHNgMYeaNlYWLQVexqOGtd--E4USA466c0WArLMenT2RHADdK3jbS-ybkn6F2YBFsE8jECf4CAyeSTyOoQ8qKGanx-ZePYpkDTp08MFafwxKeO7Fy4UwY8II-Mf2kKJaSJHmZgSDUN1aEcMK7yIK9dynKU6eFMk9JcmKu-GxXD2i6noFROZByphWT4LQEfirrNf6JolLOa-jiYook4nd8TaX2RQSOtmJ4ufaGv1hetq4MWN0uUR8WJbkGuUtRGO0XgkADlhfhXgL3gDaquH9qZUwL02nrNdrisoqY8YSzDoTaUk_is26mQsq98GVYSJokMMLLafHmHeNQvaB0di1ktm1pAiFOokQgTuZzlLdI4fVDSdYC79TctHJVRANCA96HY)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Peter, Every day, I hear from folks in the South Side of Chicago who are concerned about the direction this country is heading. Instead of trying to lower prices at the grocery store like promised, Trump is taking orders from an unelected billionaire. Instead of the “booming economy” Trump promised, we’ve seen explosive trade wars that hurt small businesses, farmers, and everyday people. Instead of the “government efficiency” Trump and Elon Musk have touted since day one, we’ve seen our federal institutions thrown into disarray. **Trump’s “Golden Age of America” has been nothing but chaos, corruption, and incompetence. ** I won’t stand by while Donald Trump and his Republican allies put billionaires over working families, spread disinformation, and try to tear down the programs that serve the American people. _**[But I can’t do it alone. I need to raise $5,000 by Tuesday at midnight to fuel our fight against the MAGA agenda and Project 2025. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Every day, I hear from folks in the South Side of Chicago who are concerned about the direction this country is heading. Instead of trying to lower prices at the grocery store like promised, Trump is taking orders from an unelected billionaire. Instead of the “booming economy” Trump promised, we’ve seen explosive trade wars that hurt small businesses, farmers, and everyday people. Instead of the “government efficiency” Trump and Elon Musk have touted since day one, we’ve seen our federal institutions thrown into disarray. Trump’s “Golden Age of America” has been nothing but chaos, corruption, and incompetence. I won’t stand by while Donald Trump and his Republican allies put billionaires over working families, spread disinformation, and try to tear down the programs that serve the American people. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being on our team, Jonathan Jackson | = Paid for by Jackson for Congress Jonathan Jackson for Congress 1030 15th St NW #404 Washington, DC 20005 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl4VTCTIm_tU9SpGaBfml8eXto-v2pJkS6bjuplnCKcstLG-RKI24f3jsjsPX4R672afmlG-uuevuSfskv0am-F1Qya1FeZT4RuuHfPkH3h7_6atTWWOnIh7Cvppbk180yWCp7FqKIzHhw7YhNk9LUm_g%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl429OEIvzKKmLCT8UBihtKe5KrMx-H7w9HKCDxu4eI4Kp6PVjIM982HK4pQ_S3Tpa7OsZ6ZEJfItQOcy0SxleqBql9rO0pUKykMf6k_w-Xa_6eX9bAz_p8J_qgEzePnUhXJIF5eJ0W2Co0dOdKWk-b1w%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl4664pTge2Tdnj0I_Vj1D7sgZoUdnDP3RQfIAYrvaOH-66E4lh6z_cowSpe6dNxSY2EySn-yYEGiMfbKQl82ohv7hKOgshquXOUC8Q4IlzvcPyLx-3Ui7cGD1uBMS51L_CLQYUXVa5ySgBaYWiSNIzYg%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl4xysXDQebeVwTp4mnWlFwqrOpfD3AXheKuGp79YbD2_o-fT7eod5qMVhSvryKUUasVXrTHM996pCiuTHNlGixNSqjmnJ36Ga_n6542mAlyzpy8jsqK-wFkeKEQu-7vRLXM5ZKQV3pvtiP9ldnSPFTLA%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl4DEchuuTqMQ1nvbJQMd4Dsv7JfdqRENucxnmSeO0z92cg1p02mPECEMMCFk0y421azfi5g_aGkXDLlmmzdeLiDtV1l_fe7JDr3VFNz45pZclQjuYN9LGaAdpdJ64noR5WsnuYGO0_h1whCkiVAs8WUw%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a8a77b840a5d4563ba45ff60a0423ed0&_e=NXG4d5k0gvdIUyGuKMr43bLNvUN0FLU1k1V_9QVobUjVWiCpeaTzH4JzShN5Mx_-UdBtqP5W6kSudV04FBJzkzYnmmkRU8xYzUXpiomjlmhH835foz2PF_dY64H38AB5Ow7CsDlSlTyYgeGAJ7T4TqxzON8hsYYWwCdqzjVQHHorJltHF5EgWegNHb1NbPX3uc_uwFMNJ4vLnsc03mPlwVP9EdA0UOb2IbNde3fYpyRh-67qpLEMS3JD_8Q09vl4Nt1z-R9F1vQpn4qnSnPy8nzKaONUxGVpk9k1nuw6xh8kqfOI9ecEEjjiB7MaqpCl1oGh0-xDmXj9W87MI0RXaYvwIaS8wi3jzdaqt67zovh0s6nxuoK55aG1J7SnjybHinSi8xa2ZwTqh_wie_LARg%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Yesterday’s rally was electric.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The energy on the ground was electric — but we need your help to keep up the momentum.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250413-4945-footer&t=1&akid=4945%2E420207%2EFWOxJK)
**Peter, did you catch Pramila on stage with Bernie Sanders and AOC yesterday?**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-4945&amount=3&refcode2=4945_420207_FWOxJK&akid=4945%2E420207%2EFWOxJK)
The energy on the ground was electric. Thousands of grassroots supporters came together — fired up, passionate, and ready to fight back against the billionaires and special interests trying to buy our democracy.
Trump and his MAGA allies are pushing extreme policies and floating dangerous power grabs, including threatening a third term. They’ve made it clear they’ll break the rules if it helps them take control.
We’re building a movement that puts working people first. **But the truth is, momentum like this only matters if we can sustain it — and that takes all of us.**
[**That’s why we need you with us, Peter. Will you chip in $3 — or whatever amount you can — to help us keep organizing, fighting, and growing our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250413-1?refcode=em20250413-4945&amount=3&refcode2=4945_420207_FWOxJK&akid=4945%2E420207%2EFWOxJK)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250413-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250413-4945&refcode2=4945_420207_FWOxJK&akid=4945%2E420207%2EFWOxJK)**
Thanks for being part of this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250413-4945-footer&t=2&refcode2=4945_420207_FWOxJK&akid=4945%2E420207%2EFWOxJK)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

A day of peace, hope, and spiritual reflection.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)

| | Friend, Today, Christians in Oregon and across the globe observe Palm Sunday – a day that marks Jesus’s humble and triumphant entry into Jerusalem and the beginning of Holy Week. As the crowds welcomed him by laying palm branches of victory before him, he rode toward a triumph they neither anticipated nor understood—his willing sacrifice to save them from sin and death.

Our courts were co-opted before, but are now being reduced to observers by an executive branch hellbent on destroying the rule of law

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..0gZ9A8JmhCt68DLMvzDnNnWAou8HxQBfra9mV_Dug_Y?) for more
---

---
# [A Constitution in crisis](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NzY2MjcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE2ODYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JwCubV597RQb9nmkD0f_x3Kbs-RHgejoZRcozWm-3HI)
### Our courts were co-opted before, but are now being reduced to observers by an executive branch hellbent on destroying the rule of law
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Apr 13| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDU3NjYyNywiZXhwIjoxNzQ3MTY4NjI3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.i5YcCtdMEJwEHV_iCmCp4jEWYAD0W6P5Rw3wV7aTKq4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NzY2MjcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE2ODYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JwCubV597RQb9nmkD0f_x3Kbs-RHgejoZRcozWm-3HI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NzY2MjcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE2ODYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JwCubV597RQb9nmkD0f_x3Kbs-RHgejoZRcozWm-3HI)
---
| | [](https://substack..bV6FeQ77KdTQrICTG5NWecq3QSyXQ3yIbMj9m7Qy-5Y?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/a-constitution-in-crisis?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

A few weeks ago, I wrote an analysis of how [relying on the courts to defend Democratic norms and individual rights](https://substack.com/redirect/8aab9f13-527c-429c-8b56-92285ba30544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was futile in the face of the Trump-Musk administration's assault on seemingly bedrock foundations of our Republic. The situation, however, has grown worse in the time since then, and even critical observers tend to overlook the most dangerous parts of the pattern.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3cce4b98-d57c-4f65-b48f-77b8386d765e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! This post is public, and you can help inform your friends by sharing it._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NzY2MjcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE2ODYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JwCubV597RQb9nmkD0f_x3Kbs-RHgejoZRcozWm-3HI)
### **A decision that transformed the Court**
My earlier article focused on the structural co-optation of the judiciary long before Trump returned to Washington, and the eventual implications of the _[Bush v. Gore](https://substack.com/redirect/c91ef3ad-de79-4f94-94b4-a8a4ae2ef989?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ decision that most observers continue to disregard. Voices fearing a constitutional crisis unfolding in 2025 often forget that, by deciding the 2000 presidential election, the Supreme Court not only subverted democracy in that moment, but also indirectly [contrived](https://substack.com/redirect/62fe2a90-0b3f-428e-85f0-6ec6f81f348c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its own future composition--and jurisprudence.
A series of ensuing outrageous decisions--ranging, for instance, from _[Citizens United v. FEC](https://substack.com/redirect/8c704572-62fd-4576-ae24-cbca211c3774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ (which in 2010 sold our democracy to the highest bidder) to _[Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization](https://substack.com/redirect/093609db-f5bf-4de8-9b1a-990df3bfdbb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ (which in 2022 ended reproductive freedom and turned back the clock on women's rights by decades)--all trace their roots to _Bush v. Gore._ The judiciary effectively co-opted itself, introducing an unconstitutional circularity in the process for judicial nominations that indirectly contrived the Court's current composition.
Beyond that subversion of judicial independence by the judiciary itself, however, an even more clear & present danger to the Constitution has now emerged: an executive branch that has proven itself unwilling to respect judicial review.
The cases demonstrating that pattern are disturbing. The implications for our constitutional design--and the future of whatever might remain of our Republic--are even worse.
### **We intervened at the time**
My concerns about the structural co-optation of the courts led me to work from 2005-08 at a then-startup non-profit in Washington called the [American Constitution Society](https://substack.com/redirect/99f105d7-c649-448a-aeed-ba572ea6f222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (ACS). Founded to defend judicial independence and counter the profound [influence](https://substack.com/redirect/7cbb0970-d6ee-4b2d-b0c6-3aacc60a1eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Federalist Society over judicial nominations, ACS worked tirelessly to cultivate ideological balance in our nation's courts.
While ACS has expanded dramatically since then, its core mission was subverted by elected Democrats who had better things to do than show up for work. Recommendations from ACS were generally ignored, allowing the nominations process to remain skewed in favor of corporate lawyers (when Democrats held the White House) and lawyers dedicated to executive power (when Republicans held the White House), rather than others who had spent careers defending and advancing rights.
The inevitable result was what we see today: a weaponized Supreme Court dominated by right-wing ideologues poised to enforce their vision of society on the rest of us. Decisions like _Dobbs_ represent the culmination of the right wing strategy that began in the 1970s when the Federalist Society was founded.
Today, however, the Constitution faces a new set of threats, the likes of which our Republic has not encountered in centuries, since the days of Andrew Jackson.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication enabled by readers rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-AiUtHczGZmEWD4YY-HUCIsVEsFdwVqmwXYdgHljfyM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161255053)
### **An executive branch run amok**
Plenty of voices have observed the [aggressiveness of the Trump-Musk administration](https://substack.com/redirect/09a8ccad-7827-4749-9249-23ad4b31b029?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in promoting its predatory policy vision. Far fewer recognize the danger that lurks beyond discrete policy decisions, and how the administration's response to court rulings threatens the constitutional design.
On several occasions over the past several weeks, the administration has openly violated court orders. The pattern [began within a month of Trump returning to office](https://substack.com/redirect/fe2013a7-d8b1-45fe-8815-5bb5dd442f73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as the administration unapologetically defied a judicial ruling issued in January that--had it been respected--would have blocked the administration's efforts to suspend federal grants opposed by Trump & Musk.
A month later, the administration violated [a judicial order aiming to block the mass deportation of 250 Venezuelans](https://substack.com/redirect/89d9f4f5-08c6-4f85-ac14-c3ff12a1bb2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to El Salvador. Not only did the administration ignore the judicial ruling, but the President then [called on Congress to impeach the judge](https://substack.com/redirect/75047060-a8e7-43c7-b67f-1a40af9cae56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who issued it, as well as others who have issues rulings at odds with his goals.
Trump's call for impeaching judges prompting [a rare (and toothless) rebuke](https://substack.com/redirect/59a6f5a5-ee23-4b91-aaca-9b6aec044ef2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Chief Justice John Roberts. Ironically, Roberts was the first of the right wing Justices whose illegitimate appointments were enabled by the circularity of the _Bush v. Gore_ ruling.
### **Could Congress be any more complicit?**
Rather than defend judicial independence, Congress is outrageously bending over backwards to enable its further erosion. This week, the House of Representatives [passed a bill](https://substack.com/redirect/b40c8d58-9c76-4284-aefa-50888b924c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that--if it passes the Senate-- would dramatically curtail the courts' authority and restrict judicial decisions to the parties before the court, rather than similarly situated parties elsewhere. It would hamstring the courts by rendering them powerless to issue injunctions beyond the specific district in which they each sit.
Should Congress proceed with Trump & Musk's invitations to impeach judges, the erosion of judicial independence will reach another level of madness. Congressional complicity in that pattern is a dramatic revelation of how unqualified for office most elected officials remain, and the profound constitutional ignorance that enables the continuing collapse of our Republic and its transformation into an autocracy.
### **History**
When presidents openly defy court orders, they don't just violate the law. They also challenge the structure of the constitutional design.
Two generations ago, President Richard Nixon famously defied a court order during [the Watergate investigation](https://substack.com/redirect/45b83455-6653-49e8-9f60-f0b646cbfba1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that required him to provide tape recordings of White House conversations. While he ultimately did comply with the order, it took a ruling by the Supreme Court to force his hand.
Beyond Nixon and the Court, the crucial reason why he had to comply with the Court's ruling was congressional commitment to the rule of law--precisely what we no longer have today.
The same thing happened at an earlier era in history, when President Andrew Jackson thumbed his nose at the Supreme Court's 1832 decision in _[Worcester v. Georgia](https://substack.com/redirect/54379483-d5d4-40bd-a96e-57c373709940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
The case presented the question of whether the State of Georgia had the authority to enforce laws within Cherokee Territory. Because Native American tribes are sovereign nations (despite having been subjected to a terrifyingly [recent genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/023b1c0d-bef3-4b5d-9660-3f0a735dcd5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), the Supreme Court held that Georgia was not allowed to remove them from their land.
Reacting to the decision under Chief Justice John Marshall, President Jackson's infamous (and potentially apocryphal) response succinctly reflected the nature of our crisis today: "John Marshall has made his decision; now let him enforce it!"
Siding with the State of Georgia, Jackson ignored the Supreme Court ruling and joined Georgia in continuing its efforts to remove the Cherokee people, culminating in the [Trail of Tears](https://substack.com/redirect/218e9051-78ca-4d0f-a81c-97f25532ba96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one of the worst human rights abuses in our nation's ugly and hateful history.
Importantly, Congress regarded Jackson's support for Georgia and rejection of the Supreme Court's decision as a matter of executive discretion. Because Jackson was popular, defying the courts held no consequence for him.
As much as any other moment in U.S. history, this saga exposed the Supreme Court's powerlessness over any president without also having congressional support.
_Don 't keep these insights to yourself! Having been silenced by a corporate political party when I challenged the continuing corruption of its leadership, I rely on readers like you to help inform a public routinely misinformed by other voices._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=161255053&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjU1MDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ1NzY2MjcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzE2ODYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JwCubV597RQb9nmkD0f_x3Kbs-RHgejoZRcozWm-3HI)
The _[Marbury v. Madison](https://substack.com/redirect/778070f5-0f2c-4893-8c3a-3616dd19b21f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ case, decided in the early days of our Republic, reflected a stroke of genius. It represented the court creatively constructing for itself a role in checking and balancing other branches that inevitably wield more power. The power it established for the Court, however, is more fragile than most Americans seem to think.
The executive wields the power of the sword, and Congress the power of the purse. The courts have only the power of the pen, which relies in turn on respect from the other branches.
When a president openly defies the courts and ignores rulings attempting to constrain him, there is more or less no other force poised to intervene. Congress could conceivably defund the administration or impeach the president--but with Republicans controlling both houses of Congress, neither possibility is likely.
Even if Democrats held control of one or another branch, they've repeatedly demonstrated their [complicity and inability to show even a modicum of spine](https://substack.com/redirect/928e0710-fb19-4348-bdd7-1830f5e2af7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), proving that they can not be relied upon, either.
### **Nothing can stop them**
Observers who [think](https://substack.com/redirect/a823ecd1-50b4-4089-8e1a-974bcb6b719a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that [courts](https://substack.com/redirect/7762cc1d-f338-491c-a58f-b88ac72b75c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have [tools](https://substack.com/redirect/3f95d195-7d35-49a2-8b15-6c7fab7a7ad5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at their disposal to compel executive compliance are unfortunately confused. Only Congress can compel the executive branch to respect judicial decisions--but, at the moment, it is also complicit.
We are stepping into an era of U.S. history that no one alive has encountered. Students of history might recall it. Nothing encapsulates the history of executive power run amok better than the Trail of Tears, when indigenous Americans were displaced en masse, torn from both their land and cultures, and died by the tens of thousands.
I've written about how the [ongoing Israeli genocide in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/70854ce0-a854-490f-bdbf-eef519336a9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) reflects the [indigenous genocide in North America](https://substack.com/redirect/023b1c0d-bef3-4b5d-9660-3f0a735dcd5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the recency of that genocide, even in places that claim now to be progressive. I've also explored how [popular resistance](https://substack.com/redirect/eaf2370b-1ecd-45d7-91f4-43cb7fbfe2e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to unrestrained militarism has struggled to meet the same level of influence as it did during the Vietnam War, ultimately implicating the strength of (whatever passes for) [democracy in America](https://substack.com/redirect/ae0ec769-f461-48f2-a7ec-f20c7e832bcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I wish that confluence were simply a matter of historical analogy, rather than a disturbing example of [history rhyming](https://substack.com/redirect/087621d2-1285-42c4-a880-e6b89bb20abd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If America is to either end the genocide in Gaza or restore any modicum of constitutional order, it will require [a mobilization supported by organized labor](https://substack.com/redirect/82027b3d-aa56-48a0-9020-febcdfaaae22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But with Trump's [ironic support](https://substack.com/redirect/e59910c0-ca0d-4127-8b8b-639bda69d2d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among blue collar workers, that remains [a more ambitious vision](https://substack.com/redirect/a680308b-583a-4172-adeb-eb2e84ce3c77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than it may appear.
How will America meet this moment? My fear contends with my hope, but reason sadly supports the former.
_Paid subscribers can access a further section describing a series of future posts on which I 've been working, exploring subject matter and themes quite different from those I've covered before. I'm excited to share a new arena of inquiry, and hope to eventually compile these forthcoming posts into my first book..._

This post is public, and you can help inform your friends by sharing it. A decision that transformed the Court My earlier article focused on the structural co-optation of the judiciary long before Trump returned to Washington, and the eventual implications of the decision that most observers continue to disregard. Voices fearing a constitutional crisis unfolding in 2025 often forget that, by deciding the 2000 presidential election, the Supreme Court not only subverted democracy in that moment, but also indirectly its own future composition--and jurisprudence. Gore. The judiciary effectively co-opted itself, introducing an unconstitutional circularity in the process for judicial nominations that indirectly contrived the Court's current composition. Beyond that subversion of judicial independence by the judiciary itself, however, an even more clear & present danger to the Constitution has now emerged: an executive branch that has proven itself unwilling to respect judicial review. The cases demonstrating that pattern are disturbing. The implications for our constitutional design--and the future of whatever might remain of our Republic--are even worse. We intervened at the time My concerns about the structural co-optation of the courts led me to work from 2005-08 at a then-startup non-profit in Washington called the (ACS). Founded to defend judicial independence and counter the profound of the Federalist Society over judicial nominations, ACS worked tirelessly to cultivate ideological balance in our nation's courts. While ACS has expanded dramatically since then, its core mission was subverted by elected Democrats who had better things to do than show up for work. Recommendations from ACS were generally ignored, allowing the nominations process to remain skewed in favor of corporate lawyers (when Democrats held the White House) and lawyers dedicated to executive power (when Republicans held the White House), rather than others who had spent careers defending and advancing rights. The inevitable result was what we see today: a weaponized Supreme Court dominated by right-wing ideologues poised to enforce their vision of society on the rest of us. Decisions like Dobbs represent the culmination of the right wing strategy that began in the 1970s when the Federalist Society was founded. Today, however, the Constitution faces a new set of threats, the likes of which our Republic has not encountered in centuries, since the days of Andrew Jackson. subject: This is crucial for election security

body:
Voter Action Project
CNN: Trump is dismantling election security networks. State officials are alarmed
Team,
The United States has a history of strong preparation and quick work by an information-sharing and analysis network of hundreds of federal, state, and local election, cybersecurity, and law enforcement officials to protect our elections. It's a history we should be proud of.
But now key parts of this security network, much of it built over the past decade, are being systematically dismantled by the Trump administration and Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, a CNN investigation has found – leaving election offices across the country scrambling to protect against future threats.
In an age of cyber attacks, poorly funded election equipment breaking down, or anti-voting activists trying to skew the results, these moves to remove the guardrails on our elections are a dangerous step away from democracy.
That's why our work is so critical. We need to get the word out about these threats to voting rights -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts.
Help multiply our efforts to defend voting rights by chipping in $25 or whatever you can today to make sure every voice is heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100.00&tknfa=tojKiLffmoFJPpaQO9piosnTZnIyImtsIdXE58r3THQ=&contactdata=RaJZFlR/Q1qzxT8GvRGXH3xXWyjd4mfKvJtCEcqvGs4kOqIhGYk7aXADZSVvq/CFynt2tMHv3oxoouPfEu6OrEhdwmLdEgMO5Wqh3dsFtNk=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=tojKiLffmoFJPpaQO9piosnTZnIyImtsIdXE58r3THQ=&contactdata=RaJZFlR/Q1qzxT8GvRGXH3xXWyjd4mfKvJtCEcqvGs4kOqIhGYk7aXADZSVvq/CFynt2tMHv3oxoouPfEu6OrEhdwmLdEgMO5Wqh3dsFtNk=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=RaJZFlR/Q1qzxT8GvRGXH3xXWyjd4mfKvJtCEcqvGs4kOqIhGYk7aXADZSVvq/CFynt2tMHv3oxoouPfEu6OrEhdwmLdEgMO5Wqh3dsFtNk=]
The simple truth is this: We can counter the awful anti-democratic voter suppression provisions enacted into law in Georgia, Texas, Arizona, Florida, and beyond over the last few years.
We can protect our democracy from those who want to lie to keep themselves in office -- or scheme their way back. We can increase voter participation and end the tactics -- like gerrymandering -- that are used to silence our voices.
We can make our country the democracy we've all been promised. But we need your help.
Fuel our work this year with $25 or however much you can to help us protect the right to vote and so much more from the threats we're facing >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

subject: Establishment politicians hate me, but I don’t give a rat’s behind.

body:
I could care less about what my Democrat colleagues in Washington think about me. But your opinion matters.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-trAPiA)

Hey there,

This is Congressman Troy Downing. I’m honored to serve my first term in Congress as a Trump-endorsed conservative. I didn’t come to Washington, DC, to make friends—I came to drain the swamp and shake things up.

But I can’t do it alone. Unlike career politicians who pad their pockets, I don’t rely on lobbyists or corporate interests to fund my campaign. **I’m fighting for YOUR and need YOUR help to keep the momentum going.**

I hate to bother you like this, but hitting our goal will send a message to the Democrats that America First conservatives are here to stay. **[**Will you rush in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us defend the conservative Majority?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._FHB-y7KsMo9unw)**

Together, we’re taking a sledgehammer to the status quo and putting America back on track.

Thank you for your support,Congressman Troy Downing

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: I am NOT “canceling” your GOP Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You are not an ATM, you are a member of the team.
| |
---
| | | Let me start with this:

I have noticed how dedicated you are to our MAGA movement - and I thank you for it.

This is Steve Scalise. I wanted to make sure you know that I've received your feedback, appreciated you signing our petitions, and made sure any financial contributions were spent wisely AND in races where they make the biggest impact.

_We would be NOWHERE without your support and guidance. _

Democrats would probably have total control if it weren't for folks like you doing what they can to help.

I can promise you this - I will never forget it.

That's why I'll never threaten to "remove" you from the Republican Party or "revoke" your GOP membership if you don't donate. That stuff drives me crazy. **You are not an ATM, you are a valued and respected member of the team.**

But that doesn't mean I won't email or text you from time to time, but I promise to message you only when it's absolutely necessary.

That's why I emailed you when we were shaping our first 100 days... I emailed you about the Special Elections... And I emailed you about the DNC suing President Trump...

_**[Your input and support helped us move quickly, win the Special Elections, and advance our MAGA agenda. Thank you again for stepping up when we needed you most.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-2vm5ovP4eBZgV8wNrZYq8msH_VBd0kBL2AMA9ScboDB4xjBA_9ZmrxSl0KoJcRbSfLgBnNZ36Bb63VpuuXr_UxJ2n2U8iBdkJZTMw-Ecvy4MSvOz1RpHJfCtzLjx7oiW6YVgk8gkkv_uC40gDhMJRpjUZMYoAU1fpBlPSh2xjss4osaho6KnirVxe8yxYaneJn_gLi-ngDiBqZ2kMaW1LT_Nzw7hMuKrEaG3NuAwY8GpSlgxzLYLkhEzCy7MEc1pb8_bFBxvtABQrQrUhBPAoQe5db_8ZrcQqWkTUXc-p04Gep_eCyUImVnNj0GQBa_DkVMmqs4WDOY1rXbzKp29s4ZQj61wLFSC00Vih5emEE6SAuqwkhJwPLBUBW9ft4vKc%3D "Your input and support helped us move quickly, win the Special Elections, and advance our MAGA agenda. Thank you again for stepping up when we needed you most. ")**_

Unfortunately, it's not all good news.

Our candidate in FL-06 was outraised 10-to-1, we lost the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, and the Democrat Machine is emboldened like I've NEVER SEEN BEFORE! Liberal money poured in seeing these elections as a chance to sabotage President Trump's agenda.

_**[So if- and only if - you can afford to do so, would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help us rebuild our warchest?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-2vm5ovP4eBZgV8wNrZYq8msH_VBd0kBL2AMA9ScboDB4xjBA_9ZmrxSl0KoJcRbSfLgBnNZ36Bb63VpuuXr_UxJ2n2U8iBdkJZTMw-Ecvy4MSvOz1RpHJfCtzLjx7oiW6YVgk8gkkv_uC40gDhMJRpjUZMYoAU1fpBlPSh2xjss4osaho6KnirVxe8yxYaneJn_gLi-ngDiBqZ2kMaW1LT05jX4UDyd0chG8vrjGc9FeYnAT4QD0vaVVEEcA8vZ1eQlWymLuNdwcO4TJZoRxA3GkkVi1mngpc68ssTgf2rTzJtzRScR-jB_Kx0V6-BceAThVAXs_QUSMlmYHwb6cDJszzUd_jRFdIoxcDFYlDPwAOF18l-1ES9guj4EzJYJWM%3D "So if – and only if – you can afford to do so, would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help us rebuild our warchest? ")**_

Here's some intel that made my heart sink...
* A House Democrat Super PAC is unloading **$50M** into toss-up districts
* The Liberal outraised our candidate in the Wisconsin race by **2****00%**
* Now **two** GOP-held House seats are in serious jeopardy

The Democrat Machine is channeling all the over-the-top Liberal outrage toward Elon Musk, President Trump's deportations, and our quick work in the House into raising campaign funds to elect Democrats.

In other words, we urgently need some more support right now. _**[It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-2vm5ovP4eBZgV8wNrZYq8msH_VBd0kBL2AMA9ScboDB4xjBA_9ZmrxSl0KoJcRbSfLgBnNZ36Bb63VpuuXr_UxJ2n2U8iBdkJZTMw-Ecvy4MSvOz1RpHJfCtzLjx7oiW6YVgk8gkkv_uC40gDhMJRpjUZMYoAU1fpBlPSh2xjss4osaho6KnirVxe8yxYaneJn_gLi-ngDiBqZ2kMaW1LTBs5WGtSnpEvpRmLtob1HgzGow8Wd93CBFvCaFCJSQ9-tkPni-8XMYQq9fB-f8-VAXbNdUe9gm8bdpU9Oi5pVTeKZiOwqxueqtrwF9L-tJwcncwTCMogwQWMP7R1xCZmRmr49lfb5sBG5_QnTmRYfq-r606uvt9IYhr1si8kVjuU%3D "It would mean a great deal to me personally if you’d be willing to help.")**_
---
| | | [IF YOU'RE WILLING AND ABLE, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-2vm5ovP4eBZgV8wNrZYq8msH_VBd0kBL2AMA9ScboDB4xjBA_9ZmrxSl0KoJcRbSfLgBnNZ36Bb63VpuuXr_UxJ2n2U8iBdkJZTMw-Ecvy4MSvOz1RpHJfCtzLjx7oiW6YVgk8gkkv_uC40gDhMJRpjUZMYoAU1fpBlPSh2xjss4osaho6KnirVxe8yxYaneJn_gLi-ngDiBqZ2kMaW1LTTfGhy4qzsPwyir80mKBrd1TbX-SohOZcWN-tlZuH6TQZzDmBI48Idp7XmTeLGBsVi9SHPBuqaQBo5p85VPuaJk77gjOTyk0ULPuxdHKPtid8OdP_sFHke-0Wlk_dNp8LgnO2oak0445DeBH_Iz0Ot-VcTJ1NatfbYM5bCGHyeQE%3D "PITCH IN HERE")
---
Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that. It's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless you,
- Steve

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-1Xtwd4_5FyChIWlSsDu0H9nPd1r-l95oRIVgUA9SipGvVo37xqcdyvx4EMKkeyPYgUy_i7SO3eJDXn0OICmxKV1xw2utql7_tHJ-KozgUFQVGGYei-b1L1dJ4LjDyOr7fS7fdT_BmkZGrCiu2Mv1zrilnD-NE9tJ3t7flLGb5UhGQG-tFgo7nepOOEw19qwnAw2aOtiJ_rTHusI3e3NztKBZWS8ROBNkqChK3lDn29_s_vheZC7bHLg9yAL_ItPS2p3W4cFstfMHViVHjex5oo82-y3BuPb1XAIJ0hn1lXynxltqt9scqk_i8ERyShZYmTsZb7ISoSRavZoGxC7WxbZ_tVORYU5maO_Eug-N40YUrbx042c8LRAECP6RiTXks%3D "First 100 Day Survey")

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8e754c465284470d910188614042b58c&_e=fIXlFkEB4bnS78EfieOvl32XYFI7htsjMqNAmmY-F-1Xtwd4_5FyChIWlSsDu0H9nPd1r-l95oRIVgUA9SipGvVo37xqcdyvx4EMKkeyPYgUy_i7SO3eJDXn0OICmxKV1xw2utql7_tHJ-KozgUFQVGGYei-b1L1dJ4LjDyOr7fS7fdT_BmkZGrCiu2Mv1zrilnD-NE9tJ3t7flLGb5UhGQG-tFgo7nepOOEw19qwnAw2aOtiJ_rTHusI3e3NztKBZWS8ROBNkqChK3lDn29_kJFEuUgxPm-QvghEh7cmn9r1WHouCwXejnrw1cEAS3pmisXED8ZBcOoj-bmbKcTUQxPwuq-CjxjEsbCZfIZcOZLClJSUdbIXKfpmWha6v1Hb7Gdo5R4Ji2HO3NK7YS5K6yAXSx8nE7U1Imue6r0yjs%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

clean_body: You are not an ATM, you are a member of the team. | | | | | Let me start with this: I have noticed how dedicated you are to our MAGA movement - and I thank you for it. This is Steve Scalise. I wanted to make sure you know that I've received your feedback, appreciated you signing our petitions, and made sure any financial contributions were spent wisely AND in races where they make the biggest impact. We would be NOWHERE without your support and guidance. Democrats would probably have total control if it weren't for folks like you doing what they can to help. I can promise you this - I will never forget it. That's why I'll never threaten to "remove" you from the Republican Party or "revoke" your GOP membership if you don't donate. That stuff drives me crazy. You are not an ATM, you are a valued and respected member of the team. But that doesn't mean I won't email or text you from time to time, but I promise to message you only when it's absolutely necessary. That's why I emailed you when we were shaping our first 100 days... I emailed you about the Special Elections... And I emailed you about the DNC suing President Trump... "Your input and support helped us move quickly, win the Special Elections, and advance our MAGA agenda. Thank you again for stepping up when we needed you most. " Unfortunately, it's not all good news. Our candidate in FL-06 was outraised 10-to-1, we lost the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, and the Democrat Machine is emboldened like I've NEVER SEEN BEFORE! Liberal money poured in seeing these elections as a chance to sabotage President Trump's agenda. "So if – and only if – you can afford to do so, would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help us rebuild our warchest? " Here's some intel that made my heart sink... A House Democrat Super PAC is unloading $50M into toss-up districts The Liberal outraised our candidate in the Wisconsin race by 200% Now two GOP-held House seats are in serious jeopardy The Democrat Machine is channeling all the over-the-top Liberal outrage toward Elon Musk, President Trump's deportations, and our quick work in the House into raising campaign funds to elect Democrats. In other words, we urgently need some more support right now. "It would mean a great deal to me personally if you’d be willing to help." | | | "PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that. It's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey" so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. body:
I’m proud to endorse Elizabeth Guzman

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105774496/539345338/1187388808?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GuzmanSplit_250413_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcwYjI3Ny1hZTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM7Sk6gAexvAiuT2STPiDc74X8WPSi3GAP19HO3cIxk=) Look, Derek, now more than ever, we need the Virginia General Assembly to stay under Democratic control.

We need leaders at home that will stand up against the Trump administration and fight for Virginia’s working families—Elizabeth Guzman is one of those leaders.

**And her race could not only flip a key district blue, but decide control of the House of Delegates.[_Can you split a $25 contribution between our campaigns to support Elizabeth’s campaign and keep Virginia blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105774497/539345339/1187388808?amount=25&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GuzmanSplit_250413_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcwYjI3Ny1hZTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM7Sk6gAexvAiuT2STPiDc74X8WPSi3GAP19HO3cIxk=)** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105774498/539345340/1187388808?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GuzmanSplit_250413_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcwYjI3Ny1hZTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM7Sk6gAexvAiuT2STPiDc74X8WPSi3GAP19HO3cIxk=)**** Elizabeth understands better than anyone the challenges that Virginians face because she’s lived them. She came to the United States as a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs at the same time to pay for her education, becoming a social worker and union leader.

She served for six years, passing laws to raise the minimum wage, end a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining, and expand reproductive freedom. She delivered real results—better wages, stronger schools, and a fairer economy.

She doesn’t just talk about progress. She makes it happen. That’s why I believed her when she said she can flip Virginia’s 22nd House of Delegates district from red to blue. But I won’t let her do it alone:

[_**Will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Elizabeth Guzman’s so she can keep the General Assembly blue and fight for a stronger, more equitable commonwealth?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105774499/539345341/1187388808?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GuzmanSplit_250413_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcwYjI3Ny1hZTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM7Sk6gAexvAiuT2STPiDc74X8WPSi3GAP19HO3cIxk=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105774500/539345342/1187388808?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GuzmanSplit_250413_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcwYjI3Ny1hZTE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM7Sk6gAexvAiuT2STPiDc74X8WPSi3GAP19HO3cIxk=)****

subject: your signature is the only one missing...

body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=6&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=7&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=8&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=9&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=10&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=11&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=12&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89035?t=13&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19527%2E878179%2E-ZdW-3)

name: Greg Lopez
subject: What’s your Colorado dream?
body:
I’ve got a major announcement coming Monday—and it’s about the future of Colorado.

| | | | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.xuO-242imNf)
---
Hey Peter,
It’s Greg Lopez.
**I’ve got a major announcement coming Monday—and it’s about the future of Colorado.**
Not just mine.
Yours.
See, I’ve been traveling this great state, talking with folks in every corner, and one thing’s clear... we all love Colorado, but we’re not all living the same version of it.
Some of us are chasing our Colorado dream. Others feel like they’re stuck in a nightmare. Groceries cost too much. Crime is creeping in. Families are barely getting by. And too often, the folks in charge? They stopped listening.
Before I say anything more, I want to hear from _you_.
**What kind of Colorado do you want to live in?**
**What’s the future you’re dreaming about?**
**And what’s the mess you’re hoping we can fix?**
👉 **Use the image below and the hashtag #LopezListens on social media to post your story.**
Together, let's flood social media with a new vision for Colorado.

Talk soon. —Greg
[greglopez.co](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.xuO-242imNf)
People Over Politics
| | |
---
\n\n\n | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.xuO-242imNL) | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.xuO-242imNP) | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.xuO-242imNT)
---|---|---
|
---
Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Unsubscribe](http://greglopez.activehosted.com/proc.php?nl=2&c=3&m=7&s=71a82ae71f7b50c88b4fbb88fe19f90c&act=unsub)
Greg Lopez For Colorado, PO Box #0028, Elizabeth, CO 80107, United States
---

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Real gun safety passed in Colorado this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Governor Polis signed a law requiring background checks, safety training, and permits to buy assault weapons. Vet Voice spearheaded this effort because they know what’s at stake. They’ve carried these weapons, they know what they can do, and they know they don’t belong on our streets.
#
We’re not going to pretend that every day is sunshine and rainbows right now, Peter.
A lot of the news is pretty grim.
But it isn’t all bad. Matter of fact, a lot of good is still happening.
Case in point: Our sister organization, Vet Voice Foundation, just helped real, effective gun safety laws get passed in Colorado.
Yes, you heard that right — gun safety laws passed in 2025.
Governor Polis signed a law requiring background checks, safety training, and permits to buy assault weapons. Vet Voice spearheaded this effort because they know what’s at stake. They’ve carried these weapons, they know what they can do, and they know they don’t belong on our streets.
That’s good news, and we hope it gives you a little hope.
Thanks for all your support,
The team at VoteVets
🇺🇸 Before you go — one more thing 🪖
Of all the people who get these emails, just 5% have made a donation to support our work. That’s 5% with skin in the game at VoteVets, powering everything we do. If everyone reading this chipped in even $5 today we’d raise enough that we wouldn’t need to ask all year!
But not everyone can donate. We get that.
That’s why it’s important that the folks who can afford it chip in from time to time. That’s how we get this done. [**And, if you can, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250413-1-120&t=1&akid=34338%2E3013755%2Eo6FwvA)
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250413-1-120&t=2&akid=34338%2E3013755%2Eo6FwvA)
---
Thank you!
