name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 04/13/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

With just 18 days to go until early voting opens on May 2nd for the June 17th Republican Primary, our campaign is in full gear preparing to get voters the information they need to find how to vote and make an informed decision - both in June and in November.

I'm glad to be back this week with another edition of Herrity Headlines, keeping you informed on what the campaign is doing and how you can help!
---
|
---
| |
---
I want to start by congratulating Senator Mark Peake on his election yesterday to be our next Chairman of the Republican Party of Virginia!

With so much on the line this November, it's critical that our party has strong leadership to support Winsome Sears' election as Governor, our campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General Miyares' reelection.
---
| I look forward to working with Senator Peake to secure Republican wins across the ticket, and down ballot as well!
---
|
---
|
---
| Volunteers across the state rallied this week to knock on doors and make phone calls ensuring that voters know about the upcoming election - and know who to support!

I'm grateful for the support of volunteers across Virginia - and we're eager for all the help you can give. If you'd like to get involved as a volunteer, we'd love to have you! [Sign up here](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=73b5dc272c&e=a1ea0f9c99) and we'll reach out!

---
| [Sign Up To Volunteer!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=cacc7ab34f&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up To Volunteer!")
---
|
---
| I was honored to receive a number of new endorsements this week, including Delegate **Geary Higgins** , Fauquier County Commissioner **Eric Maybach** , and CD06 State Central Committee Representative **Stephen Kurtz**!
---
| |
---
Delegate Geary Higgins represents portions of Loudoun and Fauquier counties, and has been a stalwart defender of our conservative values in the House of Delegates. Alongside Delegate Ian Lovejoy, he is one of two Republican Delegates that have won election on the outskirts of Northern Virginia and I'm honored to have the support of both in my race!
---
| |
---

Commissioner Eric Maybach is a driving force in Fauquier County and in their electoral successes. His support in Fauquier will be instrumental, and I'm glad to have him by my side as we seek to ensure commonsense, conservative solutions are preserved in Richmond.
---
| |
---

Stephen Kurtz represents Virginia's 6th Congressional District on the Republican Party of Virginia's State Central Committee. He's a force to be reckoned with in Warren County and across the Shenandoah Valley, and I'm glad to add him to the great group of supporters we've gained in CD06!
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=8c30d833f3&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
In light of an overwhelming number of requests for both yard signs and bumper stickers, I'm excited to announce that our campaign will be placing an additional order for both items this month!

If you'd like a yard sign and/or a bumper sticker, simply [submit this form](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=28c9cd5496&e=a1ea0f9c99) selecting the items you'd like.

Our campaign will get them to you over the coming weeks!

---
| [Request a Yard Sign or Bumper Sticker!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=1e28d8724e&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Request a Yard Sign or Bumper Sticker!")
---
|
---
| As always, I'm tremendously grateful to have your support and I look forward to what we'll be able to do together for our Commonwealth!

Respectfully,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
|
---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=5dd667ee1b&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
---
| If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign:
---
| [Sign Up for Herrity's Headline](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=57facd7620&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline")
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=ba9c9f4718&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=666ab381e6&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](www.patforva.com)
---
| | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152
[Add us to your address book](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=c2d3b22679) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=c2d3b22679)

We want to hear how we can provide you with the best information and opportunities to help achieve our shared goal of electing more Democrats to our state legislatures. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Trump’s disastrous economic agenda taking hold has put all of us in a tight spot. **That’s why, right now, we’re not here to ask for a donation. We want to hear how we can provide you with the best information and opportunities to help achieve our shared goal of electing more Democrats to our state legislatures.** _What is something you wish you knew more about the DLCC?_ _What would motivate you to make a contribution?_ _Is there something about our work you’re struggling to understand?_ _Are there specific topics you wish we’d focus more time on?_ _What kind of content should we do our best to avoid?_ We don’t need you to write an essay. We just want to hear what you think, and we’ll do our best to put your thoughts into action. | **Will you take a moment to share your feedback?**

Yes
No
Unsure

| Hey Friend, You won’t hear about this on the news, and that’s exactly why I’m telling you. A group of us just dropped a special run of pro-Trump tees — and we’re giving the first 200 away for free to VIPs like you in order to spread the word. Just cover shipping. It’s called the **Comeback Commander** tee, and it’s the kind of shirt that turns heads and sparks conversations. Not because it’s loud, but because it means something. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjEP2jAUhH-NsxHZ78UJDB5KURgQHUqligk5fjYY2UmwA4h_X4Uixrv7pPt0HIN3L8WaNQO4eMoMgOEPBnA7PmO6X-Nuu9hx2C5u9a8o5xV-ftAHfOHe6GO4HQLtD-ssuuOfa1jtH-KLT6_RfuHPaWmj9mFum01BCh3xqrBKNFUllwhQFxfFwXQaDZfC8nopqUMi2xBo6QSXhhdeAQfJK4EA0HAsVxU5MloQrxG1bFjF3z-ljjZ5o0WenjqlYYilGWIR1GWaxvwWaxm0iVKZbU--P9MQte_zjDFotXMnw7AdnLPp5InhRsAKGdTz8j9zXH5yvncMN391-j0MsRJYJEXj04fgcz0rnd9Ks8BDwb8AAAD__3SldK4) _Available in 3 Colors_ We’re tired of staying quiet. Tired of watching this country get dragged through the mud. This is a small way to say:
**_We’re still here. We’re not backing down._** [Grab yours while you still can](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjEP2jAUhH-NsxHZ78UJDB5KURgQHUqligk5fjYY2UmwA4h_X4Uixrv7pPt0HIN3L8WaNQO4eMoMgOEPBnA7PmO6X-Nuu9hx2C5u9a8o5xV-ftAHfOHe6GO4HQLtD-ssuuOfa1jtH-KLT6_RfuHPaWmj9mFum01BCh3xqrBKNFUllwhQFxfFwXQaDZfC8nopqUMi2xBo6QSXhhdeAQfJK4EA0HAsVxU5MloQrxG1bFjF3z-ljjZ5o0WenjqlYYilGWIR1GWaxvwWaxm0iVKZbU--P9MQte_zjDFotXMnw7AdnLPp5InhRsAKGdTz8j9zXH5yvncMN391-j0MsRJYJEXj04fgcz0rnd9Ks8BDwb8AAAD__3SldK4) If you’re the type to sit this one out, that’s your call.
But if you're still proud to stand up and be counted — this shirt belongs on your back. [Click here to check it out!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjEP2jAUhH-NsxHZ78UJDB5KURgQHUqligk5fjYY2UmwA4h_X4Uixrv7pPt0HIN3L8WaNQO4eMoMgOEPBnA7PmO6X-Nuu9hx2C5u9a8o5xV-ftAHfOHe6GO4HQLtD-ssuuOfa1jtH-KLT6_RfuHPaWmj9mFum01BCh3xqrBKNFUllwhQFxfFwXQaDZfC8nopqUMi2xBo6QSXhhdeAQfJK4EA0HAsVxU5MloQrxG1bFjF3z-ljjZ5o0WenjqlYYilGWIR1GWaxvwWaxm0iVKZbU--P9MQte_zjDFotXMnw7AdnLPp5InhRsAKGdTz8j9zXH5yvncMN391-j0MsRJYJEXj04fgcz0rnd9Ks8BDwb8AAAD__3SldK4) —A fellow American who hasn’t given up

Hey there, I know these fundraising emails can get annoying — asking you for your hard-earned money is my _least_ favorite part of this job. **But our important work in New Mexico didn’t end when Trump was elected, and it won’t end despite how much this administration wants us to bow out. ** I’ll never stop fighting to defend our fundamental rights and protect the progress we’ve made. We must continue this work together to elect more leaders who will defend our values against MAGA extremism. Supporting Democratic candidates, organizing our communities, and fueling the fight for progress is how we’ll win. **[Can you help us elect Democrats up and down the ballot across the country by pitching in any amount toward our mid-month fundraising goal? clean_body: Hey there, I know these fundraising emails can get annoying — asking you for your hard-earned money is my least favorite part of this job. But our important work in New Mexico didn’t end when Trump was elected, and it won’t end despite how much this administration wants us to bow out. I’ll never stop fighting to defend our fundamental rights and protect the progress we’ve made. We must continue this work together to elect more leaders who will defend our values against MAGA extremism. Supporting Democratic candidates, organizing our communities, and fueling the fight for progress is how we’ll win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support makes it possible to create a better, brighter future for New Mexico and our country. name: Forward Party
subject: Control What You Can - How Is The Economy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Make your voice heard.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=1)
---
| Peter -- We're on to the newest installment of _**Control What You Can**_ _._ For the next few weeks, we'll be focused on the economy. Arguably, no single issue drives voter behavior more, and so we'll be covering this topic from a variety of angles. This week, we're looking at how people's personal finances are doing. So...How do you think the American Economy is doing? [**How is the United States managing its Economy?**](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_economy_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=2) Building a resilient and representative democracy takes time and energy from us all. Driving real change takes honest conversations from all of us. We're taking the next few months to reach out to you on [social media](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=iYPFp8KjICaFwWY4tMEogGwZulglpVXqj5Jt0GqFzWmc1y1sQ3HDXm44fMv5UI1HcdBjDvfsnajtXx1ag3Cbvg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=3), on [our website](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_economy_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=4), and here to ask you for your opinions.**** Answer on our website: [](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_economy_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=5) Or on X: [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=iYPFp8KjICaFwWY4tMEogGwZulglpVXqj5Jt0GqFzWmc1y1sQ3HDXm44fMv5UI1HcdBjDvfsnajtXx1ag3Cbvg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_saturday_economic_fol&n=6) We want to know how satisfied you are with US economic policies—**click the image above and tell us your answer**. And once you've answered the broad question, leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! clean_body: Make your voice heard. | | | Peter -- We're on to the newest installment of Control What You Can . For the next few weeks, we'll be focused on the economy. Arguably, no single issue drives voter behavior more, and so we'll be covering this topic from a variety of angles. This week, we're looking at how people's personal finances are doing. So...How do you think the American Economy is doing? Building a resilient and representative democracy takes time and energy from us all. Driving real change takes honest conversations from all of us. We're taking the next few months to reach out to you on , on , and here to ask you for your opinions.** Answer on our website: Or on X: We want to know how satisfied you are with US economic policies—click the image above and tell us your answer**. And once you've answered the broad question, leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

body:
We’re not going to sugarcoat anything here. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105775427/539348528/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTViNTdhZi1iNzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CmXoLhdKF3j2EiWK8jp9axgqDxNSNAPPGnEtH7qp5s=&emci=cb7848e8-9518-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2a5b57af-b718-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter, we want to be clear about something: what’s happening right now in our government— _**it makes us sick.**_

Our government is _supposed_ to work for the people. But under Trump’s leadership, the only ones benefitting are his extremist allies.

Elon Musk is getting sweetheart government contracts—not because he’s serving the American people, but as a _thank you_ for bankrolling Trump’s campaign. Meanwhile, he’s directing DOGE to lay off thousands of workers, gutting American jobs in the name of so-called “efficiency.”

What’s worse? Trump’s cronies are even threatening cuts to Social Security, jacking up tariffs that are hurting our allies and our farmers, and breaking promise after promise to lower costs for working families. This is not how it’s supposed to be.

When Kim holds town halls, she hears the same thing again and again: People are _confused_ about why Trump is targeting them—and they’re _furious_ that he lied.

They’re also ready. Ready to fight back. Ready to change the narrative. Kim’s doing everything she can with the power Democrats have—but real change comes when we flip the House. And that starts by holding the line here in WA-08.

**[Can you chip in to help us keep WA-08 blue and ensure we have the resources needed to fight back against this reckless administration ahead of our crucial mid-month fundraising deadline?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105775428/539348529/-782864167?refcode=em25_250413_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250413_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=2a5b57af-b718-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode2=2a5b57af-b718-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTViNTdhZi1iNzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CmXoLhdKF3j2EiWK8jp9axgqDxNSNAPPGnEtH7qp5s=)**

Chris Murphy emailed you. And now I've emailed you, too! We all emailed YOU because Trump's abuses of power are getting more and more nuts every day, and Republicans are just sitting on their easy chairs letting him do it! We HAVE to take back the Senate from those jokers ASAP, because nothing \-- not a damn thing -- is gonna be OK again until we do. But even though all of these Democratic all-stars warned you just how freakin' HUGE the stakes are, we're STILL short of our $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal to answer their calls! I promise you, there's only one way to fight someone like Trump: By building an unbreakable coalition of Democrats ready to do whatever it takes to win. | |

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/tk5AXc2vIFDuOoauPKNlKFb3XhSSPFvJGzCXcLhHBMCRb6WW78iTmmGZAKVpHtRHiWwaUVcxtGsYsGZfGgwH6mALKwZ-tHZI9ppJHeipaPehWwVKLjszaXJqOoiIv1fcJ344q9Bsj98zFY_xuDkjPVwU2SMCG0D370xvBm_WifC0jGtMQyBCj6Sl17K2uwrSptZ5v0JcQ6j76Zg0GECfqIrveEUj6PlXTA1elJ-Y9l4BgIMD4OPDWoa7c4kgqj-ttlN_oc3NGDO2_He2SOmXVjCsdKN_jIQnYhCIQ2r0caBoDlIGvldlxKG5Vwm9lFHNEiLgOPEACQJIOyezdpW0bAKVHGG0gFWMtB_2dcwp9G6Q6E1C_srMRFRlOusl9cBLLRvLCatmTk-As0JNM8XDvbfX5TTiJT_zEwzy3kVRt0zyOb09HBXHkX_WlwhUna6Ya5U8ZwmprQl-vXL3bSSplEYw-yQIL0VGBs_J3baEEw/v8l1qZOnyAn_Ju0k1J2in838bVFiDRC_/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/_oL6KMMtlQTyVEA-Qdyll7D1wzV8R413rVHKSAciVwMoxtxR8TSoXwdgKjfXc6y78zdSb08WrsCwJojBZpH22xyF4fn0T_vN_UtcgxuN9rbDfF-Ote_i8lX0rE6W8BtZoHGzy5x8Z58x8vKdHRus0IZxvUeeJydz-mhCxQF3SUbb2YFXnWmJGAKp1k1tuBOyKSX4SWrsPhAVGjEDu-Krey1kwayXm7GagiSlWs1FkE5UoHskA-xpv4k5_c48UZMScnu4ZiWecQ4AwqLr2DdT4GiP_Pl29gNJGENL93_r01CaNY31AnfhDKSRCGJG3nPcM4IkqhVUMYgV_tiqvV03XtykEEaD8Cptoa0QOMnYVlE0rqVOa225VTVZvdfUXjZZaH2byQPk5iloKTDd7VV6eZ84djx5yfAspfBojuMjXArYbaYgvkJMM9s3mTcqp7F8H-0Bv8dBLgypIrHJB-5mxN4m7lSw1mTaYwI38tGJ9A/jM0VRPzs2ntI2iyK5gfCFYWGeh-uyAoa/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/L9jnHHrjTt4TxbpYML9dqcZFrVbC49s4NEaLH5GE2wTeDROQmgPEdHczMvqnpv_Xjl_22yeIJTl2JBiJ9WeqdH8Heu0y55JfID4P8zggJg_3vZLNEn_HHsVko0MWw62BhSAALFTvFAoE8Z4-Eqwx6wPy_bzD4dbPCoeDx1_7Ih5dV3Vwel-y5AynhDD3R-NKp3D4zrvzs3TbErbC0vvEox2ZHAQowzbItTmn9Tm1zSPk93H16xhfsTuSdACnStrAqnhcwzqIYjWKaAPJ6rFF6XIVB32H8ID904tSyxkvQIeB0eVEGt7hmEEL0A9xnhVbP56vSKH-ZUk84-PoWHGyd_KNvLOg-DfyOziF1Dg2KnmGqjaIAgqcFyPgqXfOPZd_3GKFcPpj0xIsEoLtO4950k46n9pOuIadM7sfyXzhVyahaMOzwj0wdtNV8TqIFDtnxlpSbNFVe9O_ukX3CTiN6_vwh7PnTx2XYKYxUYTCvg/Pl-r4hoKjsT3YiWJvu076X11OgATql4E/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/7rp59rvX6NP7oDlHoLjEx8EIVTfMwGcv5BGuyZEJfda3CRybTRlU-pcL-PfKzwPvGq5xlud-7qLHVRfLfNBAYtyhhK_dTATLm3tF4DSWJTV343jizATfqepfbJL4Qwgj8jukZ_cURtp4VQ5-zEfClzaZC4_3lrvfbhNUhZKroNu6NwgLxydKj1U3Ycr9XdXApf5HryuuHsK0_ZaMJQ4_o9IG9GKw0ZiaadIUuYjpCzY4dWV1sNwSU4htxWMnxx9_oq7TgwtYQb0y5iC0TfsIyRPyJ2I-wUy0zzUbQfs7J1pOtXbFhwFphuzsKgWX_rhe6uxt_c-MeYNousSkSl_Joj1iE52kcB1GUgobWeAzGeP6EJn5ZFhv5gwf2ZTMQ1p7c1bwPbSsuRQNK6r51jqbqhyGGvWkbMnswkHVIreWa3JMRkEvltz5ccn0frirTykqlOCkRvU8YdNIzMq0kj5mb9Q5F1DL97Myybi6FLnP3A/A3aaDyD9OszCTsOg0_BRrlmkgue5Dz5X/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/sG446x_b17TYWUGOAy1e6ZumbtwHj6pRG_sex87B5Lv1ynlayfeAbKp3lbB4TqZLrVGgiV5o5p_fiBJNlbZi3sAEkzJxtCm8aun02eMlwoJT7AQTeiEkLJeSkv7aaOuh0GnK6auZg0-A8z4r1_hoOF4yxETv_0Wq9Sy2RqmDHxXZCjLgTy-OQYJPXJCcyvjQC6iVrfK1p0NHZZ6ANAfvpf1k4VRFaKFQIU_r62cmoqCrlbkbj8DCadUkDJPc4XiVDXmbxCb3wFGgPRZWtN29N-b-PRrVV5bh01vMMPbN16qNdgjcPDHMYBHsdsAsQynUsIXcd0OEIpo20SyrOFusIInzTw0SUBb0EMq2zhOyxw_roWipMmvv_t0Lspb2Lw22dWO14BjJMhJ6ICPO_dmeWlu8JXWgKf_W-e7sAtw_eTSSI5yMxmTj1PHRq3BFXl9YQsdSnxX-OAhjDIut5Lbwar0r9q6JDmGnYVsqBgGGSw/oS5ua7W4zzp70Qma3weOjRUFfUpvvtCu/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

name: John Fetterman
subject: a billionaire's yacht shouldn't come out of your Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
| | |
---
Hey Derek, it’s John.

I’m gonna be real with you: **The GOP is planning to gut Social Security + Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.**
This isn't some far-off threat – these benefit programs for hardworking families are in serious danger.

But I’m not gonna stand by and just let Republicans ax 'em.
I’m *always* a hard NO on any bill that would cut Social Security. And for what? So the wealthiest dudes in America can buy another yacht? Hell no.
**[So this is where you come in. We cannot let Republicans rip it away.🙅♂️ We need to show folks are fired up, and one of the best ways to do that right now is to knock my mid-month fundraising goal out of the park. Can you toss in a few bucks before my Tuesday deadline to help us get there?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50491?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50492?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=4&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50493?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=5&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=6&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
---
Listen, *only* give if you can afford it. I know sh*t is expensive right now, so no worries if you can’t donate today. **[But if you’re able to pitch in, it would mean a lot. Every dollar helps.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=7&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)**
The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.

It's nuts. I know you and other hardworking folks in PA and across this country have paid into Social Security your entire lives.

YOU paid into it. YOU earned it by working your ass off. It's only right you see those checks come through in full and on time.
**[So if you want to join me in telling Trump and his billionaire buddies to get their hands off Social Security and help me hit my $10,000 mid-month goal, you can chip in $5 now:](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=8&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)**
| | [Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl&t=9&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)
---
Thanks for having my back, Derek. I got yours.

John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk44-fr-fl-footer&t=10&refcode2=10033_434096_fdfEij&akid=10033%2E434096%2EfdfEij)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: I’d love your response to these tough but fair questions. | | Friend, how long has it been? I feel like we never talk anymore - I didn't even see your response to my Official Census! If you haven 't heard already, it's the biggest one ever conducted in presidential history. I know you've got a lot on your plate, Friend, but I wouldn't be asking if this wasn't important. And to sweeten the offer a little bit, I've even got a special surprise for you... You could win a FREE ROUND OF GOLF at my beautiful course! Thank you, Donald J. name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105776296/539351392/-1129875431?refcode=250413_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM3OThmZC1iYzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uuZ98z_y8vId_ueUzMNV16dOdHO23JrQCgJYT-ALJs=) Folks, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105776297/539351393/-1129875431?refcode=250413_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM3OThmZC1iYzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uuZ98z_y8vId_ueUzMNV16dOdHO23JrQCgJYT-ALJs=) I’m ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [**I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $10 between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105776298/539351394/-1129875431?refcode=250413_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM3OThmZC1iYzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uuZ98z_y8vId_ueUzMNV16dOdHO23JrQCgJYT-ALJs=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105776299/539351395/-1129875431?refcode=250413_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM3OThmZC1iYzE4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uuZ98z_y8vId_ueUzMNV16dOdHO23JrQCgJYT-ALJs=) In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by **“Duty. Honor. Kentucky.”** Thank you, Colonel Pam

subject: 20 states may soon pass Baby Olivia bills
body:
I’m incredibly excited to share that lawmakers in 20 states are working on legislation to show our “Baby Olivia” video on fetal development in classrooms.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/KrMAaPR_EnUHWPKP9sq2UzKixg4zvaWgBP0dMLaXk0Mf2AAv2lzBDv-MJ5W6I4rfjtdXEG9PRGP5v5-wxA-wKFJTcIjOGV83wBzlI0uv2oklGFfQfCdrV6H35GadmzNMVqrDESKcTtaeY6ZCb-ywdOgYIBSEPd7_3D4ykC-U3NhYuPi3RThuvYPA/ENPEeWV28Ji5Z2yIpnn_U3tLQZ2vEyDw/7)_

[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/16xvnbeUJzb5OH7GLFBq7xckC7c9p-0Tt1tXRPcnhfesfNOhvv8JUifx6mltoN6O4sjJW9IqVI26bd5ijeteTFpckGpGP7pWragFh0YKUnGGClELachT3ss92jiZ1sgTbyL4IH71Ef8QICMN5UJOcDY0GfQRtDuZ2EJdI6tV0C8zvckipFXnFFDoJfPh2_VySITmGsUPKi8rCLtYTq7p84zaTdo5nActH3b-MvwZsu_ah1PuHVU3IY4-8BzbbUvIbjXO9GfbrI5xnCiw6dQKxTIBQ4gSaKxnszvNkFcg--PmNhtBPf64DYFhrpwj3jy2NjDb9Owc-JxuKzZTZfKZcnfWkq8RUuJAauci7-gVKAZfl1eCCpPlFuzzP8cxV67IM1YUZc3hu3nxIHxNxCcK3W9sQ__3qSZipPeiN6Wu3zg/nuesLLand0cDFzmsdcC0nefGJftV8L5k/7)
#
Dear Friend of Life,

I'm incredibly excited to share that **lawmakers in 20 states** are working on legislation to show our "Baby Olivia" video on fetal development in classrooms.

Arkansas, Texas, Idaho, Iowa, Kentucky, New Hampshire, Oklahoma, Oregon, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, West Virginia, Missouri, Montana, Indiana, Hawaii, Arizona, Kansas, Florida, and Nebraska are working to advance "Baby Olivia" bills to show students the miracle of human life in the womb from fertilization to birth! They hope to join North Dakota and Tennessee as states that already require education on human development in the womb.

**I want to make sure you know that you can help advance these "Baby Olivia" bills to reach students across America right now. Use this secure link to provide vital education:** [**give.liveaction.org/fetal-development-education**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/ax6ht5k55-YrasMFhnpaiGFkB2kqpWKe15ulJG8XK-gLrMZmVuui0V7gE8T4Iqihym8-jHPUnvEOdqzEyh2nSGNSGh60OSJbxhe0w5042btpc8Yq65Cbrx5OP5hDYkbKernzGe5hXkDasDC6qIrKtRf_DhIBVi9YHOqiJiZ2r1LzBG5oaTbw7Mx4nBVNiGrXbjWcXRsGBo1buuLtxGbT7OBfE0ElQuf8zsV-seNpZ54yor5t2PRd_HRIbcs8BJii1GZ2beb48YT4pOEzxyZmpWuxHYZu3tV2StbPtz9GnTdsNH8WsdFVEiZTF9e2_UY-YQb2CO1OtUPd6E-xdGnIE8ee_W6tXNzCPgQMrQFK2PZsC8Tr7FGwsu3hLJiZc8IUyX-OGOhmtnivnWvK5cUE5BBnH5JhiASYfh-fCY3pmEQ/cQyRaWGMvW8NHjK2RvqaDoN0UM7-Ef4-/7)

As a whole, our educational system has failed to teach students the truth about the child living and growing inside the womb. Instead, pro-abortion organizations like Planned Parenthood have been allowed to spread deceptive lies to students about reproduction and fetal development. Tragically, it's no wonder abortion is skyrocketing, and many young people are pro-abortion.

Friend of Life, you and I both know that human life begins at fertilization. In the womb, our gender, ethnicity, hair color, eye color, and countless other traits are already determined. Unfortunately, many people have not been taught this in school.

**Today, we have an incredible opportunity to give what we 've been given -- [and save lives by doing so.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/0oCK103Y-K0hkC6_qnHwReD9gCtvUQSnUx6sXG0aeF5nayCaMH5rNLCrmeYIz1xTq-R0ZwbM6WgWEVL4B2eIfqGqsfo0j9RZDDsi9buxIpLwFCD6iaZSdciWRBxe3IRkYBbGL99_AVYT1UQw5Q--KMbtgANjVpI6iN2P1IebUZhSi4HdW5W8pFT3k0-N_2700DaKBHkxLHOwzw51LpWtxV-xWVEQDdL_z7Y9xFkoZvOP4IZdC-2jo9hyfKDCBSH_R2fqek2bEuVRKqt7wPG-AgmvQqnBAUX3eYvW8WMpAdINjtH5rfXnXBwS-_R4F48N8H1uzLSd-a3lQniiuFiONfDFdzppNVJZKABCmPuo3MaY3X1y3yVQeVy87egDGrwSVulNenXbeFzDdtPUxK-BRVbn4MIkl5TBJeTEDHVO4CA/Ep1LvFNFjJK1_I5OqXeXQd_Q7fuSPRW6/7)**

Because of you, students across the country will learn about the true beauty of preborn children, such as the development of the baby's brain, sight and hearing, and the delicate formation of fingerprints, organs, fingers, and toes.

Abortion becomes unthinkable when these facts are known.

Once people grasp the reality, beauty, and wonder of human life in the womb, they become more motivated to protect it in any way possible. Will you help us to equip lawmakers with the necessary resources to pass pro-life legislation in their states?

By requiring education such as "Baby Olivia" in our schools, we can equip young people with the scientific truth about fetal development in a way they can understand and defend.

We must act now! Two precious babies die every minute in America. That's over 2,800 innocent souls lost before the day is over.

Lawmakers in these 22 states are already bravely speaking for those who cannot speak for themselves. Will you stand beside these pro-life advocates and help amplify their life-saving efforts?

Students today are exposed to heartbreaking amounts of misinformation at an early age, especially by Planned Parenthood, and we are determined to ensure that our nationwide school system does not continue in this trend.

**You can educate future generations on the beauty of human life in the womb and stop this endless cycle of death in our nation by giving today:[give.liveaction.org/fetal-development-education](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/saNY_g0R3O8SIDaDJCB9NvUQKyLNHxPmbaiPjINdCxPDCYJz87b3UBLYrT_Zk-d8sHp1WYApP_Xdx5ZXPsaaII1K8doandamw3u84okThnRgqI9dOK2sI6T4FjaI1bmor7e0etXXLnw84HXLcCzV9tKP4aHgaaPpNTRSA4-y_Mrt6yBel_ONISiJORJnbLb_SOG5eO1clXGFhWvCpgXHfyuU8WxQ8A2Bi7Jo_-F_ondag0BRifG_Cz1Lfk--c4pPMi5PZWUcWI7OEPicb7QwKL8bKv88SV070NooMUwIL0x34Ksl4qwr7XktQ77naKaT9ruxKhEeW5H4uttuS0G6hySIswFV483rVdouELaH7q-OCF6YkUa8tWnACmSoqol_q-aCOoqprQjvnFeorok4d3b9bulJeWUNpmmpMVP9m9I/eoT4VyEAlxa8ks5P2yQpYzTWyP3kBAtU/7)**

Thank you for joining me in ensuring our children are taught that every new life begins at fertilization and is worth fighting for.

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/EpQaHqqaD7nLZ6NC1G3fdR70bUMMbP9sCD5-7rpCAa98z30zH0ORCiD7hXr-6bfgnMzqIkio_oVpfeaieNhp7WjLarm06hhREJXdo2SiXtl1a7hnkYONJlbCa8Cz3LQv3ezTGPd_AmpoPj4cxJE9Y3TouWLL9y39Lgs6vcYLRPO7yHA4PVA8DQREuGx8uRMR1TqrZV4KvgNU1DoSUH39IE-ppVfk7zE0IKkTWX89LNzCPJNshIi6Ua4wR0xlhMZX51IXaEMCWfbNTSE7Nuqa7-UsJbjGYKeVDwGBaQEINBdtasJn4rQQSFg34HIecKOFp16Xjo1sP--QTKcy8J9uW1XqaxcUL846tnH4ovie6QuuUuItbRh2KdqkDlrL9usa5YZQr95Br4tdWzJ5wYpkl26XqJSOFUOGdlpg7pkXwKw/_8Yac4aInhE_NsT9yeEA1mKQ0VEsZOO_/7)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#

name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4656%2E35263%2E2ca8o-)
